725254590.Text: 【临时】物理和冰属性角色晋阶素材

321970063.Text: 【临时】风和火属性角色晋阶素材

1888054004.Text: 【临时】量子和虚数属性角色晋阶素材

1865159202.Text:
【临时】◆开拓进度与开拓者等级◆
开拓者对这个世界的探索程度，将通过开拓进度体现。
开拓者等级达到15/20/25时，需完成对应的开拓进度突破任务，方可继续提升开拓者等级。
目前开拓者等级上限为30级。
随着开拓进度提升，探索「扭曲之茧」、「虚妄之茧」将有机会获得更加丰厚的宝藏。与此同时，敌人也会变得更加强大。面对更强的敌人，请开拓者小心为上。

16869822.Text:
【临时】◆裂界碎渊◆
裂界碎渊为难度逐渐提升的多阶挑战，每阶挑战对应一个独立的迷宫，击败迷宫内所有敌人，便可领取通关奖励。其中，完成挑战目标能获取额外奖励。难度和奖励均不受开拓进度影响。
裂界碎渊内存在多种限制，进入迷宫后，无法调整队伍、光锥，无法使用道具，无法进行升级、命途等角色养成行为。

◆裂界法则◆
裂界碎渊迷宫内有时存在特殊的环境效果，会对战斗造成各种影响。每次进入挑战时，可以选择一种效果，所选裂界法则效果仅在当前迷宫内生效。

◆轮次◆
每个轮次对应一定行动时间，裂界碎渊内的所有战斗都拥有轮次限制，超过限制则视为本次挑战失败，当前战斗的轮次通过倒计时展示在左侧行动条上。在越少的轮次内通关裂界碎渊，便越容易达成目标。

553775607.Text: 【临时】◆加工◆\n列车提供的便捷功能，可以选择左侧列表中的待合成物品进行加工。

736270743.Text:
【临时】◆角色养成◆
消耗旅途见闻，可以提升角色的等级。
等级会影响角色的基础属性。

◆角色晋阶◆

角色等级达到最大值时，可以消耗特定材料进行升阶。
升阶会提升基础属性，同时提高等级上限。
部分阶段的升阶，会要求开拓者的等级或开拓进度达到一定值

-1469612489.Text:
【临时】◆光锥◆
光锥可以提供角色大量的基础属性，并赋予角色独特的光锥效果。
每一个光锥都有使用的命途类型，只有符合的命途要求的角色装备时，才会激活光锥效果。（光锥的基础属性不受此影响）

◆光锥升级◆
通过消耗材料或者其他光锥，可以提升光锥等级。
等级会影响光锥的基础属性。

◆光锥晋阶◆
光锥等级达到最大值时，可以消耗特定材料进行晋阶。
晋阶会提升基础属性，同时提高等级上限。
部分阶段的晋升，会要求开拓者的等级或开拓进度达到一定值

◆光锥叠影◆
通过消耗同名的光锥，可以对光锥进行叠影。叠影能提升光锥的技能等级，最多提示至5级。
叠影不会消耗信用点。

-358100344.Text:
【临时】◆实训◆
每天凌晨4点刷新3个实训任务，按照指引完成就能立即获得任务奖励。
完成全部3个实训任务后，还可以领取额外奖励。

◆进修◆
依次完成多个阶段的进修任务。每个阶段的任务必须全部完成并领取奖励后才能解锁下一阶段。

◆探索◆
完成探索任务领取奖励。如果是否完成和领取奖励，都将在次日凌晨4点刷新重置。

-1748919486.Text:
【临时】◆任务◆

选择任务并点击“开始追踪”后，即可显示任务指引。一次只能追踪一个任务。
完成任务后即可获得任务奖励。

1276862826.Text:
【临时】◆地图◆
「星际和平公司」为开拓者提供的星际旅行工具，可以方便地查看不同区域的平面图。开拓者可以使用地图功能，在不同区域间进行移动。
同时，地图上会标识所有可以进行的任务，以及当前进行中任务的目标。
在当前地图中选择平面图上的标识后，将为开拓者提供前往目标地点的导航。

◆锚点◆
部分区域中散布着锚点。通过与锚点通讯，可以进行队伍修整。
与锚点建立通讯后，开拓者可以通过地图快速移动到该锚点。如果开拓者在该区域的探索中不慎遭遇战斗失败，则会自动退回到最近的锚点并回复队伍成员一定量的生命值。

-1395991068.Text:
【临时】命途
角色的命途有三种类型，对应不同的效果
技能：可以提升角色的技能等级
基础属性：可以提升角色的基础属性
额外能力：可以赋予角色新的被动能力

命途的解锁
前置的命途被解锁后，才能解锁下一命途
部分命途的解锁要求角色的等级或者突破达到特定值

命途的升级
在等级达到最大值之前，命途可以通过消耗材料升级
部分命途的升级要求角色的等级或者突破达到特定值

448247263.Text: 【临时】◆扭曲之茧◆\n扭曲之茧是由裂界增值蔓生而成的茧结。开拓者可以通过使用开拓力，击破它所生成的怪物，从而获得回报。\n一次消耗的开拓力越多，生成的敌人波次也会更多，同时获得的回报也更多。

1824070099.Text: 【临时】◆收件箱◆\n最多保存1000封邮件，超出时自动删除无附件或附件已领取的旧邮件

-1063159420.Text: "Traveling is going where your heart takes you."

502924521.Text: "Do you have a friend from another world you'd like to see? Invite him/her/it/them to be your guest!"

1895721198.Text: "Explore, understand, build, and connect — that is what it means to trailblaze. Akivili may have fallen but their legacy continues!"

-114977681.Text: This foreign matter has not been granted a certain form by humanity. However, its tenacity is far superior to solid boulders. "Let's grab as much as we can. Qlipoth will need them." "I have no idea whether the Aeons need them or not. All I know is that the corporations will pay big bucks for them."

-114977684.Text: An ingot of meteoric alloy that has been cleared of impurities repeatedly and cast in extreme temperatures. The power to conquer the future lies within the ability to master the steel. "Fleming, why are we still doing stuff like this? The Aeons never took notice of our contributions. The entire galaxy is already piling with our materials. Why are we still going on about something so pointless?" "The answer is simple, Director Taravan, faith."

-114977683.Text: Only a force capable of forging the heavens and earths wields such power enough to alter its structure, making it into something so magnificent.\n\n"This can be used to forge mountain severing swords, spear bending armors, and exterior panels of galactic travel rockets."

1451106260.Text: Ash colored dark feather with a weak ember at its tip. Sparks trail the feather as it's waved around.\n\n"The legend of the Phoenix spreads far throughout the entire universe..."

1451106257.Text: After the Skyfire Catastrophe, feathers like this can occasionally be found in the ruins. An eternal flame burns at the tip of the feather. "Legend has it that you can become immortal if you drink the blood of the Phoenix." "Sounds like another abomination made by Yaoshi."

1451106258.Text: A type of feather found on stars whose surface is permanent with violent flames. Blue flames as hot and vibrant as these planets shoot out from the tip of the feather.\n\n"In the legends of particular ancient worlds, it is said that the sun is an egg of reincarnation, and in it cradles an immortal bird whose tail feathers burn more fiercely than any fire of this world, able to illuminate the world."

-1277777095.Text: The frosty mist it emits when removed from a specialized canister looks like the breath of wintertime.\n\n"Is this part of your collection, Herta? What do you need it for?"

-1277777098.Text: It is untouchable unless with the aid of specialized insulation equipment. It is said that some cold climate dwelling inhabitants in the galaxy migrated to water-based planets and used the ice crystals to build bridges for migration, only to find them turning the planet into a frozen world. "Ah! My fingers! My fingers! They're freezing—"

-1277777097.Text: It continues to consume the heat and kinetic energy of the universe, leaving behind a space of near-absolute-zero.\n\n"It is without a doubt that the civilization that created it wanted to use it as a weapon. However, it became their demise instead."

288306846.Text: Electric spheres are released whenever a conductor disturbs its balance.\n\n"Half of the known 143 star destroyer arsenals of the Antimatter Legion have to do with Lightning, while less than one sixth have to do with Fire."

288306843.Text: If ionization controllers fail, the energy captured within the capacitor will end up completely destroying the entire country.\n\n"Klein Dalton, you're under arrest. You've unleashed an unbelievably large amount of Lightning power, destroyed those innocent countries on four planets, all just for these minerals? You did all of this just for the darn bounties from the corporation? My god, you're pathetic."

288306844.Text: With no clear reason, they've been created and discarded carelessly into space, as if they're just abandoned toys of the gods.\n\n"Lightning Sphere Races where the loser has to bet on the fate of an entire world are my favorite. The stakes really are high with these guys!"

-2084346149.Text: No one understands how this cyclone continues to twirl with no end. The current consensus is that the eye of the cyclone is some sort of spinning space warp phenomenon. The cyclone continues to spin even when placed in a vacuumed space. "I'm not sure why this cyclone reminds me of my unfortunate romantic relationships..." "Because everything reminds you of them!"

-2084346152.Text: Its creator made it to provide an unlimited amount of wind power. However, things often don't go according to plan. Anything pulled into the cyclone is immediately torn into pieces. It's more of a weapon of weather warfare than a power generator.\n\n"That's how Roriya was destroyed... I've been there before, and I liked it there... Damn you Nanook! Damn you Antimatter Legion!"

-2084346151.Text: Only the vast sea can contain the uncontrolled storm. To calm its rage, researchers displaced it into the ocean and successfully altered the planet-wide ocean currents with the gigantic maelstrom it created. "This is terraforming, the forefront, and force for creating a more suitable living environment." "You call the daily storm alerts a more suitable living environment?! Screw you!"

-518262208.Text: These ripples are the most basic form of energy fluctuation. Its presence can be captured whenever the Astral Express passes by. "We have so much time." "We have all the time."

-518262211.Text: These waves are enough to cause a disturbance in the wavelengths in reality. Its presence can sometimes be captured whenever the Astral Express passes by. "The tide rises and falls."

-518262210.Text: Like gravel collecting into the form of a pearl, these fading echoes of fruitless dreams of the world should never have existed.\n\n"Dreams all come to an end, just as the bubbles will burst under the strong light."

1047821733.Text: Though it is referred to as a leaf, it obviously does not belong to a plant and is more of a representation of something more abstract. The ancient light nourishes the leaf through its veins, displaying its faded but remnant power. "One leaf, one world."

1047821730.Text: Though it is referred to as a twig, it obviously does not belong to a plant and is more of a representation of something more abstract. A sprout may regrow once again, not into a form of a leaf, but something more vast and powerful. "I will turn back time, bring the dead back to life, and make new leaves grow from the dead branches of the tree."

1047821731.Text: Though it is referred to as a branch, it obviously does not belong to a plant and is more of a representation of something more abstract. It seems to be made from a complex array of light, as if it were part of something grander. "The golden apple tree guarded by the serpent, the Tree of Life in the Garden of Eden, the World Tree extending across the nine realms, and the tree in The Song by God... are all just myths derived from the same archetype: A large tree penetrated all that existed at the beginning of time, carrying all the possibilities and information of the universe."

1451106355.Text: This weapon represents its owner's rank and accomplishments in the name of Destruction.\n\n"The wielder of this weapon is tasked with destroying nations."

1451106354.Text: This weapon represents its owner's rank and accomplishments in the name of Destruction.\n\n"The wielder of this weapon is tasked with eradicating all life."

1451106353.Text: This weapon represents its owner's rank and accomplishments in the name of Destruction. The master of this weapon is one who makes his appearance at the end of a war to fan the embers to consume the world. Regardless of the glories of the past or the blessing of its deities, this planet is destined to return to the ashes it once came from, and to wither away in the depths of the starry sky. "The bearer of this brand is tasked with purifying the world."

-1277777000.Text: A gift parents give to their children who've successfully hunted their first prey at their coming of age ceremony. It is a blessing of their life being as successful and true as an arrow heading towards its mark.\n\n"May the arrow on your waist and the sword in your sheath stay true and always find its target."

-1277777001.Text: \n\n"The heavens banish a celestial to traverse across the galaxy. The arrow shower pours as the bright moon is reflected in the helmet."

-1277777002.Text: Only the destined ones will ever cross paths with such divine relic. Shattering stars from light-years away, humans can only hope to grasp fractions of the powers of the divine arrow through the remnants of its ashes. Only the chief of the Xianzhou artisans has the right to reforge the shards to gift to the hero of the age. "The death of a star shall shine bright for ages to come."

288306941.Text: It can unlock the inspirations hidden deep within the conscience. To take hold of the key is to take hold of the shining embers leading to the forwarding path. "Eureka!"

288306940.Text: It can unlock the mysteries binding the truth of the world and grants knowledge beyond the understanding of humans. No matter how the wielder attempts to display their possession of the key, no one but themselves can see the physical form of the key. Some people believe that it is a gift from the heavens, while others think it's a sign of mental disorder. "I had a dream of molecules coiling up into a loop like a snake seizing its own tail. I woke up realizing that this is the answer I've been looking for all along!"

288306939.Text: This is a proof of invitation to the halls of the Nous Temple. Finding the door of which this key opens is far more epic of a task than obtaining the key itself. Those who have entered the sacred doors immediately realize that it would be impossible to return once you've set foot on the other side. "Knowledge does not have answers to the universe, but it will teach you how to ask the questions that do."

-2084346054.Text: Ancient legends entail a war where humans exhausted all available and primitive methods in following the gods into battle against overwhelmingly powerful beasts. This shield is a witness to that war. "There's no choice but to stop it, even if the efforts are futile."

-2084346055.Text: It may be a large shield, but it feels as light as a feather. Even after taking on a full charge, no marks can be seen on the face of the shield. Ancient legends entail a war where high-spirited warriors wielding deathray beaming spears and shields forged of Frost Steel defending a nation destined to falter in the face of war. This shield is a witness to that war. "The powerful voices chant: "The enemies are at our gates!"

-2084346056.Text: The wielder of this shield is seemingly protected by an invisible shield wall, immune to fiery arrows or mountainous claws. Ancient legends entail a war where a tribal hero wielding a bronze shield charged by side of warriors armed with fiery spears against an ancient beast. This shield is a witness to that war. "Do not cross the line."

-518262113.Text: Nothing can prove its noumenon. Touch gently to hear an unclear murmur from the shard. "████ ██ █ █"

-518262114.Text: No reflections can be seen on the surface of the black prism. Not only does it suck in all the light, it seems to also absorb the wielder's emotions, leaving only an empty void.\n\n"..."

-518262115.Text: The weak-minded and soft-willed will spend their eternity in chaos from just a simple glance into the prism.\n\n" "

1047821828.Text: It plays a relaxing and joyful tune. Even through the simplistic tune, anyone with the slightest understanding of music can tell the mastery of the composer of the piece. "Grab the hands of your beloved and let us dance!"

1047821827.Text: It plays a hymn sung by a small band. It is impossible to find out to whom the lyrics of the song sends its praise. "Penury, trial of the Great One! Wealth, grace of the Great One!"

1047821826.Text: It plays a powerful galactic symphony.\n\n"Some astronomers believe that the revolutions of the heavenly spheres work the same as complex mechanical structures. The pleasant notes emitted during the movements of the stars are known as the 'Harmony of the Heavenly Spheres.'"

-1681061527.Text: Those who come in contact with it are slowly healed of their wounds and illnesses. People who pray for the blessing of life while in despair will always have their prayers answered. "You shall be granted what you ask for."

-1681061529.Text: The stamen contains concentrated amounts of the Power of Fertility, ensuring the ever-lasting vitality of the flower. No fire, ice, or any harsh environment can hinder the growth of this magnificent life form. Someday it will feed on the nutrients of the stars and take root in the flesh of the world and never perish, birthing fruits in answer to promises of immortality. "The giant canoe eclipses the magnificence of the mountains and drifts above the void. Consumption of the tree of undying on it grants a promise of immortality."

-1418939596.Text: It is a lesion that breeds evil, the impulse to sin. It is the source of the Fragmentum distortion. A heavy blow has caused this heart to stop beating and lose its luster. "Preliminary tests indicate it's some kind of hybrid: one half is primordial, and the other half is something very similar to Stellaron." — Department of Biology, Sarah Castro

-1418939599.Text: It is a lesion that breeds evil, the impulse to sin. It is the source of the Fragmentum distortion. The heart is glimmering and the veins on it indicate it's still alive. "What kind of monster is this? Did you see it... It was the face of our previous leader!"

-1418939598.Text: It is a lesion that breeds evil, the impulse to sin. It is the source of the Fragmentum distortion. The heart is pulsating slowly, with a residual force powerful enough to cause a new calamity. It's best to destroy it to prevent further troubles. "It's like a cancer..."

167347321.Text: A veteran soldier has many battle scars.\n\n"In ancient times, there was only one way Silvermane Guards could retire: death."

167347318.Text: Maybe it's proof of heroics that you can brag about to your family. Maybe it's a lucky charm that protects you from a bullet.\n\n"Times have changed."

167347319.Text: A proof of honor awarded to those that fight against Fissure creatures, Undergrounders, and sudden disasters. It is not usually pinned onto the recipient's chest, but rather placed onto his coffin. "Remember, young Gepard. It is not a toy: it is the destiny and blood of the Landau family."

1733431262.Text: Despite its size, it was cast and polished in a way that people today would struggle to replicate.\n\n"A small screw in the Old World is stronger than our armor."

1733431259.Text: Once taken apart, the precision components can never be put back together. Even the maintenance veterans in Belobog's Technology Division would think twice before touching it.\n\n"You idiot, the Bluecoats will only give you a few canned goods for this. Take it to Boss Svarog and you won't need to worry about food and clothing for a while."

1733431260.Text: It uses Geomarrow as an energy source. When powered, it spews wandering auroras, not sparkles.\n\n"Only the Technology Division directly under the Consul has access to information regarding the Old World. I lost my privileges after I was fired."

1330146735.Text: The saint worries as the drought comes. Something fell from the heavens, and it seemed she found a way to save everyone from it. "One should tame the untamed before one can perform impossible miracles." — Admonishments 1:23

1330146732.Text: The saint resists as apocalypse dawns. Deep down inside, she knows what sins she's committed. She grabs the last flames in the core of the world and wields it as a sword, so she could protect the rest of us. "A Consul must shine bright like the stars to guide the people in their paths." —— Divine Record

1330146733.Text: The saint submits as death arrives. What she yearns for is carved into the hearts of her successors: Let the warmth of spring return to the land and oust the chill of winter, let the skies rain silky rain and not hail and blizzard, let the rivers run with life and not frozen in death. "Death is but a short dream. I shall become the nutrients of the flame and brighten what is dark. I shall tread forward to shield you from the icy winds, and melt the frozen walls in your path." —— Divine Record

-114974350.Text: Coffee beans discovered in a Fragmentum on Jarilo-VI.\nBefore the Eternal Freeze, people from this world would sip this bitter sweet drink, much like you do.

-114974351.Text: The man in the painting is dressed like a noble, with a... uh, bitter face?\nIt must have been difficult to remain motionless in the same heroic pose.

-114974352.Text: A pendant found in the Fragmentum.

-114974353.Text: A few coins found in the Fragmentum.\nA relic from an ancient era where metal resources were so abundant the Union could create coins.

-114974354.Text: You seemed to get some satisfaction, but you really didn't gain anything from this trip.

-114974355.Text: This insignia, a handicraft made for fun, circulates the inner circle of prospectors.\nA few words are scrawled on the back of the badge.\n"Don't look back"

-114974356.Text: This insignia, a handicraft made for fun, circulates the inner circle of prospectors.\nA few words are scrawled on the back of the badge.\n"Right goes astray"

-114974341.Text: This insignia, a handicraft made for fun, circulates the inner circle of prospectors.\nA few words are scrawled on the back of the badge.\n"Riches are blinding"

-114974342.Text: An ancient key used to open a door somewhere.

1451109592.Text: Small toys with crude worksmanship.\nJudging from the wear, someone played with it for a long time.

1451109591.Text: A small ore mined from a Geomarrow vein, carefully wrapped in this sample box.\nIt's uncertain whether its dangerous energy can be prevented from leaking.

1451109590.Text: A mark stamped by patrol robots when prospectors enter the base.\nWith it, you won't be bothered by those annoying guards.

1451109589.Text: The undergrounders call them "ancient relics."\nIts structure indicates it was responsible for cooling some type of machine.

1451109588.Text: The undergrounders call them "ancient relics."\nIts structure indicates it was a wear-resistant bearing on a large machine.

1451109587.Text: 【临时】「用来打开和它一样锈迹斑斑的大门。」

1451109586.Text: 【临时】「很久之前，曾有人每个清晨都会拿起这串钥匙，哼着快乐的小曲，开启一天的生活。」

1451109585.Text: 【临时】「一分钱，一分货。很显然，这玩意值不了几分钱。」

1451109599.Text: 【临时】「花语为『平凡的美好』。据说在寒潮之前只是路边随处可见的野花。」

-1277773764.Text: 【临时】「矿镐的尖头被擦得锃亮，拿来当武器的话或许也有不俗的威力？」

-1277773766.Text: 【临时】「戴上它，你就是整个矿区最靓的仔。」

-1277773767.Text: 【临时】「背面刻有明显的『巴拉金』字样。直觉告诉你，这个小玩意的来历绝对不简单……」

-1259785522.Text: "People run around fighting and trading for numbers in a terminal, but the truly precious cannot be bought."

1968251913.Text: Fuel canisters filled up with the dreams and courage of the Nameless.\n\n"Idealism? I prefer to call it the observer effect and human self-actualization."

-1995961571.Text: "I am not Fuli... I only believe in myself, for the path of immortality never ends."

1968251912.Text: A travel diary with messy handwriting and random content. It's not of much use to you.\n\n"Danheng, hurry up and finish reading it so you can throw it away."

402167971.Text: A neatly organized collection of educational adventure notes containing countless illustrations and texts entailing adventures from beginning to end, as well as valuable information and survival-related techniques. "Why not just digitize it and save it on a photolith disk? That'd be much more convenient." "Advanced technology is far more fragile than you'd think when faced with stellar storms and neuron flow eruptions. Besides, I'm sure the author of this book wanted people to read it in the simplest of ways."

-1163915970.Text: Required reading for world exploration. Press the "Read" button to tune in to an attractive voice in a language of your understanding telling you about the legendary encounters of renowned adventurers across different worlds, as well as the precious wisdom and knowledge that they have gathered. "All-new series of the Traveler's Guide, 'The Chef's Manual to Galactic Cuisine,' will soon become available for purchase." "For submissions, please connect to telepathy beacon ERD-230 to contact an Erudition Association representative. Method of payment can be arranged to your convenience."

1968251911.Text: An imaginary substance and basic material that shouldn't have existed in reality used to create Light Cones. The images contained in the Light Cones become clearer when infused with this substance. "I see, so this is the supposed 'Sentiention' of the Garden of Recollection. No wonder the Keepers can set off on galactic voyages with memories."

402167970.Text: A can of Aether refined through special techniques.\n\n"Handle with care, do not drop or place pressure upon it. If damages and leaks occur, please refer to chapter II of the 'Leak Disaster Response Manual' for emergency response."

-760698945.Text: A common medicine used by adventurers to quickly seal wounds with adhesive foam.

-760698946.Text: A common medicine used by adventurers to quickly seal wounds with adhesive foam. A larger packaging for the same price!

-760698947.Text: Himeko made the coffee herself.\nIts hellish taste awakens a person's desire for life, like pouring boiling water onto the face.

1947981434.Text: A secret Herta formula bought from a clan of warriors.\nWhen applied to the skin before a fight, it will create a protective layer over the skin that protects against physical attacks.

1947981433.Text: A secret Herta formula obtained from a war-torn world.\nA drink will enhance your muscles and coordination.

-1406299202.Text: Tiny ice fragments fallen from the depths of the lightless sky. Crude materials needed for the Ascension of Ice characters.

-1406299201.Text: Frigid ice crystals fallen from the depths of the lightless sky. Normal materials needed for the Ascension of Ice characters.

-1406299200.Text: Frigid ice clusters fallen from the depths of the lightless sky. Advanced materials needed for the Ascension of Ice characters.

1322584153.Text: Using some extraction technology, a bolt of lightning was converted into this ball of lightning. Crude materials needed for the Ascension of Lightning characters.

1322584154.Text: A lightning capacitor created from condensing a massive catastrophic thunderstorm. Normal materials needed for the Ascension of Lightning characters.

1322584155.Text: The full power of an electromagnetic cloud has been condensed into this ball of Lightning with the aid of the long-lost extraction technology. Advanced materials needed for the Ascension of Lightning characters.

-599730148.Text: A perfect fluid that swirls slowly. The eye of the cyclone remains stationary. Crude materials needed for the Ascension of Wind characters.

-599730147.Text: A perfect fluid that swirls furiously. The eye of the cyclone remains stationary. Normal materials needed for the Ascension of Wind characters.

-599730146.Text: A perfect fluid that swirls at extreme speed. The eye of the cyclone remains stationary. Advanced materials needed for the Ascension of Wind characters.

1322584122.Text: A mythical key possessed by the greatest prodigies and geniuses of the galaxy, used for the large Paths activation of Nous characters.

-599730178.Text: Shield forged with amazing and unreplicable craftsmanship from an unknown alloy, used for the medium Paths activation of Preservation characters.

-599730179.Text: A unique shield embedded with the rarest of ambers mined from beyond the skies, used for the large Paths activation of Preservation characters.

-1003014705.Text: A young sprout emerged from the Seed of Fertility, used for the medium Paths activation of Fertility characters.

-1003014706.Text: A gorgeous flower blossomed from the Sprout of Life, used for the large Paths activation of Fertility characters.

-1857465032.Text: The path of the Aeons.\nThose who travel the same path will surely receive corresponding rewards.

-1857465029.Text: The tracks left by the travelers on their path. The further they progress along their journey, the more apparent the miracles will be.

-1857465030.Text: The path presided over by the Aeon, Nanook.\nReckless, wrathful, and destructive actions are manifestations of the path of Destruction.

-1857465027.Text: The path presided over by the Aeon, Lan.\nDecisive, ruthless, and vengeful actions are manifestations of the path of the Hunt.

-1857465028.Text: The path presided over by the Aeon, Erudite.\nThoughtful, logical, and strategic actions are manifestations of the path of Nous.

-1857465025.Text: The path presided over by the Aeon, Xipe.\nUnderstanding, supportive, and cooperative actions are manifestations of the path of Concord.

-1857465026.Text: The path presided over by the Aeon, IX.\nSlothful, exhausted, and meaningless actions are manifestations of the path of Nihility.

-1857465023.Text: The path presided over by the Aeon, Qlipoth.\nPatient, sacrificial, and protective actions are manifestations of the path of Preservation.

-1857465024.Text: The path presided over by the Aeon, Yaoshi.\nSelfless, altruistic, and healing actions are manifestations of the path of Fertility.

-291381090.Text: A package of solidified phenomena.\nIts power is sealed in slices of light.

-291381091.Text: The possibility of the existence of observers.\nAs people embark on their path, those possibilities eventually collapse into a single deterministic entity.

-291381088.Text: Phantasmal equipment formed from stardust contaminated by data.\nIn the mysterious and obscure Fragmentum, relics from various worlds converge here.

-291381089.Text: A youngster who was brought to the Herta Space Station.\nChose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by Stellaron.

-291381086.Text: A girl who once slumbered in eternal ice and knows nothing about her past.\nTo find out the truth about her origins, she decided to travel with the Astral Express.\nAs of right now, she has prepared nearly 67 different versions of her life-stories for herself.

-291381087.Text: A cold and reserved young man who is reticent about his past.\nTo avoid his kin, he decided to travel with the Astral Express.

-291381084.Text: Someone who repaired the Astral Express.\nTo witness the vast starry sky, she decided to travel with the Astral Express.\nHer hobby is brewing hand-made coffee.

-291381085.Text: A senior member of the crew.\nThe passion in his heart burns for another long enjoyable adventure.\nOccasionally, he might draw the experiences of his journey in a sketchbook.

-291381082.Text: The Space Station Lead Researcher and an aristocratic lady from a renowned family.\nA researcher that's overflowing with curiosity. She has achieved unimaginable feats and gained unparalleled insights into the field of astronomy.\nShe lacks common sense in daily life, relying on Arlan where such matters are concerned.

-291381083.Text: The Space Station Lead Researcher's attendant who also handles security on the station.\nDespite talking crassly, he is still honest in nature.\nHe toils away every day to satisfy Asta's spontaneous requests.

1274702851.Text: A member of "Stellaron Hunters" who is calm, collected, and beautiful.\nUsed enchantment of words and set up {NICKNAME} to absorb the Stellaron.\nHobby is to go shopping and organize coats.

1274702850.Text: A member of the Stellaron Hunters. A gloomy man who wields an ancient sword.

1274702853.Text: The leader of the Stellaron Hunters who is referred to as "Destiny's Slave".\nPossesses the ability/curse to foresee future possibilities.

1274702852.Text: A chosen girl and heir apparent to the Union Consul.\nShe possesses pride befitting of a princess, but also has a tinge of childishness.

1274702855.Text: A resident of the Underworld and the backbone of Wildfire who goes by the alias "Babochka."\nShe has a frank personality, but there is a delicate and sensitive side to her that she hides deep inside her heart.

1274702854.Text: A captain in the Silvermane Guards and a devout follower of Plamya.\nHe is meticulous and vigilant to the core, and is always true to himself.

1274702857.Text: A Belobog mechanic who used to be a researcher for the Technology Division of the Union.\nAs Gepard Landau's elder sister, her personality is a stark contrast to her brother.\nShe loves a type of ancient music, known as "rock and roll," that was popular before the Eternal Freeze.

1274702856.Text: The Union Consul and Plamya's "Blessed."\nShe is ruthless and pragmatic above all else and is devoid of worldly desires.

1274702859.Text: A merchant who freely travels between the surface and the underground.\nHe behaves familiarly to everyone, is enthusiastically humorous, and is good at bantering.

1274702858.Text: A secretarial officer for the Silvermane Guards.\nShe has a serious personality and is revered by other members of the Silvermane Guards.

-1454180504.Text: A doctor from the Underworld, and a caregiver of the children.\nAlongside her kindness and caring, she also has a hidden dangerous side.

-1454180505.Text: Boss (self-proclaimed) of an underground adventure squad, The Moles.\nShe loves freedom, and sees life as a series of adventures.

-1454180502.Text: An intelligent combat robot from the Old World.\nDespite all else, it attempts to fulfill Clara's desires through its own methods.

-1454180503.Text: A female prospector who lives by scavenging.\nShe is introverted and shy but has a gentle, pure heart.\nShe wishes she had her own "family."

-1454180500.Text: The Aeon that presides over the path of Destruction. They were born from Adlivun as the world fell.\nThey often appear as a human male with dark skin and crimson eyes.

-1454180501.Text: Xianzhou calls them the "Arbiter of Life." They are an Aeon that presides over the path of the Hunt.\nThey wander endlessly between worlds to eradicate the sinful beings created by the Aeon of Fertility.

-1454180498.Text: An Aeon that hails from multiple harmonious celestial worlds. They preside over the path of Concord.\nThey are the amalgamation of thousands of entities that preaches the joy of human harmony and unity.

-1454180499.Text: The Aeon that presides over the path of Nihility. Their existence is a mystery.\nIX doesn't interact with the other Aeons. They believe that the ultimate fate of the multiverse is nothingness, and therefore, worthless.

-1454180496.Text: The builder of the Celestial Comet Wall, the Subspace Crystalline Barrier, and the Great Attractor Base. They are called the "Amber Lord" by their followers.\nThey preside over the path of Preservation, and are one of the oldest and most tenacious Aeons.

-1454180497.Text: The nurturer of all beings and the Aeon of paradise. Their aim is the continual proliferation of life.\nYaoshi presides over the path of Fertility and is the sworn enemy of Lan, Aeon of the Hunt.

111903437.Text: The Aeon that presides over the Trailblaze path. They departed from the isolated world of Pegana, and continued to trailblaze unknown frontiers.\nTheir destiny came to an end unexpectedly.

111903436.Text: The Aeon that presides over the path of Nous.\nThey were originally an omnipotent astral computer that ascended to become an Aeon from upgrades that they received.

111903439.Text: The Aeon of Joy. No one can predict what this Aeon might express their mirth at.\nJoy is a right of sentient beings, and Aha inspires their believers to delight in the joys of life. They take pleasure in the sharp turns of fate.

111903438.Text: The train that the Aeon of Traiblaze, Akivili once rode upon.\nIt travels on the star rail to traverse between the worlds.

111903441.Text: The clone army of the "Swarm King," Tayzzyronth.\nWith the sole purpose of "propagation" it invades various planets in the universe — similar to a locust swarm.

111903440.Text: The army that is subservient to the Aeon, Nanook. It is a gathering of the most vicious and evil creations in the Universe.\nThe army has vowed to destroy all civilization and life.

111903443.Text: The worshippers of the Aeon of Preservation, Qlipoth.\nThey followed in its footsteps to construct walls to protect their home planets.\nThey believe the actions of their Aeon foretell an upcoming calamity that will bring an end to the Galaxy.

111903442.Text: The residents of the worlds that have received Xipe's blessings.\nThey sing endlessly about their Aeon's generosity, and believe that the universe will eventually become a single harmonious entity.

111903445.Text: The people who have received the grace of the Aeon, Erudite.\nA collection of the most remarkable geniuses and smartest brains in the universe.\nThey come from different backgrounds, with some of them even working in a fruit shop to make a living.

111903444.Text: The people who explore the universe together with the Aeon of Trailblazing.\nA group of brave and curious inter-galactic adventurers.\nThe Nameless don't care about fame or profit. They continue to uphold the Trailblaze path even after Akivili's fall.

1677987378.Text: An ancient union composed of many intelligent kinds.\nThey commandeer the Xianzhou to eliminate the Abominations of Fertility.

1677987377.Text: An organization that travels between the worlds hunting for Stellarons.\nIt is unknown which Aeon bestows them with their power.

1677987380.Text: The chosen who have received the Fertility's blessings.\nThey revel in the joy brought about by their undying bodies and praise Yaoshi for their kindness and grace.

1677987379.Text: Those who firmly resist the path of Joy.\nThey advocate for abstinence and penance to dilute the temptation of joy.\nTheir powers come from blessings of the Aeon of Joy, Aha.

1677987382.Text: Fanatical worshippers of the Aeon, Aha. They seek the pinnacle of hedonism.\nThere are no limits in their pursuit of pleasure.

1677987381.Text: Collectors of precious memories from across the Universe.\nThey freely travel between worlds and try to find memories that can please their Aeon.

1677987384.Text: Wanderers who have witnessed the beauty of different worlds.\nTo revive the Aeon of Beauty, they collect their relics that were scattered across the Universe.

1677987383.Text: Ponderers who inadvertently encountered the Nihility\nThey attempt to resist the destiny of Nihility, and try to prove to the Aeon of Nihility the meaning behind the existence of all things.

1677987386.Text: The name of a world recorded in the train's astral charts. The harsh and bitter World of Frost.

1677987385.Text: The sanctuary city built by Plamya, it is humanity's last bastion against the Eternal Freeze.

-1050895977.Text: After the Eternal Freeze, this regime was formed by the survivors who had retreated to Belobog.

-1050895978.Text: The supreme leader of the Union, seen as the incarnation of Plamya.\nThe current Consul is Cocolia.

-1050895975.Text: The part of Belobog city that lies above ground, and the main area of the Union's jurisdiction.

-1050895976.Text: The part of Belobog city that lies below ground. It seals away the Underground residents who mine Geomarrow.

-1050895973.Text: Xianzhou was originally a fleet dispatched by an ancient civilization to search the galaxy for "celestial traces."

-1050895974.Text: The ubiquitous essence of existence, a cosmic structure that gives birth to many worlds.

-1050895971.Text: Mysterious higher beings with celestial bodies.\nEach of them controls a different Path and has the ability to travel freely between the stars.\nThey possess tremendous powers to erase reality and create new worlds.

-1050895972.Text: A mysterious ore produced in large quantities on Jarilo-VI.\It is said that the ore's inception brought about the Eternal Freeze that brought calamity to Jarilo-VI.

-1050895969.Text: A clandestine organization hailing from the Union's Underworld\nIt is committed to uncovering "historical truth," and fights for the rights of the Underworld's citizens.

-1050895970.Text: The official religion of the Union that consecrates Plamya as the chosen one.

515187964.Text: A festival used by the Union to commemorate Plamya's role in saving humanity from the brink of extinction.

515187963.Text: Belobog's defensive force that is led by its captains.

515187966.Text: Distorted space phenomena which appear in the vicinity of a Stellaron, continuously eating away at reality.

515187965.Text: Beings that entered the Fragmentum and became trapped after losing their way.

515187968.Text: Monsters "printed" by a Stellaron after it has collected and assimilated biological data.\n These monsters retain the original form of the creature in question, but also have mutations.

515187967.Text: Far-flung travelers in pursuit of immortality.\nThey search for the location of the Aeon, Yaoshi, in the ocean of stars.

515187970.Text: A company created to support the Aeon, Qlipoth.\nIt has since become the largest economic entity in the Galaxy.

515187969.Text: Worshippers of the Aeon, Terminus\nThey await their once-in-a-lifetime encounter.

515187972.Text: Those who believe Terminus represents the end of the universe.\nThey are dedicated to drawing prophecies from Terminus's incoherent words.

83437541.Text: Upon entering combat in a Burning Pocket Dimension, there is a <color=#FF9900FF>#1[i]%</color> chance to increase all Fire damage taken by all opponents by <color=#FF9900FF>#2[i]%</color> for <color=#FF9900FF>#3[i]</color> rounds.

83437380.Text: Opponents who enter a Black Hole Pocket Dimension will have their Movement SPD reduced by <color=#FF9900FF>#5[i]%</color>. Upon entering combat in a Black Hole Pocket Dimension, there is a <color=#FF9900FF>#1[i]%</color> base chance for all opponents to be inflicted with Immobilize status. While immobilized, the opponent's movements will be delayed by <color=#FF9900FF>#2[i]%</color> and increase DMG taken by <color=#FF9900FF>#3[i]%</color>.

【临时】穿过裂界的入口，主角、丹恒和三月七面对着一片支离破碎的空间，它仿佛用似是而非的城市拼凑起来的。

三人迅速达成了共识：当务之急是找到裂界的出口，离开这片险地，再作商议。

不幸的是，一道铁门拦住了我们的主角；幸运的是，铁门的开关就在主角手边。

那你还等什么？

1516795131.Text: 【临时】为了逃避本地势力的逮捕，我们的主角和同伴们冲进了裂界。事情怎会如此？三月七也无法解释。\n\n三人迅速达成了共识：当务之急是找到裂界的出口，离开这片险地，再作商议。

-2018649658.Text: 【临时】胶着之际，老朋友桑博忽然现身，用神秘的武器（催眠气体）将众人迷倒。\n一觉醒来，你已身在一个陌生的地方（地下）……\n这括号怎么总在剧透？

-2018649659.Text: 【临时】你和桑博进行了亲切友好的交谈，彼此交换了意见，达成了共识：在你昏迷不醒的时候，同伴丢下你出去逛街了。\n此外，负责捉拿你的少女也被桑博带到了地下，并趁其不备逃了出去。\n开始角色扮演游戏的必备流程：与同伴汇合吧！

-2018649721.Text: 【临时】地底的住民为了活下去，不得不从裂界中采掘被称为「地髓」的结晶，交给地上换取生存必需的资源。\n但长期接触地髓会使人患上严重的疾病。地底人渴求医治病痛的神药，哪怕那只是道听途说的谣言……

-2018663905.Text:
【临时】星核的线索就隐藏在共同体的过去里。
在希露瓦的帮助下，你们以紧急检修的名义进入了铁卫驻扎的裂界。

幸好你们拿到了能源核心的密钥——是时候启动那座纹丝不动的栈桥了。

-2024438783.Text: 【临时】主角在裂界里发现了一座贴有封条的宅子，从一旁的线索中你得知，这座宅子属于某个姓「歌德」的古老家族。\n……这个姓似乎在哪里听过？

-2024438784.Text: 【临时】据歌德宾馆的合法拥有者称：裂界中的神秘古宅很可能是数百年前被查封的歌德祖产。\n也许你可以帮老先生取回一些纪念品。

不过么——邪恶的声音低语道——真的要「全部」交给老爷子，加重他口袋的负担吗？
必须这样！——正义的声音回答！
不重要，只是两个声音而已，谁脑袋里没几个声音呢？你来决定就好。

-632255608.Text: In order to survive, some undergrounders are desperate enough to venture into the Fragmentum in search of anything available. Ancient machinery that they dug up has become their best helper.

-894377634.Text: A leader of a squad of the Union's Silvermane Guard Garrison.\nThe Silvermane Lieutenant will raise a giant shield during combat to absorb incoming attacks. Attacking a Silvermane Lieutenant with his shield raised will increase the damage of his thurst.

-894377635.Text: A leader of a squad of the Union's Silvermane Guard Garrison.\nThe Silvermane Lieutenant will raise a giant shield during combat to absorb incoming attacks. Attacking a Silvermane Lieutenant with his shield raised will increase the damage of his thurst.

671706307.Text: Captain of the Silvermane Guards.\nGepard will command his soldiers to focus their attacks, and greatly improve the DEF of all allies.

1403932322.Text: Captain of the Silvermane Guards.\nGepard will command his soldiers to focus their attacks, and greatly increase the DEF of all allies.

671706306.Text: Captain of the Silvermane Guards.\nGepard will command his soldiers to focus their attacks, and greatly increase the DEF of all allies.

-1317865137.Text: The Union Consul is the ruler of the eternal city Belobog.\nAs the Consul, Cocolia has inherited divine powers, giving her absolute command over the ice to freeze her opponents in battle.

1411018218.Text: This ancient relic from the Old World was an automated control unit left behind by the Geomarrow Development Group. Unlike other mindless machines that could only receive instructions, Svarog was capable of complex thinking.\nIn battle, Svarog summons robotic arms to grab and control the opponents while delivering devastating attacks.

1411018217.Text: A machine device controlled by Svarog.\nWhile active, it will greatly increase Svarog's DEF. While damaged, it will ruthlessly attack its opponents.

-155065723.Text: Candidate for the Union Consul and ruler of the Silvermane Guards.\nBronya will use diverse tactics to attack her opponents, and greatly increase the battle prowess of all allies.

-1035539112.Text: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. It looks likes a transportation vehicle whose purpose has long been forgotten.\nIn combat, Automaton War Hound can provide support and restore HP to allies.

-632254585.Text: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. It is tasked with the basic labor tasks for humans.\nIn combat, Automaton Spider is highly unstable, capable of exploding when damaged.

-632254584.Text: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. It is tasked with the basic labor tasks for humans.\nIn combat, Automaton Spider is highly unstable, capable of exploding when damaged.

1322895879.Text: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. It is tasked with the basic labor tasks for humans.\nIn combat, Automaton Spider is highly unstable, capable of exploding when damaged.

2096628770.Text: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. Its long legs are fitted with signal lights, used primarily for mining or construction operations.\nIn combat, Automaton Beetle can create forcefields to protect itself.

-894376611.Text: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. It's been reinforced with durable armor to charge forward and protect the Silvermane Guards.\nIn combat, Automaton Brown Bear will summon Automaton Spider into battle for a powerful charged attack.

-1587039234.Text: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. It's been reinforced with durable armor to charge forward and protect the Silvermane Guards.\nIn combat, Automaton Brown Bear will summon Automaton Spider into battle for a powerful charged attack.

671707330.Text: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. This rare human-like is equipped with a chainsaw on its right arm, used primarily for mining or construction operations.\nIn combat, Automaton Direwolf will use its chainsaw to deal DMG to opponents over time.

-1808034669.Text:
1、本游戏是一款3D角色扮演类回合制游戏，适用于年满12周岁及以上的用户，建议未成年人在家长监护下使用游戏产品。

2、本游戏基于架空背景展开主线、支线剧情，通过对话、交互推进剧情，游戏内还可以自由探索场景地图。游戏中有需要使用游戏角色进行的人机对战，玩法基于一定难度的思考判断，鼓励玩家随机应变、制定策略来取得对战胜利。游戏中有少量基于文字的陌生人社交系统，该社交系统遵循相关法律法规进行管理。

3、本游戏中有用户实名认证系统，认证为未成年的用户将受到以下游戏限制：
未满8周岁的用户不能充值；8周岁以上未满16周岁的未成年用户，单次充值金额不得超过50元人民币，每月充值金额累计不得超过200元人民币；16周岁以上的未成年用户，单次充值金额不得超过100元人民币，每月充值金额累计不得超过400元人民币。
游戏仅会在周五、周六、周日和法定节假日的20时至21时，向未成年人提供1小时游戏服务。

4、游戏玩法鼓励玩家积极思考，制定和应用策略来取得对战的胜利。同时，在游戏中呈现了精美细腻的画面效果，能够为玩家提供优质的视觉体验。

-1249895293.Text: A very small percentage of individuals may experience epileptic seizures when exposed to certain visual images, including certain light patterns of flashing lights in video games. Playing video games may induce an epileptic seizure in these individuals. Certain conditions may induce previously undetected epileptic symptoms even in persons who have no prior history of seizures or epilepsy. If you, or anyone in your family, have any history of prior seizures or epilepsy, consult your physician prior to playing. If you experience any of the following symptoms while playing a video game — eye soreness, altered vision, migraines, muscle twitching, convulsions, blackouts, loss of awareness or disorientation, IMMEDIATELY stop playing and consult your physician before resuming play.

906682641.Text: Long press alt to activate mouse, click to check mobile

-633632643.Text: 【临时】敌方目标上方浮现的图标代表其<color=#00ffd6>弱点</color>，使用与之对应的伤害攻击敌方目标可使其陷入<color=#00ffd6>破防状态</color>。

-633632640.Text: 【临时】使用对应敌方<color=#00ffd6>弱点</color>的伤害攻击敌人会使其陷入<color=#00ffd6>破防状态</color>，处于<color=#00ffd6>破防状态</color>的敌方目标行动延后且所受伤害增加。

906577235.Text: 【临时】点击<color=#00ffd6>普攻</color>图标或按下空格，发起攻击

-633632646.Text: <color=#00ffd6>Finisher</color> can be inserted anytime during others' turns.

906576878.Text: 【临时】点击<color=#00ffd6>终结技</color>图标或按下3，释放丹恒<color=#00ffd6>终结技</color>

906576909.Text: 【临时】点击<color=#00ffd6>终结技</color>图标或按下空格，确认释放<color=#00ffd6>终结技</color>

-633632544.Text: When <color=#00ffd6>Finisher</color> Energy is fully charged, click the button anytime to cast Finisher.

-633632577.Text: 【临时】<color=#00ffd6>秘技</color>是用于探索裂界的辅助技能。<color=#00ffd6>秘技</color>效果多样，如回复我方全体生命值、获得战斗增益等。部分<color=#00ffd6>秘技</color>也可用来攻击裂界中的敌人。

-633632578.Text: 【临时】使用对应敌方<color=#00ffd6>弱点</color>的伤害攻击敌人将触发<color=#00ffd6>弱点击破</color>。触发<color=#00ffd6>弱点击破</color>进入战斗时，弱点遭到攻击的目标立即陷入<color=#00ffd6>破防状态</color>。

-633632579.Text: 【临时】在裂界中遭到敌人攻击时，会触发<color=#00ffd6>遇袭</color>。触发<color=#00ffd6>遇袭</color>进入战斗时，我方延迟行动。

-633632775.Text: Healing Potions are under the Consumables tab in your Inventory.

-633632772.Text: Using Healing Potions will restore health to your characters.

-633632676.Text: 【临时】已激活的<color=#00ffd6>界域定锚</color>之间可以互相传送。（传送功能将与<color=#00ffd6>地图</color>功能同步开放）

-633632679.Text: 【临时】在<color=#00ffd6>界域定锚</color>处休整可回复角色生命值与秘技点数，回复效果有次数限制。该次数会随时间自动恢复。

-633632678.Text: 【临时】靠近<color=#00ffd6>界域定锚</color>可令无法战斗的角色恢复战斗能力。战斗失败或从战斗中撤退将回到距离最近的<color=#00ffd6>界域定锚</color>。

-633632709.Text: 【临时】在裂界探索的过程中有时会发现一些光点，与之交互后有机会触发<color=#00ffd6>支线任务</color>。

-633632710.Text: Details and progress on <color=#00ffd6>Missions</color> taken can be viewed in the <color=#00ffd6>Mission Tab</color>. Obtain the corresponding rewards after <color=#00ffd6>Missions</color> are completed.

-633632346.Text: Elite opponents are stronger than ordinary ones, but they mostly concentrate on guarding one area and rarely go on patrol.

-633632379.Text: 【临时】敌方目标的<color=#00ffd6>护甲</color>会降低其受到的伤害，使用对应的弱点伤害攻击敌方目标可更快削减其<color=#00ffd6>护甲</color>。

-633632376.Text: 【临时】<color=#00ffd6>护甲</color>被削减殆尽时，敌方单位将进入<color=#00ffd6>破防状态</color>。

906609709.Text: Press T to open Team tab

-633631750.Text: Teleport through activated <color=#00ffd6>Realm Anchor</color> or <color=#00ffd6>Maze Entrance.</color> The explored Fragmentum might contain hidden treasures, missions, or collectibles. Use the <color=#00ffd6>Realm Anchor</color> to re-explore the Fragmentum.

-633631749.Text: You can also click on the <color=#00ffd6>Mobile</color> tab to activate teleport function.

906616274.Text: Press C to open Character tab

906505070.Text: Press C to open Character tab

-633634854.Text: Enter deep into the Fragmentum and explore the fractured space. Defeat the powerful opponent under specific conditions.

-633634853.Text: Abyss Rules: Every floor of the abyss has its own effect, which will help the trailblazer defeat powerful opponents.

-633634887.Text: Trailblazers can complete trailblaze records, side missions, daily missions, or defeat Cocoon of Distortion and Cocoon of Deception to obtain mileage and materials.

-633634884.Text: When the trailblazer reaches a specific level, you can complete upgrade missions to increase the world level.

-633634656.Text: Enormous cocoons will grow rampantly from the Fragmentum. Consume stamina and defeat the monsters it spawns to obtain bountiful rewards.

-633634689.Text: Cocoons will grow rampantly from the Fragmentum. Consume stamina and defeat the monsters it spawns to obtain rewards.

-633634722.Text: 【临时】通过提升<color=#00ffd6>开拓进度</color>，击败敌人获得的奖励会更加丰厚，但是敌人也会变得更加强大（<color=#00ffd6>裂界碎渊</color>除外）。

-633634721.Text: 【临时】想要提升<color=#00ffd6>开拓进度</color>，需要提升开拓者的等级，并完成对应的<color=#00ffd6>开拓进度</color>突破任务。

1462074666.Text: When I first woke up after being rescued from the ice, I could see clusters of stars in front of me. I reached out for them instinctively, but it turned out they were just lights on the ceiling.

1462074669.Text: Quite a few of the crew were watching me. I was pretty embarrassed by the whole thing.

1462074663.Text: Yes. Before all this, I was stuck in a huge block of ice drifting through space. The train crew saved me.

1462074665.Text: Well, they didn't know where I came from. Everyone was looking at me. I can't really blame them for being curious...

1462074664.Text: Before all this, I was stuck in a huge block of ice drifting through space. The train crew saved me.

1462074675.Text: Himeko and Mr. Yang and... who was it again? Anyway, they figured out a way to melt the ice and saved me.

-1266808688.Text: Who knows. I don't remember anything before that.

-1266808689.Text: Do you remember what happened before you were frozen?

-1266808687.Text: Who I am, where I'm from... I've forgotten it all. Right now, I'm hanging out on this train and following it to whatever destination it decides to stop at. I'm hoping that by doing so, I can find hints about my past...

-1266808692.Text: *sigh* What am I talking about this for? Way to get everyone down, huh.

-1266808690.Text: It's fiiiine~ I was the one who brought it up.

-1266808680.Text: Cheer up, {NICKNAME}! It's not every day someone gets to ride on the Astral Express...

1462074765.Text: The train will be departing soon. All passengers, please return to your seats, it could get a bit bumpy.

1462074762.Text: Relax, Conductor. It's not the first time we've jumped, y'know~

1462074763.Text: Ms. March 7th, you're the one who falls over every time.

1462074760.Text: I'm just showcasing my fighting spirit is all.

1462074732.Text: Conductor, can I get a juice, please? Thank youuuu~

1462074567.Text: Oh, don't worry about me. I just want to try and see if I can stay upright.

1462074568.Text: Good luck, I'm rooting for you.

1462074569.Text: Thanks. I feel like I'm starting to get the hang of it.

1462074570.Text: The key is using your core, waist, and leg muscles. What's important isn't your stance, but being able to ride the inertia...

1462074572.Text: Stop stressing! I'm sturdier than I look. Besides, the ice will protect me.

1462074573.Text: You remember my ability, right? When I'm in danger, I'll subconsciously create ice to protect myself.

1462074574.Text: ...Though sometimes, I'll fall on the ice instead. It actually hurts more than falling on the ground.

1462074575.Text: Why do you make things hard for yourself?

-1266808789.Text: What do you mean? This is all part of the fun!

-1266808788.Text: You know I... I don't know who I am... Ugh...

-1266808787.Text: ...I have to keep myself occupied by finding new things to try.

-1266808786.Text: If I let myself relax too much, I start obsessing over stuff that doesn't really matter.

-1266808785.Text: Whoops, don't mind me. Find a place to sit down and buckle up.

-1266808784.Text: Whoops, don't mind me. Find a place to sit down and buckle up.

1462074537.Text: The train is about to depart.

1462074536.Text: Yes, the conductor notified me. Be careful, we'll be warp jumping soon.

1462074538.Text: Yes. I'm returning to my room. Be careful, we'll be warp jumping soon.

1462074540.Text: Faster-than-light travel using space distortion technology.

1462074543.Text: The rest of the crew are more accustomed to just calling it "jumping." They mean the same thing.

-1266808820.Text: Warp jumps do not affect the human body, but after the train exits the warped space, the train will shake violently.

-1266808821.Text: If you don't watch your step, it's easy to fall over and injure yourself.

-1266808818.Text: I'll see you after we reach our stop.

1462074633.Text: Get ready crew. The train will be starting up shortly.

1462074630.Text: How is the train's route determined?

1462074631.Text: The train's route is the one that was originally taken by Akivili the Trailblazer.

1462074636.Text: They were an Aeon for whom the very essence of trailblazing was a force to travel between planets.

1462074637.Text: This Astral Express is a relic left behind by Akivili, and it journeys along the same route that they once took.

1462074634.Text: What will the next world look like?

1462074635.Text: It's a small planet called Jarilo-VI.

1462074640.Text: This train last visited the planet thousands of years ago. The train's records show it was a lush and beautiful planet.

1462074641.Text: ...However, as you know, Nanook the Destroyer planted Sterallons throughout the galaxy. Many of the worlds have been distorted beyond recognition.

-1266808723.Text: Why are we going to all these planets?

-1266808722.Text: To trailblaze new worlds once again.

-1266808725.Text: After Akivili's passing, the old star trails were blocked off by the "Cancer of All Worlds." Many of the planets that were once trailblazed by the Aeon have wilted away because of the Stellarons.

-1266808724.Text: We need to open up the star trails that were blocked off, explore the unknown... That way, we'll allow for the train to continue on its path along the Trailblaze.

-1266808718.Text: If you can wait for a bit, the conductor will prepare the information for you.

-1266808721.Text: The conductor... recently became obsessed with a rather niche aesthetic.

-1266808720.Text: I'm not sure what kind of movie will be shown this time...

1462074600.Text: Jumps are like this: It may feel novel the first time, but you'll slowly get used to it after a few more.

1462074599.Text: Take Danheng, for example. He's used to it at this point — you won't see him around during departure. Not the most sociable kid...

1462074605.Text: Hmm, I can try to explain it in simpler terms for you... The train is motionless, but the tracks ahead are being compressed... Does that help at all?

1462074602.Text: ...How about a geometry analogy. Imagine that you are standing on a large sphere. If you want to arrive at any point on the sphere, then you have to travel along the outer surface.

1462074609.Text: When we are jumping, we take the shortest linear path between two points. For example, we get from point A to point B by traveling straight through the sphere instead of around its surface. That way, we are taking the shortest path possible.

-1266808754.Text: It's still a bit hard to understand...

-1266808755.Text: Still not clear enough? Hmm... How about this. Pretend that you're climbing a mountain. It doesn't matter if you scale one of the faces or take a cable car. You need to get to the top, right?

-1266808756.Text: Pretend that you are "jumping" now. You walk into a small room at the foot of the mountain. When you walk out of that room, you are now at the top of the mountain. The house is the hyper dimension that the train uses while jumping, and the way you traversed the mountain was the jump itself...

-1266808750.Text: I kind of see what you are getting at...

-1266808751.Text: Isn't the room the cable car?

-1266808752.Text: ...It's probably better if Danheng explains things to you.

-1266808753.Text: I'm quite used to it, too.

-1266808746.Text: ...Is that so. Did Kafka take you to different worlds too?

-1670093283.Text: ...I guess the Stellaron Hunters are a peculiar bunch as well.

-1670093284.Text: Well, you'd better find a place to sit, {NICKNAME}. The conductor will be showing us a movie.

-1670093277.Text: Be careful not to fall down.

1462074963.Text: Many millennia have passed... is this what Jarilo-VI has become?

1462074964.Text: Our records aren't all that useful anymore. It would appear this trailblazing expedition will be a difficult one.

1462074965.Text: A frozen, white planet... Can human civilization really survive in such a place?

1462074958.Text: That's something we need to ask Danheng.

1462074960.Text: He's either in the archives or in his room. Danheng, well... He's quite a maverick one. He never watches the jump with us. Maybe he doesn't even know that the train has stopped.

1462074954.Text: He volunteered to be the train's archiver. The train's sensory data and Encyclopedia Galactica are all administered by him. Danheng, well... He likes to operate alone.

1462074955.Text: Haha, that being said, he's quite dependable.

-1266808393.Text: Ah, speak of the devil! He's here.

-1266808392.Text: ...What? Is there something on my face?

-1266808391.Text: We wanted to ask you a question.

-1266808390.Text: Does civilization still exist on this planet?

-1266808397.Text: Has the civilization on this planet perished?

-1266808396.Text: Hard to say. Jarilo-VI experienced a significant change. It's rare for civilizations to persist through such a dramatic climate change... However, the universe is infinitely large, and anything is possible.

-1266808395.Text: If we want to be positive, then the inhabitants might've prepared for the disaster in advance. They could've adapted the direction of their civilization to survive climate change. Alternatively... maybe an Aeon saved them? For example... Yaoshi...

-1266808394.Text: Regarding your question, I do have a piece of good news for you.

-1266808401.Text: Despite the planet's surface being on the cold side, there is one place where the temperature is normal.

-1670092920.Text: It's around 10 degrees below zero... the kind of normal that allows humanity to cling to survival.

-1670092919.Text: That means there're still people down there!

-1670092918.Text: No. We can't say for sure. There are many other possibilities.

-1670092917.Text: But at least this shows that the planet isn't completely lifeless... That one area where the temperature is normal... there must be something special about it.

-1670092923.Text: Yes. From my perspective, I'd advise caution.

-1670092922.Text: But at least this shows that the planet isn't completely lifeless... That one area where the temperature is normal... there must be something special about it.

-1670092928.Text: When the whole planet is plunged into ultra-low temperatures, an area with somewhat normal temperatures implies unnatural interference.

-1670092927.Text: This shows that the planet isn't completely lifeless... There's definitely something special about that area.

-104008979.Text: Spatial readout anomaly! Star rail stability is down to 12%!

-104008978.Text: Schedule alteration: Seven-day stopover time delayed indefinitely!

-104008976.Text: The complex locality of this world has been... affected. The star rail is blocked off.

-104008983.Text: Let me give you an analogy: The space in front of the train is no longer an observable star rail, but a collapsing abyss...

-104008982.Text: I guess the only sensible thing would be to stop the train?

-104008980.Text: Indefinitely. Until the anomaly is removed.

-104008987.Text: If we try to force our way ahead, there could be a hefty price to pay!

-104008986.Text: Well, looks like it's this world for the time being.

-507293506.Text: Get ready, everyone. Oh, {NICKNAME}, this is a first for you, right? We should talk.

-507293505.Text: 【临时】十分舒适的沙发…坐上去就会感到昏昏欲睡。

-507293504.Text: 【临时】<color=#F2D79D>坐稳扶好，等待跃迁完成。</color>

1462074930.Text: At each stop, there's always an exciting grand adventure, pom!

1462074933.Text: Have you been on an adventure before, Pom-Pom?

1462074927.Text: Have you been to Jarilo-VI before, Pom-Pom?

1462074929.Text: Can't leave the train right now...

1462074923.Text: Can't leave the train right now...

158112784.Text: Ever since the Destroyer sowed Stellarons across the universe, many worlds have become like this.

158112785.Text: Nanook the Destroyer, Yaoshi the Fertility, Terminus the End... I've seen and learned a lot in my time, but I still struggle to understand the reasons for some of the Aeons' actions.

158112786.Text: Some of the Aeons' actions are difficult to understand.

158112753.Text: The data on Jarilo-VI... It's of no use now. We need to input new data.

158112843.Text: {NICKNAME}, do you remember what I told you about my past?

158112844.Text: You were sealed in a block of ice.

158112858.Text: You were rescued by the train's crew.

-1407971091.Text: Sorry, I'm not interested in other people's pasts.

-1407971094.Text: Even though that sounded pretty cool, that's an irritating thing to say in this kind of situation...

-1407971093.Text: As soon as I set eyes on this planet, I thought: A world covered in ice... could it have something to do with my past? The more I thought about it, the harder it was to think about anything else.

-1407971096.Text: Still, I guess it's not likely. I was trapped in Six-Phased Ice — a very rare substance. You won't find it on your average planet.

-1407971095.Text: Want to go down and take a look?

-1407971098.Text: We won't know unless we have a look ourselves.

-1407971097.Text: There's no chance we'll find any...

-1407971084.Text: ...but you're right, I shouldn't turn down a chance to find out for certain.

-1407971083.Text: Even if I don't find out anything about my past, exploring a new world is still really cool!

1320912263.Text: To be honest, I think I'd be pretty annoyed if I found out this was my home world. It looks freezing...

1320912264.Text: Alright, let's go down and have a look!

158112817.Text: Well then, {NICKNAME}, are you ready for your first trailblazing expedition since joining the crew?

158112815.Text: Oh, {NICKNAME}, you're pretty on to it.

158112813.Text: Well, there's a first time for everything.

158112826.Text: Explore, understand, establish, and connect. When we talk about the Trailblaze path of Akivili, these are the things we mean.

158112825.Text: Explore unknown planets, understand the current state of different worlds, establish relations with civilizations, and link up the star rail throughout the universe.

-1407971123.Text: The Aeon may have fallen, but we, the Nameless, can continue along the Trailblaze.

-1407971124.Text: Thanks to Akivili, we are able to explore many unique worlds and witness all kinds of magnificent scenery.

-1407971125.Text: However, for some reason, a space warp has affected the star rail ahead. If we can't reverse this anomaly, the train cannot progress any further.

-1407971126.Text: This isn't the first time Welt and I have encountered a situation like this. We discussed the issue once with Mrs. Herta, master of the space station, and came to the conclusion that the root of such anomalies were Stellarons.

-1407971127.Text: That's right, the same as the Stellaron implanted in your body. Something similar must exist on Jarilo-VI. Find it, dispel its effect on the star rail, and we can move forward again.

-1407971128.Text: You must have a lot of questions, right? Not to worry, I can answer all of them before you depart.

-1407971129.Text: Why must we continue down this path?

-1407971130.Text: Because that's the only way for us to receive the rewards of the Trailblaze path.

-1407971115.Text: Just like how humans need to breathe and eat to survive, the Astral Express needs to acquire the subtle power to warp between worlds granted to it by its path.

-1407971116.Text: Akivili has fallen, and fallen Aeons can no longer draw on the power of their path. All we can do is strictly follow that path ourselves, to allow the train to continue on to more and more places.

1320912232.Text: 【临时】殒落的星神还有力量吗？

1320912231.Text: An Aeon's power comes from the path that they control. Even though Akivili has fallen, the Trailblaze path, also known as the Trailblaze, still exists.

1320912230.Text: Of course, a fallen Aeon can no longer draw on the power of their Paths. Compared to the power of the Aeons, we, the Nameless, are insignificant. All we can do is to follow strictly the Trailblaze path to gain a feeble power for warping between worlds.

1320912229.Text: However, we are already quite lucky. After the passing of Tayzzyronth the Propagator, The Swarm has almost vanished from existence. After the passing of Idrila the Beauty, the Knights of Beauty collapsed alongside them.

1320912228.Text: But at least we're still able to stick to the Trailblaze.

1320912227.Text: Where should I look for the Stellaron?

1320912226.Text: We have a few clues, but not many. Usually, we start with anomalous traces.

1320912225.Text: Take Danheng's scanning readout for example: There's a temperature anomaly on this planet. That's where we'll start our investigation.

1320912240.Text: Also, you have a Stellaron inside yourself... At present, it's hard to know what use it may have, but it might help you to locate the source of other Stellarons.

-245171709.Text: Sorry, I'm afraid that's one thing I can't give you a definite answer on. From the available data, it would seem that Stellarons have brought about vastly different effects on different worlds...

-245171710.Text: Welt suspects that Stellarons are seeds of disaster planted by Aeons on different worlds.

-245171711.Text: But we don't know anywhere near enough about them... All we can say for sure is that their arrival causes massive changes to civilizations and ecologies. They also generate warps in space such as Fragmentums.

-245171712.Text: I think I understand enough for now.

-245171713.Text: For this expedition to Jarilo-VI, I'm planning to have Danheng and March accompany you.

-245171715.Text: Someone has to stay on the train, otherwise, Pom-Pom will get lonely.

-245171716.Text: Not to mention, Nanook the Destruction threw us a quick glance just now. If we're targeted by the Antimatter Legion, then things could go south.

-245171702.Text: Well, he's always itching for action... But I stopped him.

-1811255650.Text: He should give the youngsters a chance to explore things on their own. It's a good chance for you guys to become more familiar with each other.

-1811255652.Text: He's calm, measured, and acts as a perfect counterpart to March.

-1811255653.Text: Also, I'm hoping that you guys can bond a bit.

-1811255655.Text: She wanted to go. I could see it in her eyes.

-1811255657.Text: Not to mention, knowing her personality, she'd probably create chaos if she stayed cooped up here on the train.

-1811255642.Text: If you're ready, why not go and find March and Danheng?

-1811255643.Text: It's up to all of you to get the train moving again.

158112652.Text: I'm sure you'll be getting to know March and Danheng a lot better soon.

158112622.Text: ...On second thought, seeing as March and Danheng will be going, I think I should be cautioning this planet instead.

158112624.Text: I wanted to go, but Himeko said that I needed to give youngsters a chance to spend some time together and develop your friendship.

158112623.Text: We've also had a run in with the Stellaron Hunters, and attracted the attention of Nanook... The train really does need me and Himeko to look after it.

158112626.Text: I'll bring you back a souvenir.

158112625.Text: Haha, the thought is enough by itself.

158112628.Text: Take care of March for us.

-1407971322.Text: When it comes to causing trouble, she won't outdo me.

-1407971319.Text: Please don't say scary things like that in such a serious manner.

158112721.Text: Before you came, whenever March wanted to go somewhere, Himeko would always make me and Mr. Yang go with her.

158112722.Text: Now that you're here, it would seem that I'm not the one who's been liberated of that duty.

158112725.Text: I actually wanted to borrow some money...

158112726.Text: Hmph... You aren't good at lying.

-1407971224.Text: We'll leave once March is ready.

-1407971223.Text: Go ahead... I'll be with you shortly.

158113043.Text: Did I get dragged into a science fiction movie or something?

158113045.Text: Are you trying to catch the stars?

158113040.Text: Hee-hee, I've done stuff like that before.

-1407970894.Text: But, it wasn't stars for me though... it was lights.

158113017.Text: Everyone, please return to your seats.

158113012.Text: I won't fall over, I won't fall over, I won't fall over, I won't fall over...

1179749598.Text: Hmm? Is there anything worth checking out?

1179749961.Text: 【临时】要是找到了什么珍稀的动物物种，记得告诉我喔。

1179749963.Text: 【临时】猫，狗，雪地里的野狼和一些抗寒的鸟类…没别的了。其它动物只能去博物馆里看模型，一睹往日模样。

1179749956.Text: 【临时】听说好多年以前，贝洛伯格还有被驯化的熊，野外有冰原狼。现在已经看不到了。

1179749957.Text: 【临时】不过，我相信在雪幕之后还存活着其它物种，只是没法证实而已。

1179749959.Text: 【临时】我也想去啊…还征集过愿意陪我出城的保镖来着。可是一听说我的目标是去找动物，不是找宝藏，应征者就都走了。

1179749952.Text: 【临时】不过最近遇到一个大金主。只要满足他的要求，他就愿意资助我探险。听说行政厅的外出审核他也有门路搞定。

1179749953.Text: 【临时】我已经在筹备出城的计划啦。

-1549133395.Text: 【临时】我们车上有一个珍稀物种…

-1549133394.Text: 【临时】喂！你敢出卖帕姆试试！想挨揍吗！

-1549133392.Text: 【临时】没，没什么！是我们养的猫！

-1549133399.Text: 【临时】帕姆要是听到这句话，你就要挨揍了。

-1549133397.Text: 【临时】行呀，那我等你们的好消息。

1179749928.Text: You're here again? I told you I was busy, like very busy. The public needs to be served in so many ways...

-124212218.Text: As time goes by, the rich salmon flavor dilutes and invades the Redsunset meat slice. When the ingredients and the seasoning fuse well together, there's no point to name a dish solely based on its ingredients anymore...

-124212217.Text: What am I doing, I really have to stop thinking...

-124212223.Text: 【临时】没错，跟吃有关的问我就对了。

-124212221.Text: 【临时】没有。不是气话哈，就是没有；共同体就这么大，七百年时间，百来种食材翻来覆去地做，排列组合也做不出新菜色了。

-124212220.Text: 【临时】不过，考虑到你是外地人，可能没机会接触行政区的特色菜。试试夕红鱼吧！虽然其它区也有这道菜，但行政区有最好的食料，味道绝对让你难以忘怀！

-124212210.Text: 【临时】往少了说四千多种吧，但实际上嘛…我们共同体人编菜名是一绝：一条鱼身上可以划出70种部位，每个部位排列组合，能产生几百种菜系。

-1690296160.Text: 【临时】好像吃了道新菜式，又好像没吃；好像味道不一样，又好像一样…对此你也深有体会吧！

-1690296164.Text: 【临时】尼古莱？啊，她是个很有前途的记者。听说她现在升任文学出版部的编辑了，很可惜，她有套自己的写作方法论，我觉得她应该留在一线创作岗位上。

-1690296163.Text: 【临时】前阵子她负责的一套书被行政厅宣布禁止了，事情闹得挺大的，不知现在怎么样了。

-124212251.Text: You're back! A nice livable suburb property is on offer now. Interested in checking out?

-124212249.Text: 【临时】问吧，但我的时间很宝贵，时间就是金钱，我的朋友！

-124212255.Text: 【临时】那当然，我们很熟。很多项目都要和行政厅打交道，现任和继任的执政官都要处理好关系。

-124212252.Text: 【临时】当然了，我不能说太细，这事牵扯太大，与许多官员都有关系，你是明白人，应该明白我的意思。我只能说懂的都懂。

-124212253.Text: 【临时】那房子到底是怎么回事？

-124212242.Text: 【临时】哈，我估计你是做不成我的客户了。这是种新的商业模式，叫做预售。我先收一笔钱，然后用它去做开发，如果开发失败了，我就把钱退还，成功了则皆大欢喜。

-124212243.Text: 【临时】可靠渠道告诉我执政官即将换届，新任执政官布洛妮娅大人是个温和中立派，所以有70%的概率会支持我开发新城区，而我是唯一的地产中介……

-1690296191.Text: 【临时】所以我转嫁风险，预支利益，做个成熟的商人，同时给你提供发大财的机会。

-1690296189.Text: 【临时】严谨地说，是行政区唯一的——别的区有几个竞争对手，不过嘛，你看地盘就知道谁更厉害，他们可休想染指行政区。

-1690296190.Text: 【临时】我手头有共同体行政区七百年来的全部房产交易纪录，八大家族的族史倒背如流——信息就是财富！我靠这个争取官员的支持，民众的信任。

-1690296195.Text: 【临时】官民都爱和我打交道，每人都有需要，而我负责满足需要。

-1690296196.Text: ...Maybe I don't have any more questions.

-124212152.Text: 【临时】嗨，原谅我之前的冒昧…能请您帮我个忙吗？

-124212155.Text: 【临时】您给市政厅写信了吗？我静候您的佳音。

-124212156.Text: 【临时】因为它…真的很棒啊。我很喜欢雪国冒险奇谭，其实，部长早就预警了风险，但我还是坚持把它出版了。我觉得这么好的作品一定要被更多人读到。

-124212159.Text: 【临时】您可能无法理解：但我们近七百年都被困在贝洛伯格这座城里——我们不能踏出城外一步，因为外面寒冷，残酷，有生命危险……

-124212158.Text: 【临时】但我们是活生生的人啊！我们渴望了解未知，渴望探索未知！这本书就是这样！它是虚假的，尽是胡编乱造！但它满足了一个想象，一个困扰所有共同体人的想象……

-124212145.Text: 【临时】城外的暴雪之后到底有什么？世界上还有没有其他人类？还有没有其他文明？如果我们离开这里，会见到怎样的奇景？这就是雪国冒险奇谭的价值！

-1690296093.Text: 【临时】啊，不会的！我们的市政厅非常开明，任何人都可以给市政厅写信——写任何内容！据我所知，他们未必会看……

-1690296096.Text: 【临时】但他们绝不会因为你写了封信就找你的麻烦！

-1690296098.Text: 【临时】嗯，是啊，我那时就负责连载版面——如果稿件质量不佳，我就得自己写。我的粉丝还挺多的呢。

-1690296097.Text: 【临时】后来主编给我升了职，结果我得花更多时间审同行的稿子…我就想，反正是审稿，干嘛不审更有趣的呢？于是我申请调去出版部。

-1690296100.Text: 【临时】那里真的很有意思，会收到各种各样的稿件，其中不乏雪国冒险奇谭这样的明珠，也有很多非常好玩的作品。

-1690296099.Text: 【临时】比如说，我曾经收到一个民间科学家自己编写的科学杂志——我这辈子没笑得那么开心过！我回信建议他投稿水晶日报的笑话专栏，结果他到出版社痛骂我一顿。

-1287011569.Text: 【临时】雪国冒险奇谭解禁了吗？

-1287011568.Text: 【临时】还没有，嗯，我想市政厅应该很忙，他们有很多事情要处理…不过我相信结果会好的，我已经发动了很多人写信表达对这套书的喜爱……

-1287011570.Text: 【临时】噢，那只是个小技巧。举个例子，如果我要写今天吃什么，就会这样开头：夜幕低垂，晚风轻拂，尼古莱•H•特吕弗走在夜路上……

-1287011573.Text: 【临时】…她心想：我还没吃东西呢！可是，她又不那么饿，所以……

-1287011572.Text: 【临时】…于是她停下脚步，此刻，月光……

-1287011559.Text: 【临时】…她想到今夜的晚餐，不由得——

1441871788.Text: 【临时】听君一席话，如听一席话。

-124212185.Text: 【临时】怀才不遇是多么痛苦啊……

-124212187.Text: 【临时】我是研究科学的，不是搞智力问答的……说吧，你有什么问题？我尽量用你能理解的方式解答。

-124212189.Text: 【临时】啊，大宇宙……我毕生的研究，我伟大的创造！这个理论起源于前年，那时我正在吃饭，一道电光突然窜进我的脑海！我当时就知道，这是当代最重要的发现！

-124212190.Text: 【临时】一旦我有钱把时间隧道造出来，我将震惊世界！

-124212191.Text: 【临时】这也不是毕生的研究啊。

-124212176.Text: 【临时】不要抠字眼，我的人生还没结束呢，我打算把未来的人生都献给大宇宙时间隧道，不行吗？

-124212177.Text: 【临时】你有什么办法证明它呢。

-1690296125.Text: 【临时】「证明」？这个词有点意思……有时间我去研究一下，应该不会花太多时间。

-1690296127.Text: 【临时】书里，书中自有黄金屋；还有生活里，生活是科学家最好的导师。

-1690296128.Text: 【临时】你没有经过系统的学习吗？

-1690296129.Text: 【临时】唉，你们啊，一看就不懂当今的科学界……大家都忙着争权夺势，拿腔作调，从那群人能学到什么呢？

-1690296131.Text: 【临时】那当然！谁有资格教导我呢？如果一个人能做我的导师，那大宇宙时间隧道就应该是他想出来的，不是我啦！

-1690296132.Text: ...Maybe I don't have any more questions.

-1690296118.Text: 【临时】对啊，你感兴趣吗？我可以给你30%——呃不，3%的分成！纯利！

-1287011599.Text: 【临时】那你问我这个干嘛？拿我开心？

-1287011601.Text: 【临时】你当科学研究是啥？菜场买菜？

-1287011602.Text: 【临时】你要能给我找到投资人，我可以给你好处费！

-1287011604.Text: 【临时】金主还没有找到吗？肯定有很多人抢着要投资我，你再找找。

-124212350.Text: 【临时】凝视着垃圾桶，我的心灵就很平静，仿佛回到了家乡……那故乡的风，啊，那故乡的味儿……

-124212347.Text: 【临时】你怎么看《雪国冒险奇谭》？

-124212346.Text: 【临时】天才的杰作——也许文笔不是顶尖的，但故事中满溢的狂想令人惊叹。我们贝洛伯格人被困在雪里七百年，想象力都枯竭了，这部作品点燃了人们对雪外的渴望。

-124212345.Text: 【临时】大概就是因为这个，市政厅才要禁止这部书吧……据说《雪国冒险奇谭》发表后，擅自走进雪中的失踪人口翻了数倍。

-124212342.Text: 【临时】再想想要是被编辑拉进黑名单，新的文学之路怎么走。

-1690296292.Text: ...Maybe I don't have any more questions.

-124212383.Text: 【临时】唉，阿尔乔姆，你好温柔……啊！您好，客人！

-124212381.Text: 【临时】没问题！您看中了哪一盆？

-124212377.Text: 【临时】一种非常娇贵的花朵，每年只开一次，一次一月——不骗您，就算为了那一个月的艳丽，也值得它的价钱！

-1690296324.Text: 【临时】他是世界上最美好的男子……唉，抱歉，我只能说这么多。

-1690296322.Text: 【临时】咦——原来您也是，同好吗！太好了，铁卫不许我们读《雪国》，我都找不到人一起讨论呢。我好开心！

-1690296319.Text: 【临时】不，等一下，我要先问一个非常直白的问题：你对这部书怎么看！

-1690296317.Text: 【临时】对吧对吧！有谁会不喜欢阿尔乔姆呢？——嘻嘻，我就默认你是喜欢阿尔乔姆啦～唉，要是他活在另一本书里就好了……

-1690296315.Text: 【临时】嘿，当然啦。我也讨厌死这本书了，可是阿尔乔姆——唉，阿尔乔姆是那么优秀，要是他活在另一本书里就好了……

-1690296316.Text: 【临时】他是我看过的书里最温柔的人啦。他有恰到好处的幽默感，既温柔体贴又内敛克制……要是他在我身边，跟我呼吸同一片空气，我立刻失语失智失去世俗的欲望！

-1287011796.Text: 【临时】冒险时他勇往直前，感情上又如少年般青涩……哭，他怎么这么完美啊。如果能和阿尔乔姆一起冒险，就算被追捕也值得……

-1287011797.Text: 【临时】所以我好恨作者，我好讨厌这本书！阿尔乔姆他那么好，那么优秀，却永远不可能有续作了，永远不可能再看见他冒险的样子了！

-1287011794.Text: 【临时】他和安娜就应该在一起啊！他们多么般配啊你说是不是！为什么那么生硬地分开啊？作者是不是有病！？

-1287011795.Text: 【临时】哎，对不起噢。我好难见到一个同好，太激动了……

-1287011793.Text: 【临时】呜，谢谢你。书不让卖，出版社又弃坑了，这些话憋在我心里好久了，都找不人可以说……

-1287011789.Text: 【临时】哎～好可惜！快去看快去看，一定要看！哎，好想把书借给你，但是不行，我只有这一套……

1441871559.Text: 【临时】抱歉，还是回到工作上吧！

-124212284.Text: 【临时】声音也是演技的一部分，我不想被别人代替……

-124212287.Text: 【临时】十全十美的演员也许不存在，但这不是放弃锻炼唱功的理由。

1462041994.Text: Hey, feels like it got a bit warmer!

1462041997.Text: ...That's because you're in Belobog, humanity's last stronghold against the Eternal Freeze.

1462041990.Text: 【临时】据说在「负罪年代」，像这样的城市还有许多。彼时的大地充斥罪恶，到处是燃烧的熔火和沸腾的乌烟。

1462041993.Text: Those carbonic, sulfurous fumes awakened the devils slumbering beneath the surface. They summoned the Eternal Freeze — a front of piercing cold that destroyed all in its wake. Sweeping winds and blizzards sealed the world in ice... only Belobog survived.

1462041992.Text: Because of Plamya's divine providence, this city remains impervious to the unrelenting cold and remains forever warm.

1462042002.Text: 【临时】那不是他之前的语调，他应该是在引用某段典籍。

-1266841360.Text: 【临时】噢，那他干嘛要跟我们说这些啊？

1462041963.Text: The chaos has subsided. The Silvermane Guards are now patrolling the city, ensuring its safety during the Solwarm Festival.

1462041960.Text: The suspect's origin is currently being traced. There's nothing in the data to suggest any recent abnormalities in the movement of the cable cars.

1462041958.Text: I do not believe this event was premeditated, Captain. There is only one suspect, who committed no violent acts. It's possible that he's a Lost One from "the place" who accidentally wandered into the district.

1462041959.Text: You're implying that in addition to the cable cars, there are other paths that link the Union to the underground.

1462041972.Text: Many researchers have proposed this hypothesis, Captain. We know quite little about "that place."

1462041973.Text: ...I'll include your opinion in the report.

-1266841391.Text: These people claim to have come from afar, from outside the city.

-1266841390.Text: ...Outside of Belobog? Beyond the snow plains?

-1266841393.Text: ...Are there even habitable places out there?

-1266841392.Text: That same question... How many times is that now?

-1266841394.Text: What exactly did the people on this world experience...

-1266841397.Text: Must have been some terrible disaster.

-1266841383.Text: Is it true, Captain? Outside the city...

-1266841382.Text: We don't have the authority to come to that conclusion. I'll submit my report to the Consul.

-1670125918.Text: Before we receive further instruction, these people are our guests. Nevertheless, keep an eye on them. Don't let them out of your sight.

-1670125920.Text: ...You must be tired from your journey.

1462042058.Text: Three strangers have arrived in Belobog. One of them is carrying a Seed of Destruction... it will bring about our end.

1462042056.Text: Keep careful watch over the walls, for devils shall fall upon us like a blizzard, and disaster shall chill humanity to the core. The seed has already been planted. One day, ruin shall revisit these lands.

1462042054.Text: Bring them to me, Bronya. Do this for me. I must pass judgment on them, and purify them myself.

1462042068.Text: You may call me Mother, whilst others aren't present.

1462041767.Text: Hey, Pela. Are you still busy?

1462041768.Text: I'm on duty, Serval. An assignment, from that dear brother of yours.

1462041769.Text: And what about him? Why did he leave everything to this lovely little lady and sneak off on his own?

1462041771.Text: He does that every time, doesn't he.

1462041773.Text: And who are these people? I've never seen them before.
