-1248536400.Text: <color=#F2D79D>There might even be clues about "Stellaron" here.</color>

1124116588.Text: Mr. Oleg told me you've been searching this whole time for "Stellaron?"

1124116587.Text: I truly hope that I can find the clues you want. It wouldn't be right if "Wildfire" thanked you for your help with only a few words of gratitude.

1124116590.Text: Now, please excuse me. I must organize people to research this big fellow. You guys will be the first to know if we find anything.

1124116589.Text: Sampo, take them somewhere to rest.

1124116591.Text: Is there something else, Bronya? Or should I say... the Union's next line Consul?

1124116593.Text: 【临时】当然，地上和地下，并非铁板一块，彼此不通音信。桑博知道的，我就会知道。

1124116596.Text: Even so... you're not gonna do anything?

1124116595.Text: What would you have "Wildfire" do? Arrest you? Interrogate you? Send a ransom note to the Consul?

-441967353.Text: You haven't done anything out of line. Rather, you and the outsiders have helped the undergrounders a lot.

-441967354.Text: So, you'll leave me to return to the surface like nothing happened?

-441967351.Text: Aren't you afraid of losing everything you've worked so hard if I return to the surface? Aren't you afraid that the Silvermane Guards will attack the Underground and destroy "Wildfire?"

-441967352.Text: Is this... some type of threat? Or are you offering to stay here as a hostage in the Underground?

-441967350.Text: I'd be lying if I said the thought never crossed my mind. But, based on what you know about the Consul, would she give in to our terms because her successor is being held hostage in the Underground?

-441967347.Text: I can feel your integrity, Bronya. I bet you can see the world for what it is and make the right judgment.

-441967348.Text: You'd trust your enemies based on feelings...? Or are you up to something?

-441967345.Text: You know? That's the true barrier between the Overworld and the Underworld - that sense of fear and suspicion.

-2008051294.Text: There must be information from the past hidden away in this building. I want to see it for myself.

-2008051295.Text: ... Of course. If you want, you can stay and see what we find.

-845251848.Text: Hey, what are you doing? Let us in, you hear?

-845251847.Text: This area is now under the control of the Silvermane Guards. No one is allowed in or out.

-845251846.Text: Silvermane Guards? Is there something wrong with this person?

-845251845.Text: Halt! Who are you and why are you here?

-845251843.Text: Nice outfit. Where'd you find it?

-845251842.Text: I didn't give you permission to ask questions.

-845251841.Text: 【临时】这地底迟早都要被共同体接管，我就是代表银鬃铁卫前来侦查的。

-845251840.Text: Svarog has been driven away, and his base will eventually become ours.

1883631506.Text: You're in the Underground, but you think you're part of the Silvermane Guards...

1883631507.Text: I'm scared Seele will suddenly jump out of nowhere and give you a good beating.

1883631508.Text: Hmph, how can a pawn of "Wildfire" stand up to the might of the Silvermane Guards?

1883631509.Text: Ah, I know! You must be one of those "above grounder in spirit," yeah?

1883631511.Text: You don't know? Danheng and I have met plenty of people like you.

1883631512.Text: 【临时】那类人啊，只是了解到了一点事件的皮毛，就开始羡慕别人的生活……

1883631513.Text: 【临时】然后就变成了「精神外国人」甚至「精神外星人」——很奇怪吧？

1883631514.Text: And just what are you two whispering about so earnestly, hmm?

1883631515.Text: The Silvermane Guards aren't all that.

317547565.Text: Sorry to disturb you. We're leaving.

317547566.Text: 【临时】一派胡言，你没看到我这身装备吗？

317547567.Text: When I put it on, I can feel my blood heating up... And the power inside me surging...

317547568.Text: You made that armor yourself, yeah?

317547569.Text: I don't think it'll have that type of effect.

317547570.Text: Pfft, you say that like you've seen the real Silvermane Guards.

317547571.Text: Not only that, but we drove quite a few of them away.

317547573.Text: I've met Plamya in person before. See? Anyone can brag.

317547574.Text: 【临时】我还有公务要执行，不跟你们啰嗦了，走开走开！

-1248536376.Text: 【临时】真是个古怪又暴躁的家伙……

-1248536375.Text: But we really did see the Silvermane Guards. I'm not gonna let this go!

-1248536374.Text: 【临时】在这下城区，应该只有一个人目击过我们跟铁卫交手。

-1248536371.Text: As I thought, Danheng doesn't feel too good about it either!

-1248536369.Text: Ah, you guys are here. Are you ready? Natasha told me to show you guys the way.

-1248536368.Text: 【临时】你们就尽管放心吧。我进出裂隙可比回自己家的次数还频繁，知道哪儿会有魔物，哪儿安全。绝对不会出差错。

-1248536367.Text: We met an "above grounder in spirit"...

1124116620.Text: 【临时】哦，我知道了，你说的是谭雅吧？那位大姐每天都在琢磨该怎么混进蓝甲人内部，地底的大家都习惯了。

1124116621.Text: She didn't believe us when we said we've dealt with the Silvermane Guards before.

1124116622.Text: That attitude of hers is a real turn-off. Sampo, you have to testify for us!

1124116623.Text: 【临时】喂喂，你们为啥那么在乎她的意见？除了说话冲了点儿，她也没碍着你们什么事吧。

1124116625.Text: She's dressed as a soldier from the Silvermane Guards.

1124116626.Text: 【临时】啧啧啧，那可不妙啊…在家里自我催眠是一回事，跑到那个淘金者聚居的地方招摇，搞不好真的会出问题。

1124116627.Text: Hehe, I thought of a plan just now... Two birds one stone!

1124116628.Text: It's here! Sampo's unique ultimate, "Bad Intentions!"

-441967322.Text: 【临时】三月老妹，别随便起奇怪的名字啊！

-441967321.Text: Please go back to Tanya and make sure she doesn't do anything stupid.

-441967320.Text: You haven't told us your plan yet.

-441967319.Text: 【临时】剧透可就没意思了…麻烦你们在那个基地里稍等一会儿了，嘿嘿。

-441967318.Text: That Sampo, what's he up to now?

-441967317.Text: I don't know, but let's go back to the "above grounder in spirit."

-441967316.Text: Hopefully, she hasn't been attacked by the prospectors.

-441967315.Text: I've heard of you before. Aren't you the small town girl who worships the Bluecoats? You think we'll be afraid of you because you put on a costume?

-441967314.Text: W-What are you saying? I'm really part of the Silvermane Guards. Don't come any closer...

-441967313.Text: You're scared? How could someone from the Bluecoats be scared of someone like us?

-2008051262.Text: 【临时】可、可恶，又是那帮外来者，你们就这么爱多管闲事吗？

-2008051261.Text: Hmph, unlucky. Let's get out of here.

-2008051260.Text: I was in serious danger just now. Th-Thank you.

-2008051259.Text: 【临时】欸？你还是能好好说话的嘛。

-2008051258.Text: 【临时】但是，我还是坚持之前的观点。这座基地，还有里面藏着的秘密，都是属于共同体的合法财产，银鬃铁卫总有一天会来接管它们的。

-2008051256.Text: *coughing* I'm Sampi from the scouting party of the Silvermane Guards. I'm here to investigate the database situation.

-2008051255.Text: Everyone, clear the way. The Union army is taking over here.

-2008051254.Text: Danheng, that guy... is Sampo, right?

720832093.Text: Ooh! So, he wants us to cooperate with his performance, yeah?

720832094.Text: Do you see now? What did I say?

720832095.Text: Mr. Silvermane Guard, I am your loyal supporter. I've been securing this passageway for you.

720832096.Text: Hmm? And who are you? Step aside! I have work to do.

720832099.Text: *cough*! What did you say? So you wanna do it the hard way!

720832100.Text: Hey! Stay out of this! If you make Mr. Silvermane Guard angry, it'll be disastrous for all of us.

720832101.Text: Hmph, so what if he's from the Silvermane Guard? We've defeated them before!

-489021489.Text: W-What did you say?! You dare insult me?

-489021488.Text: 【临时】我看你们是都活腻了吧！

-489021486.Text: Um... Go easy on me, yeah?

-489021484.Text: Hey, o-ow! I thought we agreed to go easy on me!

-489021483.Text: That WAS going easy on you!

-489021482.Text: D-Damn, where did you guys come from... Even I couldn't...

-489021481.Text: 【临时】银鬃铁卫的实力也不过如此。

-489021480.Text: C-Could you guys be the "outsiders" who even defeated the Captain?

-2055105430.Text: Are there people who still haven't heard of the great "outsiders?"

-2055105429.Text: 【临时】难、难道说，把杰帕德长官打得落花流水的家伙就是你们？

-2055105428.Text: 【临时】欸？还有这回事吗…咳，对，没错，就是我们干的！

-2055105427.Text: Damn... A small fry like me isn't worthy of being your opponents! Spare me!

-2055105425.Text: How could we let you go so easily...

-2055105424.Text: Hey, hey, don't go overboard with this...

-2055105423.Text: Okay, you may leave! Don't let us see you ever again.

-2055105421.Text: Hmph, well? We didn't lie to you. The real Silvermane Guards aren't all that.

-845251815.Text: In the books I read, the Silvermane Guards were powerful warriors, but also graceful gentlemen.

-845251816.Text: 【临时】但是刚才的那个铁卫…说话又粗鄙，战斗起来又尽是些阴险的招数……

-845251817.Text: 【临时】难道我真的被书本上的内容骗了吗？

-845251810.Text: Seeing is believing. Trust in your own judgment.

-845251811.Text: There are only a few who would match that description.

-845251812.Text: Maybe only Gepard would fit that description?

-845251813.Text: I thought it was only a matter of time before the Silvermane Guards take over the Underground.

-845251806.Text: If I presented myself as their loyal supporter, they might recognize me and allow me to live on the surface.

1883631541.Text: I've been doing these stupid things for so long, making a mockery of myself...

1883631540.Text: Sorry, I'd like to be alone for a while.

1883631538.Text: Only temporarily. It's better for her to give up on unrealistic dreams.

1883631545.Text: Speaking of which, Sampo really did come up with a good idea this time. Shall we go check on him?

1883631543.Text: Aren't you the heroes who defeated the pitiful Sampi?

1883631549.Text: We shouldn't have gone easy on you.

1883631548.Text: Hey, hey, don't make it too personal.

317547599.Text: That was amazing, Sampo. No wonder you kept it from us. If you had told us in advance, we couldn't have controlled our laughter.

317547598.Text: Thank you, thank you. These small performances are also a hobby of mine.

317547597.Text: But, Tanya looked a bit depressed... Will she be okay?

317547604.Text: It's better for her to come back to reality, right?

317547603.Text: 【临时】说白了，她也跟大多数人一样，梦想能过上好日子嘛~只是表现的方式有点匪夷所思。

317547602.Text: I didn't expect Sampo to be so worldly...

317547601.Text: No, no, it's just some "market research" I've done on my clients' psychology.

-845251785.Text: 【临时】史瓦罗先生，不要勉强自己！

-845251779.Text: 【临时】是克拉拉和史瓦罗！她们好像有麻烦了。

1883631572.Text: 【临时】克拉拉，我们是来跟你道歉的。之前发生的事完全在我们的意料之外，对不起！

1883631573.Text: 【临时】用不着和克拉拉道歉…我知道大家都没有恶意。

1883631570.Text: 【临时】克拉拉也应该预见到这种情况…或者，至少该先和史瓦罗先生打声招呼……

1883631576.Text: 【临时】史瓦罗先生身上有几个关键模块出了故障，所以现在还没法自如地行动。

1883631577.Text: 【临时】不过，克拉拉一定会把他修好的……

1883631575.Text: 【临时】不用麻烦大家，这样就可以了。

1883631580.Text: 【临时】我还存了很多零件部件，足够修好史瓦罗先生了。

317547631.Text: 【临时】史瓦罗先生说过…从诞生时起，他的工作就一直是维护古代机械和资料库。

317547632.Text: 【临时】现在，资料库已经不需要他来保护了。史瓦罗先生终于能平静下来了。

317547630.Text: 【临时】娜塔莎姐姐很善良，也很温柔…她肯定能理解克拉拉的，对吧？

317547635.Text: 【临时】等我修好了史瓦罗先生，就回去找她。

317547633.Text: 【临时】别着急哦，史瓦罗先生。克拉拉现在很安全。

317547634.Text: 【临时】是这些哥哥姐姐救了我们。他们，还有地底的各位，都是克拉拉的家人。

317547640.Text: 【临时】史瓦罗先生，以后也请帮克拉拉一起守护大家，好吗？

-1248536310.Text: 【临时】指令…已经接受。保护…家人……

-1248536312.Text: 【临时】真是一段神奇的友谊啊。

-1248536311.Text: 【临时】哥哥姐姐们…要回地面上去了吗？

-1248536306.Text: 【临时】希望你们一路顺利…以后也要来找克拉拉玩呀。

-845251484.Text: 【临时】巴列维那家伙居然关门大吉了，倒霉催的，本来还想让他帮忙鉴定我的新藏品……

-845251485.Text: 【临时】这破地方连个靠谱的鉴定师都没有，真是没救了。

-845251488.Text: 【临时】你们这身行头倒是相当…另类，莫非你们是新来的鉴定师？

-845251487.Text: 【临时】这破地方，对我的藏品感兴趣的人很少…难道你们是新来的鉴定师？

-845251493.Text: 【临时】等等，你们莫非是从上层区来的？

1883631870.Text: 【临时】上面的风景怎么样？空气是不是特别清新？你们看见巡逻的银鬃铁卫了吗？是不是特别威风？

1883631867.Text: 【临时】我做梦都想上去看一眼！听说上层区也有个「歌德旅馆」，绝对比歌蒂运营的那座小破屋强多了。

1883631866.Text: 【临时】上层区的居民，听说他们都穿着华贵的衣服，享受上流的生活…哪像这群酸臭的矿民，没有半点品味或是审美……

1883631869.Text: 【临时】你们一定得给我讲讲上层区的事。哦，要是你们身上有想脱手的纪念品，我也愿意高价回收！

1883631862.Text: 【临时】我说，从刚才开始，你的态度就非常敷衍…是我冒犯到你了吗？

317547930.Text: 【临时】我知道了…你也不相信，是吧？你也觉得我是跟他们一样的土包子，对吧？

317547929.Text: 【临时】你会后悔这么想的，我发誓…迟早有一天，嘲笑我的人都会后悔的。

317547932.Text: 【临时】普拉米亚…我究竟犯了什么罪？你为什么要惩罚我，让我在这地底受苦……

317547931.Text: 【临时】怎么还没走？我没什么想跟你说的。

317547926.Text: 【临时】我已经习惯那种眼光了，多你一个不多，少你一个不少。

317547928.Text: 【临时】之前在史瓦罗的基地里，多亏了你们帮我解围，现在想想还有点后怕。

317547927.Text: 【临时】我现在想通了，地上的世界可能也没有那么美好。很多画面都是我一厢情愿的幻想。

317547921.Text: 【临时】只论生存环境，共同体确实更好。

-1248536011.Text: 【临时】其实那些道理我都明白。要是共同体真的那么美好，银鬃铁卫都那么公正无私，为什么我们还要在这下面受苦？

-1248536012.Text: 【临时】我只是需要一个盼头，因为地底的日常实在是太乏味了。

-1248536009.Text: 【临时】所以我才有了那些不切实际的幻象，把共同体脑补成了完美无缺的样子……

-1248536010.Text: 【临时】唉，人总要被拉回到现实中来。总之，谢谢你们。

-1248536015.Text: 【临时】你一定有机会亲眼上去看看。

-1248536013.Text: 【临时】那我就静静期待着那一天到来。放心吧，这次我不会抱着不切实际的幻想了。

-1248536014.Text: 【临时】要珍惜周围的人和事物。

-1248536019.Text: 【临时】我以前办的那些事，还有说的那些话，肯定都让周围的人很反感吧？

-1248536020.Text: 【临时】要重新跟周围的人建立起关系，恐怕需要花点时间……

1124116984.Text: 【临时】谢谢你，外来者。多少个税时过去了，我第一次感觉这么清醒。

1124116983.Text: 【临时】我该去整理下那堆没用的藏品了…外来者，普拉米亚照亮你的道路。

-845251452.Text: 【临时】因我的愿望，世界化作颓芜。

-845251451.Text: 【临时】我建起城墙，开启漫长而徒劳的守护。

-845251456.Text: 【临时】为了文明的存续，我做出了残酷的抉择。

-845251454.Text: 【临时】…却无从觉察我留在身后的罪恶。

1548898088.Text: Whew, finally in the books, huh?

1548898085.Text: But I can't shake this feeling of regret...

1548898083.Text: No way! I want to go back to the express! Back to the express!

1548898084.Text: My regret is about what happened with Clara and Svarog.

1548898081.Text: You mean what happened to Clara and Svarog?

1548898095.Text: Clara had good intentions, so she promised to help us.

1548898096.Text: But her "family" got hurt in the process...

-17185853.Text: There's no need to feel bad. We were out of good intentions too.

-17185856.Text: That's true, but I still feel like we should apologize to her...

-17185858.Text: Before we leave, let's apologize to Clara.

-17185860.Text: But where would Svarog take her?

-17185859.Text: Ah! Do you remember Clara mentioning the first time she met Svarog was in the "Fragmentum?"

-17185846.Text: Could that be where they're headed

1548897989.Text: Hopefully, we'll find some clues about "Stellaron" at Svarog's base. That way, it'll allow us to contact the express to expand our search efforts.

1548897992.Text: What if we can't find anything?

1548897991.Text: Then we'll follow Bronya back to the surface and talk to the Consul who's after us.

1548897986.Text: Compared to that, it sounds pretty good staying in the Underground.

1548897985.Text: Just thinking about it makes me feel excited...

1548897987.Text: Danheng: I've grown tired of the heavy atmosphere here.

1548897998.Text: It's a dying world, like a candle almost extinguished. It is torture for all the people who live in this world.

1548897997.Text: I hope to see it revived next time we come back.

-17185951.Text: I wonder what it will look like the next time we come back.

-17185952.Text: ... There are many worlds like this in the universe. Your journey is just beginning.

-17185949.Text: When you've explored more worlds, this place will become a distant memory.

-17185950.Text: But if you still remember this place, feel free to come back.

-17185955.Text: I hope we'll find some clues about "Stellaron" at Svarog's base...

1548898022.Text: Heh... finally... a good night's sleep.

1548898023.Text: We were at it for quite a few days.

1548898024.Text: Yea, we really haven't rested in a while.

1548898017.Text: The concept of time differs from world to world. A few days here might mean a few decades on the express.

1548897922.Text: Whew... I slept for really long. Too bad there's no sunlight in the Underground.

1548897921.Text: Did you rest well? How are you feeling?

1548897928.Text: 【临时】精力充沛，又能大干一场了。

1548897926.Text: I feel the same way. I feel like I can finish three missions in one day!

1548897925.Text: March, the things we say without really meaning it often comes true.

1548897932.Text: Huh? Oh please no! Not another three missions!

1548897931.Text: 【临时】做了个噩梦，感觉糟透了。

-17186017.Text: Nightmare? You mean the one from before...

-17186020.Text: 【临时】对，梦见虎克把星核挖出来了。

-17186013.Text: Making jokes like that, you must be recovering well.

-17186015.Text: Yea, maybe I'll get some more——

-17186016.Text: That won't do, we must leave quickly.

-17186009.Text: It's just for a little bit!

-17186010.Text: Though we helped out the undergrounders quite a bit, we've made no progress with our mission from the Express. This is giving me a headache.

386098509.Text: 【临时】我们正在一步步靠近目标。

386098508.Text: Compared to being chased around above ground all the time, at least our efforts got us an ally in the Underground.

386098507.Text: The seeds we plant will definitely grow into fruition in the future. March, be more optimistic.

386098514.Text: Ohhh if only it didn't take so long! I wish the "fruition" would come sooner...

1548897956.Text: Hey, have my greatest customers rested well?

1548897953.Text: Oleg heard of your results and is dying to come and thank you.

1548897954.Text: It's shocking that you guys actually defeated Svarog.

1548897957.Text: For safety purposes, this had to keep from you. I'm really sorry.

1548897958.Text: However, after having cooperated for so long, we now fully trust and understand your good intentions. It's time to be honest with you.

1548897963.Text: How is the research going with the stuff that Svarog left behind?

1548897964.Text: The equipment in Svarog's base is not something that can be easily figured out.

-17185986.Text: They are after all relics of the ancient Geomarrow Development Group. No one in the Underworld remembers how to operate these complicated machines anymore.

-17185985.Text: I've gathered a few cooperating Senior Prospectors to try and extract ancient documents from it.

-17185988.Text: Some of the information has been damaged and is not accessible anymore, and others are written in languages we don't understand.

-17185982.Text: With limited research time, all we can find are old mining records, history logs, and a sketch of the fissure that the Geomarrow Development Group made.

-17185984.Text: But I haven't finished. There's something that may interest you.

-17185983.Text: I mentioned the Geomarrow Development Group, right? It was founded earlier than the Union. Back then, the world wasn't entombed in the Eternal Freeze just yet.

-17185978.Text: The reason why people discovered the opportunities brought upon by the Geomarrow is due to a meteor falling out of the sky, landing where Belobog is today.

386098542.Text: People developed the strange crystalline ores into energy that they so badly needed.

386098539.Text: You're familiar with the events that follow: The Eternal Freeze entombed the world, and the arrival of the Eternal Winter. That was the era of the Saint Plamya, where she built Belobog as a sanctuary for the survivors.

386098545.Text: The meteor was the reason for...

386098546.Text: That "meteor" was the reason for the appearance of the "Geomarrow," which was then followed closely by the "Eternal Freeze." The three events took place almost one after another, right?

386098544.Text: But even a saint can't muster miracles at will. Plamya needed energy, so she gathered the brave and headed below ground to harvest the Geomarrow. That is how the Underworld came to be.

386098549.Text: The documents also mentioned that she left behind a miracle named the "Solar Furnace Core."

-1179985399.Text: According to the description, it was used to maintain the supply of energy to the Union and its climate stabilization equipment.

-1179985402.Text: All the harvested and turned in Geomarrow ores are refined, then used to fuel the "Solar Furnace Core."

-1179985401.Text: That is the blessing that Gepard talked about, the blessing that protected the city from being overwhelmed by the Eternal Freeze, as well as the reason why the city can remain at such a warm temperature...

-1179985396.Text: If the "Geomarrow" really is connected to the "Stellaron," then the "Solar Furnace Core," where all the Geomarrow is processed, will most likely be an important lead.

-1179985395.Text: Looks like we're heading back to the surface to continue our dance with the Silvermane Guards again...

-1179985398.Text: I promised to repay the favor. If you wish to leave, Sampo will be your guide through the complicated paths beyond the fissure leading to the Overworld.

-1179985397.Text: The "Wildfire" will also provide you with temporary shelter.

-1179985391.Text: Natasha, what do you want this time?

-420470513.Text: To be honest, I see a way for both of us to benefit from this.

-420470512.Text: If we can control the "Solar Furnace Core," then "Wildfire" will take hold of the critical energy supply of the Overworld. With this as leverage, the Consul will fear us.

-420470515.Text: If our goals are aligned, why not work together?

-420470514.Text: However, this will also mean that you would be making an enemy of the Consul of the Union. But then again, you guys entered the fissure to run away from the Silvermane Guards in the first place, right?

-420470509.Text: We definitely should investigate the "Solar Furnace Core."

-420470508.Text: Feels like this will bring even more trouble...

-420470511.Text: With the help of "Wildfire," the investigations will definitely be much easier.

-420470510.Text: However, we should consult Himeko and Mr. Yang regarding whether we should cooperate with them or not.

-420470505.Text: If we accidentally get involved with the war between the Overworld and the Underworld, things will easily get out of hand.

-420470504.Text: I understand your concerns, you are only guests from afar after all. You owe us nothing.

-1986554454.Text: Wildfire will soon head for the Overworld. It's not too late to reconsider if you still wish to work with us when the time comes.

-1986554453.Text: Sampo, can you please help send our guests above ground after they're ready. Make sure they get there safely.

-1986554455.Text: We can leave at any time. Make sure you've gathered everything and said your goodbyes. Let me know when you're ready.

-1986554450.Text: Well then, this is where we part ways, {NICKNAME}. I hope we cross paths again someday.

1548897857.Text: Wait, wait, wait... Have we forgotten someone?

1548897860.Text: Where's Bronya? Is she not coming back with us?

1548897859.Text: {NICKNAME}, let's find her before we leave.

1548897890.Text: I can tell that you guys are interested in the history of this world.

1548897891.Text: I've organized and categorized the information that Natasha provided. Just look through it if there's anything you wish to learn about.

1548898319.Text: Geomarrow, the Eternal Freeze, Solar Furnace Core... Looks like we're getting very close to the answer.

1548898318.Text: I will organize the information Oleg provided and add it to the Express expedition log.

1548898352.Text: It's not just the three of us that were brought underground... Where'd Bronya go?

1548898349.Text: Seele has been missing for quite some time as well...

1548898350.Text: I wonder where Clara is. I hope she's okay. Oh! I almost forgot about Hook! I wonder if she's awake.

1548898347.Text: Now that I think about it... I don't really want to let this go...

-37388862.Text: {NICKNAME}, I've been great to you, haven't I?

-37388863.Text: I rescued you from a nasty situation, then I sent you back to above ground, and even found you a capable ally.

-37388864.Text: Heh, there's no need to thank me, really. However, if you insist on thanking me, a little reward wouldn't hurt.

-37388829.Text: You've been great help to the "Wildfire," and "Wildfire" will return the favor.

-37388832.Text: I have a feeling that we will be sharing paths very soon.

-37388928.Text: Look over there, can you see? That cluster of houses over there is where I grew up, it's also the most dangerous place in all of the Underground.

-37388925.Text: Before Chief Oleg brought me in, I was there on the streets with the older kids wondering where we were going to find our next meal.

-37388926.Text: I then learned to read and write from Natasha, patrolled the mines with Oleg, and even fought off some of the local thugs...

-37388929.Text: I'm sorry, life in the Underground is hard. I shouldn't have looked at it so lightly.

-37388930.Text: D-Don't apologize like that... Don't you know that others don't know what to do when you do that?

-37388919.Text: What I mean is... I admire you.

-37388920.Text: Before falling into the Underground, my life was just a never-ending cycle of reading, etiquette learning, and training... Ugh, and the painful Divinity recitations.

1528695014.Text: From the start of my memories, people continuously whisper to me: "Remember who you are, Bronya," "This is against the Divinity, Bronya," "A lady wouldn't utter such rude words, Bronya"...

1528695013.Text: Some people admire this kind of life, but what I feel is... unease. You probably can't imagine a life where you are stuck in a never-ending cycle and your goals are set for you by others.

1528695016.Text: Uhh... No, I can't. But what I'm more interested in is, what did you actually say?

1528695010.Text: On behalf of Plamya, I shall stick this spear into your nostrils!

1528695009.Text: Hahaha, that's it? That's weak, looks like I'm going to have to teach you some of the slangs of the Underworld before you go back.

1528695012.Text: No, no, that won't be necessary.

1528695011.Text: I never thought that I'd be having such a nice conversation with the future Consul.

1528695022.Text: I've always thought that the people above ground are all arrogant and annoying.

1528695021.Text: The same goes for me. I was... a little scared at first, I didn't think that you guys couldn't have been as "normal" as you looked.

-1200188342.Text: However... after having stayed here for a little while, I realized that the only difference between us is that we were brought up in a different environment.

-1200188339.Text: We all share the same emotions in life and the connections we have with one another. Our values are the same.

-1200188340.Text: Sometimes... I find the things you say very difficult to understand.

-1200188345.Text: Anyways, if the others above ground are like you, then we can definitely all sit down and have a chat.

-1200188344.Text: I'm sorry to have bothered you.

-1200188333.Text: I'm sorry for being a third.

-1200188334.Text: It's alright, I was actually just wondering when you'd show up.

365895602.Text: We can't just leave her here, right?

365895601.Text: Hmm? You need to talk in private? Sure, I'll leave you guys to it.

365895596.Text: Thank you for your concerns, but I want to stay here a little longer.

365895595.Text: I've read the historical documents. Natasha promised to show me the rest after it's been extracted.

365895598.Text: I'd like to know more about the Union's past.

365895608.Text: Their records... are completely different from the histories I've learned.

365895607.Text: I need some time to organize my thoughts.

-2006757395.Text: What are you planning to do?

-2006757396.Text: It won't take very long, I just want to stay a little longer and learn about more details.

-2006757393.Text: Then, I will find Madam Cocolia and tell her about my findings in the Underground.

-2006757394.Text: If everything goes well, I wish to reestablish communication between Belobog and the Underground and restore the original meaning to Belobog's name.

-2006757399.Text: Oh, don't worry, I will tell Madam Cocolia about you guys as well.

-2006757400.Text: If the "Stellaron" you speak of truly exists, she will definitely know something about it.

-2006757397.Text: Is it really going to go that smoothly?

-2006757398.Text: Easier said than done, just as everything in the world, isn't it? It's not so hard compared to the lives that the undergrounders have to lead, is it?

-2006757387.Text: You're in a very difficult position, aren't you?

-2006757388.Text: If the idea or belief is correct, then it doesn't matter what position you take.

-440673454.Text: If Madam Cocolia won't accept my proposal... No... I can't let that threaten my resolve.

-440673455.Text: Hey, {NICKNAME}, you wanna come take a look at the scenery?

-440673458.Text: Oh, it'll be fine. Just stay for a little bit!

-440673459.Text: Say, this is actually a private place of mine. I don't usually share this place with others. You should be thankful that I've invited you here!

-440673456.Text: Hey, you and Bronya have seen stars before right?

-440673446.Text: Why are you asking about this all of a sudden?

-440673447.Text: Umm... just to clarify, I've also seen stars when Sampo and I were above ground.

1125410487.Text: I asked him what stars were, and he told me that they are shining gems on a layer of black velvet...

1125410488.Text: Actually, stars are rocks floating in the void.

1125410482.Text: Yes, stars are gems in the sky.

1125410485.Text: Being in the Underground, all we see is a gray ceiling above us, holding us down. The stars and the sky however, are beautiful.

1125410484.Text: I'd like to show it to Hook, and to Clara, and to everyone in the Underground.

1125410495.Text: You will, one day, everyone will have the chance to see it...

-37388895.Text: We won't be coming back here for a while after returning to the top side, right?

-37388894.Text: We might not ever come back again.

-37388893.Text: You best use your time wisely if you have anything that's unfinished.

-37388994.Text: Ah, you guys are here. Are you ready? Natasha told me to show you guys the way.

-37388995.Text: Rest assured, I've been in and out of the fissure more times than I can count. I know where the monsters are and where it's safe. I won't make any mistakes.

-37388990.Text: Hmm? What is it? You still don't trust Sampo?

-37388992.Text: Even though the Underworld is completely sealed off by the Consul, someone's bound to find a way back up in a place of this size.

-37388985.Text: Obviously, to prevent the Union from noticing, these paths are always very well hidden. There's no worry about being chased down by the Silvermane Guards again.

-37388986.Text: 【临时】这次不需要把我们迷倒吗？

1528694948.Text: What kind of question is that? You've already earned the trust of the "Wildfire." There's no need for something like that anymore.

1528694947.Text: 【临时】突然想起还有事情要办。

1528694946.Text: Alright then, Sampo will wait right here until you're done dragging your feet and finished with your business. Go on now.

-37388961.Text: A-Achoo! Finally, we're back on the surface.

-37388964.Text: Sampo—— A-Achoo—— W-Where are you taking us?

-37388963.Text: Better if we kept our voices down. You guys are still being hunted you know?

-37388958.Text: That's the same for you too, isn't it?

-37388957.Text: Heh, you've got a point there. Then it's best that we try and act normal before anyone gets suspicious of us.

-37388960.Text: What memories, it wasn't too long ago that I brought everyone to this city.

-37388959.Text: Yup, and you tossed us to the Silvermane Guards on the way——

-37388953.Text: Everyone, now that we're back above ground, it's time for me to be on my way.

1528694979.Text: I've been gone a long time and the work back at the Consul residence is piling up. I'm sure the Silvermane Guards are looking for me all over the place as well.

1528694980.Text: Before I can convince Madam Consul to dismiss the arrest order, please take care of yourselves and stay out of sight. For your own safety, it's best if I didn't know where you were headed.

1528694977.Text: Sigh, the little lady is headed back to her luxurious residence and we still have to hide like rats in the dark alley...

1528694978.Text: Heh, don't you go off screaming for guards as you put some distance between us. Sampo can't take that kind of betrayal.

1528694981.Text: I'm sorry, I was just trying to lighten the mood.

1528694987.Text: As the future ruler of the city, I will keep to every promise I make.

-37389060.Text: We're here, this is the place. We weren't followed, were we?

-37389055.Text: 【临时】那么，欢迎各位来到「地火」在上层区的安全屋，也是我落脚的地方——之一。

-37389056.Text: Is this one of your hideouts above ground?

-37389053.Text: Hideout just sounds... (Thinks about it) Hmm... I guess "hideout" would be the most proper term for it, haha.

-37389054.Text: You never know what kind of trouble you'll get into, I should probably prepare a few more of these hideouts.

-37389052.Text: If everyone from "Wildfire" can travel through the secret underground tunnels as they wish, I'm sure it'd be a huge headache for the Consul.

1528694882.Text: All bragging aside, if it weren't for the brave Sampo traveling up and down and to all corners of this city, it wouldn't matter how determined the "Wildfire" are, they wouldn't be able to do anything but to be stuck underground.

1528694881.Text: In the words of Oleg: "What would we do without Sampo?"

1528694884.Text: It's a miracle you haven't been caught yet...

1528694883.Text: It's a miracle "Wildfire" is still operational with you around...

1528694886.Text: I am quite experienced in terms of escaping punishment. Have faith in me.

1528694885.Text: In my experience, this city doesn't care about who you are. As long as we act natural, we're just free citizens to them.

1528694888.Text: Alright, enough chitchat, I have some things I need to tend to. Make yourself at home, and let me know if you need anything, as long as it's within my powers, I will make it happen. Besides, "Wildfire" is paying for all of this anyways.

1528694887.Text: Say, Danheng, something on your mind?

1528694890.Text: There's no such thing as a free lunch. An old saying from where I'm from.

1528694889.Text: Natasha had you bring us above ground and even arranged for a place to stay... Why's it seem like she's trying to lure us into working with the "Wildfire" again?

-1200188473.Text: Aww, why do you think the worst of people? You guys helped out a lot in the Underground, she just wants to show a bit of appreciation.

-1200188474.Text: Besides, you both have the same goals, don't you?

-1200188471.Text: Anyways, what are you guys planning on doing next?

-1200188469.Text: I still believe it's time for us to go and pay Himeko and Mr. Yang a visit. We should update them with our situation and ask them about cooperating with "Wildfire."

-1200188467.Text: Eh? I'm not good at making these types of decisions...

-1200188468.Text: But if I must... Isn't Bronya going to deliver a message for us? If she can convince Madam Consul, our investigation would become a piece of a cake.

-1200188466.Text: Take your time, as long as your trust in Bronya is not misplaced, this place will remain hidden.

365895468.Text: Just holler at me if you need anything. I have some things I need to take care of above ground as well, heh.

-37389027.Text: You're going out? That's some courage!

-37389026.Text: I suggest you guys keep a low profile. The place is crawling with Bluecoat patrols.

-37388598.Text: Have you made up your mind about where we're going next?

-37388599.Text: I want to go back to the Express. We've been in this frozen world for so long I feel like I'm at a point where I can even accept Himeko's coffee now.

-37388600.Text: 【临时】去跟姬子和瓦尔特打声招呼吧。

-37388602.Text: I will prepare the information and records we've collected these couple of days and add them to the Express log. It should be helpful for our next moves.

-37388603.Text: 【临时】不等等布洛妮娅的消息吗？

-37388604.Text: I suppose we should. As the person closest to the Consul, she should be very influential.

-37388605.Text: However, in the meantime, I will prepare the information and records we've collected these couple of days. Then, I'll pay a visit to Himeko and Welt to see if they have any advice on our next move.

-37388606.Text: I think it's best if we consult the Express team whether we should continue to work with "Wildfire" and shoulder even more risk continuing to search for the "Solar Furnace Core."

1528695343.Text: If everything goes to plan, "Wildfire's" main forces should be arriving above ground in no time. A clash is inevitable, this is a hatred that has been brewing for over a century, no one knows how it's all going to end.

1528695342.Text: I see... that's why you want to consult the two of them...

1528695341.Text: We must always remember that we're just travelers passing through, we're here to witness history, not some kind of envoy of justice or mercenary.

1528695340.Text: If the Underworld and Overworld goes to war, we have to know where we stand.

1528695339.Text: Our position should be... to be "neutral," right?

1528695338.Text: To put it in a more precise way, it's to "continue forward."

-37388568.Text: Seeing Himeko all nice and comfy on the Express makes me angry for some reason...

-37388567.Text: What are you talking about? I've been worried sick about you guys the whole time. Isn't that right, Welt?

-37388569.Text: So how was it? What did you find in the Ice World?

1831223056.Text: So a city corrupted by the Fragmentum, a Consul that's hunting you guys down, a rebel organization hidden beneath the ground, and... the "Furnace Core."

1831223055.Text: That's amazing! You've experienced so much in just a few days! It's all coming together now.

1831223054.Text: {NICKNAME}, as the newest member of the Express, you really are impressive. Seems like pairing you with Danheng and March was a great idea.

1831223053.Text: 【临时】你认为「炉心」和星核有关？

1831223052.Text: I think they are definitely connected. From the file descriptions the "Wildfire" found, the Eternal Freeze is a catastrophe the Stellaron has brought upon the world.

1831223051.Text: Regardless of whether the two are connected, the "Furnace Core" is definitely the most important thing in existence in the world.

1831223066.Text: Hesitation is meaningless. If there is nothing else at hand, then we should begin investigating from the nearest lead.

1831223065.Text: 【临时】我们需要严格保持中立吗？

265139117.Text: I see it differently from Danheng. I don't think anyone is capable of remaining neutral.

265139116.Text: If the Consul had welcomed you into the city rather than going after you guys, no one would've been able to understand what had been going on underground.

265139115.Text: So you see, often times it's not up to you whether you want to remain neutral or not.

265139114.Text: Keeping neutral is just convincing yourself that you have nothing to do with what's going on. But we've already made our marks in the world and are a part of the world. We can't tell ourselves that none of it has anything to do with us.

265139113.Text: Just make whatever decision you find fitting, and don't judge yourself based on the results.

265139111.Text: Welt and I have seen all sorts of war and destruction in different worlds. It may be feuds between indigenous people, or a resistance against invaders...

265139110.Text: For the majority of them, dispute is a form of opportunity. What awaits may be total destruction, but it may also be opportunity at life.

265139125.Text: From the looks of your descriptions... the future of this planet is like a coin that's been tossed high into the air. On one side, it's an ending of unity and rebuilding, and on the other side, both groups suffer grave wounds, and they march towards destruction.

265139124.Text: Danheng is not wrong, we are just a group of travelers. However, if travelers can get involved and spread the seeds of hope, why stop yourself from doing so?

-1300944824.Text: Anyways, the influences of the "Stellaron" must be taken care of.

-1300944825.Text: If you've already won the trust of a group of trustworthy allies... Why not use their strength in achieving this goal?

1831223087.Text: What a splendid story. It has the potential of being the foundation of a great anime, haha.

1831223088.Text: Now, a good story needs a good ending as well, am I right? I look forward to your future accomplishments.

1831223085.Text: 【临时】我们带回来了「地髓」的样本。

1831223086.Text: Oh? Interesting... Leave it with me, I'll examine its components.

1831223084.Text: I'm not sure if this thing is connected to the "Stellaron," but it does have an extremely unique composition. I've never seen any minerals like it... I don't think a planet like Jarilo-VI would have a primordial matter like this.

1831223097.Text: You said it yourself, the appearance of the Geomarrow coincides with the time when the world was entombed by the Eternal Freeze. If the Geomarrow is a creation encouraged by the influence of the Stellaron, then all the catastrophes it has caused would all make sense.

1831223098.Text: 【临时】你们从前是如何应对这种局面的？

265139148.Text: Ah, the adventures of the old. How nostalgic.

265139149.Text: Himeko and I were the "Nameless" and we followed the same conviction...

265139146.Text: The idea of "Trailblazing" and "connecting" is not to simply appear on a piece of land and leave a simple teleportation coordinate. We try to do what we can to build rapport with every civilization.

265139147.Text: Only by doing so, will more like-minded travelers voluntarily join the "Nameless," and will the "Trailblaze" voyage be meaningful.

265139145.Text: Returns the question: What do you think you should do?

265139142.Text: Do you wish travelers like us a century... a millennium from now, to find a world that is thriving with life... or just a ruin in freezing ice?

265139143.Text: I can see the answer in your eyes. Go do what is right, {NICKNAME}.

265139156.Text: Oh, take this with you, you might find a use for it.

265139157.Text: Though named differently, but the nature of the radiation the "Geomarrow" is emitting is what's known as ionizing radiation, which is the same as nuclear radiation...

-1300944793.Text: I'm sorry... I'm blabbering again. Anyways, if you need to go into areas that are heavily contaminated by radiation, just stick this on your chest and you'll be fine.

-1300944792.Text: I look forward to hearing the stories that follow, {NICKNAME}.

1831222991.Text: Himeko and Welt really do make a lot of sense... They really are experienced travelers!

1831222993.Text: 【临时】要对这个世界负责到底。

1831222988.Text: 【临时】要借助「地火」的力量找到星核。

1831222987.Text: 【临时】等两边打起来——我们渔翁得利。

1831222990.Text: March: Eh?! I would've never thought that you were such an evil person!

1831222989.Text: 【临时】开玩笑的…我们去找「炉心」吧。

1831223000.Text: March: I knew you couldn't have been serious...

1831222999.Text: If Himeko and Welt have both made the same conclusion, then I have no objections at all.

265139051.Text: Let's go back to the Union and plan our next steps with Sampo.

1831223024.Text: So, valued clients, have you decided?

1831223019.Text: Ah, what a wise decision! Natasha would be thrilled if she were here.

1831223020.Text: However... we're not sure where we should investigate next, do you have any suggestions?

1831223021.Text: You guys are lacking in intel—— Speaking of intel, well, that's my forte.

1831223022.Text: What you need is a reliable source, a trustworthy guide...

1831223031.Text: You're not... making a self-recommendation again, are you?

1831223032.Text: Of course not, this is nothing like the petty things that go on in the Underground, this is way too risky. My business philosophy does not fit well with this.

265139082.Text: However, I do know someone... she may be able to help you.

265139083.Text: 【临时】你怎么确定「她」靠不靠谱？

265139084.Text: Don't worry, she's an old client of mine.

265139085.Text: That lady is a straight shooter. We just need to persuade her a little, and she'll be more than happy to be your guide.

265139078.Text: Besides... there might be some similarities in what you guys are looking for, heh.

265139079.Text: 【临时】共同体人凭什么帮我们？

265139080.Text: Let's put it this way... your goals might be along the lines of hers, heh.

265139081.Text: Besides, that lady is an old client of mine. Just chat her up a little, and she'll definitely be willing to be your guide.

265139090.Text: Why's if feel like there's a hidden meaning in what you're saying...

265139091.Text: Oh well, I suppose you haven't done anything bad to us up to this point.

-1300944859.Text: See? The secret to profitability is to be honest with your clients.

-1300944858.Text: Pack up and we'll head out. Let's leave during the night, I don't want to be chased around by the Bluecoats again.

1831222924.Text: The woman we're looking for is named Serval. She's a mechanic and a rock 'n' roller—— Most importantly, she's one of my biggest clients in the Union!

1831222923.Text: She sounds like a very talented lady.

1831222930.Text: Shh, footsteps. There's more than one person.

1831222928.Text: Whew...! That was nice, I haven't rehearsed like that in a while!

1831222934.Text: We'll arrange it later. I hear that Ms. Bronya's back and that the city's curfew is going to get worse. Looks like things are gonna get busy again.

1831222933.Text: Sigh, what a drag! Cocolia really is too sensitive about stuff like this. It's normal for an adolescent girl to run away from home from time to time.

265138985.Text: I know you and Madam Consul have a history, but calling her by her name like this...

265138984.Text: What of it? We used to be great friends. Meh, never mind—— If we get the chance, let's get Gepard to rehearse with us next time.

265138983.Text: I refuse... Captain Landau has no idea what music is.

265138982.Text: Sampo, how long are you planning on hiding there?

265138989.Text: Heh, I'm not hiding from you, it's just a little inconvenient.

265138988.Text: I can smell... the scent of the Underground all the way here. Oh, what is this? You brought a few friends with you.

265138987.Text: Wait a minute... Have I met you guys somewhere before...?

265138986.Text: Ah, we met you when we first entered the city!

265138993.Text: I remember now, you were with Pela at the time. So what business do you have visiting the workshop so late at night?

265138992.Text: We'd like to find the "Furnace Core."

-1300944956.Text: We'd like to overthrow the Union.

-1300944958.Text: That's not something you can say out loud! Come, we'll talk inside.

1831222958.Text: Alright, it's safe here... please continue.

1831222955.Text: I almost forgot to introduce myself—— I am Serval Landau, the most professional mechanic in the entire Union. I am an active rock 'n' roller, and older sister of Captain Gepard Landau.

1831222956.Text: Eh, so you're the sister of that handsome captain?! You give off a very different vibe.

1831222961.Text: I'll take that as a compliment. *Ahem* Anyways, can you please tell me again what it is that you need from me?

1831222962.Text: We'd like to investigate the Union's "Furnace Core." It may be connected to Stellaron.

1831222959.Text: Hold on a second, what is "Stellaron"? And where did you hear about the "Furnace Core"?

1831222960.Text: It seems like we're gonna have to tell Serval about our entire journey...

265139016.Text: W-Wait! That's way too much information, I need a minute...

265139014.Text: 【临时】这些都是秘密，不要告诉别人。

265139015.Text: Of course not, I'm not someone that would do something like that.

265139020.Text: So... The "Furnace Core" might be connected to this... "Stellaron" that you're looking for, right?

265139018.Text: According to what you're saying, the "Stellaron" will bring upon catastrophe to the world that it's in. Then in terms of the Union, it would have to be the "Eternal Freeze," right?

265139019.Text: On top of that, according to the lost historical data found in the Underground, the "Geomarrow" appeared at almost the same time as the "Eternal Freeze"...

265139024.Text: I see, then it all makes sense!

-1300944925.Text: With what you guys have told me... That means my research...

-1300944924.Text: 【临时】你就完全不怀疑我们吗…

-1300944927.Text: It's definitely right, your descriptions have proven my research results!

-1300944926.Text: Oh, I forgot to tell you guys, I worked for the Union R&D Department. My primary research subject was the "Geomarrow."

-1300944921.Text: However, the department I was working at was ordered to be dismissed. I've been staying in this workshop ever since, doing my own research here and there...

-1300944920.Text: And she is the primary research supplier to Natasha, heh.

-1300944923.Text: It's not like I had a choice...

-1300944922.Text: *Ahem* Anyways, I've always suspected that the appearance of the "Geomarrow" had something to do with the "Eternal Freeze."

-1300944917.Text: These ores continuously absorb the surrounding heat, yet it barely emits any form of energy.

-1300944916.Text: I once proposed looking for other energy sources to replace the "Geomarrow," but Cocolia had other plans...

1427938430.Text: *Ahem* No point talking about the past. So you want to know where the "Furnace Core" is, right?

1427938431.Text: It's be great if you can tell us the precise location.

1427938428.Text: We'd like to get up close with the "Furnace Core," and prevent causing any commotions in the process.

1427938429.Text: To be honest, though I am aware of the "Furnace Core's" existence, I don't actually know its actual location...

1427938434.Text: But don't worry, as you know, the "Furnace Core" is where all the Geomarrow ore end up. That means if you follow the "Geomarrow" supply lines to the end...

1427938435.Text: ... You'll definitely find out where the "Furnace Core" is.

1427938432.Text: That's right! Thanks to my work from before, I am very clear about where they keep the "Geomarrow" they've gathered from the Underground.

1427938433.Text: There is a "Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone" on the outskirts of the city. There's a lot of Silvermane Guards stationed there, ordinary people won't be able to get anywhere close to that place.

1427938438.Text: That is where they keep all the "Geomarrow" ores.

1427938439.Text: 【临时】把守森严，我们怎么混进去？

-138145511.Text: Well, that's where I come in!

-138145510.Text: 【临时】你不会是想把我们卖了吧……

-138145513.Text: Tsk, is that your attitude for asking for favors?!

-138145512.Text: I cut my ties with the Silvermane Guards a long time ago. Sampo can vouch for me!

-138145507.Text: Huh? Oh, right, yea, I can vouch for her. Serval would never try to trick people, heh.

-138145506.Text: If you're still skeptical... I can come with you, how's that?

-138145509.Text: I was tasked with visiting that place to check on the supplying of Geomarrow frequently when I worked at the R&D Department. I'm very familiar with the soldiers there.

-138145508.Text: Really? It makes me feel much better knowing that a familiar face will be showing us the way.

-138145503.Text: I too want to see for myself what this "Solar Furnace Core" that Cocolia spoke of looks like...

-138145502.Text: It's a plan then! No time to waste, get ready and we'll head out.

1831222859.Text: Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone sounds like somewhere that's extremely heavily guarded.

1831222862.Text: {NICKNAME}, make sure you don't do anything rash.

1831222893.Text: She's very bold, and she even plays music...

1831222894.Text: Is that pokerface captain really her brother?

1831223321.Text: Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone huh... This is going to be problematic...

1831223320.Text: Sampo will sit this one out...

1831223317.Text: It's a little inappropriate for... someone like me to go to a place like that. Heh...

1831223316.Text: Don't worry, Natasha and Seele won't be able to stand by and watch. "Wildfire" will definitely get involved.

1831223314.Text: Seele and Natasha? How would I know? They're probably in the Underground plotting to do something.

1831223313.Text: It takes some time to think things over after getting hold of such a large quantity of historical data.

265139381.Text: Being the way that Natasha and Seele are, "Wildfire" definitely won't just stand by and watch.

265139380.Text: They might meet up with you at some point, heh.

1831223354.Text: We'll head out whenever you're ready.

1831223351.Text: Eh? Is there something you'd like to ask me?

1831223349.Text: Do I know her? Cocolia and I are best friends!

1831223350.Text: At least we used to be...

1831223347.Text: I'm sorry, this is something I don't wish to talk about.

1831223348.Text: 【临时】你做的是什么类型的音乐？

1831223346.Text: Have you seen my bass? It's cool right? Rock 'n' roll is my youth and my soul!

265139413.Text: Heh, a lot of people say that, I'm used to hearing it.

265139410.Text: He always has a straight face on, as if he wants nothing of this world... What a waste of the great Landau family gene pool...

265139411.Text: Say, when this is all over, help me hook him and Pela up.

265139409.Text: It's been a while since I've done something so exciting... The rock 'n' roll inside me is on fire!

244936077.Text: 【临时】想溜进去怕是不可能了。希露瓦，我们怎么办？

244936076.Text: 【临时】别怕，区区几个小兵而已，就交给姐姐我吧。

244936070.Text: 【临时】前方是军事重地，闲人不得入内。

244936073.Text: 【临时】等等，这是…欸，这不是希露瓦大姐吗？好久不见！

244936072.Text: 【临时】哟，这不是弗朗兹嘛！好久不见，你怎么还在这儿看大门啊？

244936083.Text: 【临时】这…希露瓦大姐还是这么犀利，根本没法接话啊……

244936082.Text: 【临时】那个…这么晚了，您来这边干嘛？还带着好些个人。

1811020016.Text: 【临时】听我老弟说，输送地髓的自动化管线出了故障，挺要命的。他又信不过部队里的庸才工程师…就只能请我来打白工咯。

1811020015.Text: 【临时】这几个都是我临时找的助手，我们要连夜把这里的设备都检修一遍。

1811020018.Text: 【临时】那个…我没听说管线有问题啊……

1811020017.Text: 【临时】拜托，这么大的事，能让你一个看门的知道吗？行了，快让我进去吧。要是半夜供能出了问题，冻死人了你负责吗？

1811020011.Text: 【临时】好吧，这是临时的访问证明，您拿好了…出来的时候，记得还给我啊！

1811020014.Text: 【临时】多谢你了，弗朗兹。到时候我跟老弟美言几句，让他提拔提拔你！

244936108.Text: 【临时】「杰帕德的姐姐」原来是张万能牌吗……

244936109.Text: 【临时】嘿嘿，有这么个老弟可真不赖啊。

244936008.Text: 【临时】看到那座巨大的机械栈桥了吗？

244936007.Text: 【临时】栈桥的对面，有一片视野被遮蔽的区域…地髓的输送管线，就是通往那个方向的。

244936006.Text: 【临时】但只有寥寥几个工程师知道这件事，事后也被勒令向所有人保密。

244936012.Text: 【临时】除了可可利亚本人以外…恐怕没人知道吧？

244936011.Text: 【临时】我之所以知道地髓的流向，单纯是因为以前给管线做过检修。

244936017.Text: 【临时】没有。我会知道地髓的流向，单纯是因为以前给做管线做过检修。

244936016.Text: 【临时】除了可可利亚之外…恐怕没人知道那里有什么。

1811019950.Text: 【临时】他们告诉这些士兵，禁区深处有裂界的缝隙，还盘踞着强大的怪物，所以必须把守住这个关口，防止灾害扩散到城里。

1811019949.Text: 【临时】但是这么多年过去了，一次怪物渗透的案例都没有。懒散的卫兵都巴不得被分配到这儿来，钱多事少。

1811019948.Text: 【临时】依我看，这就是个幌子。还好遇见了你们，终于有机会一探究竟了。

1811019947.Text: 【临时】那里…可能藏着共同体最大的秘密

1811019954.Text: If we want to get across, we'll have to rotate the bridge. Serval, do you know how to make it turn?

1811019953.Text: There has to be a way to get this thing to operate. But first... there's something I want to confirm.

1811019952.Text: 【临时】继续向前之前，我想先勘察一下情况。

1811019951.Text: 【临时】这种部队常驻的场所，一般都有随处可见的无人机…帮我在周围找找看吧。

244936044.Text: That's a nice looking drone, how much you want for it?

244936045.Text: If I didn't need it for my concerts... I'd probably consider selling it to you...

244936042.Text: I've equipped the drone with an instrument that can detect "Geomarrow" radiation.

244936043.Text: Normally, packaged ores don't trigger readings. "Geomarrow" only emits large amounts of radiation when it's being ground at high pressures or being burned, triggering the alarms on the instrument.

244936048.Text: Kinda like the Geiger Muller Counter.

1811019981.Text: It's nothing, I'm just talking to myself.

1811019982.Text: The good news is, the instrument reading is only at level 5.

1811019979.Text: Eh? Then what's the bad news?

1811019980.Text: The reading limit for the instrument is level 5.

1811019985.Text: Can you finish your entire sentence at once...

1811019986.Text: This means the "Solar Furnace Core" is somewhere deeper.

1811019983.Text: And someone might be making a fire and preparing dinner there.

1811019984.Text: Cooking with a few hundred tons of "Geomarrow"? Must be quite a feast.

1811019989.Text: There's nowhere else that I can think of if the entrance isn't here.

1811019990.Text: All we have to do now is find the switch to the bridge.

244935942.Text: 【临时】帮我盯个稍，我来看看能不能启动它。

244935945.Text: 【临时】哨兵三月七，绝对不负使命！

244935944.Text: 【临时】嗯…用的操作系统和我当时没什么区别。

244935947.Text: 【临时】只是启用了多层加密，估计要花点时间……

244935949.Text: 【临时】不行…我是机械工程师，破解密码这种活可不是我的专业啊。

244935948.Text: 【临时】只能继续往前走了，看看能不能找到控制中枢，或者能帮上忙的熟人。

244935975.Text: 【临时】就是这里，大门后面那东西！那就是「机关能源中枢」。

244935976.Text: 【临时】欸？和史瓦罗基地里的装置长得很像嘛。

244935977.Text: 【临时】这么说来，这种装置也已经沿用好几百年了吗……

244935978.Text: 【临时】每个「机关能源中枢」都相当于一个心脏，连结着一片区域内所有的系统终端。

244935979.Text: 【临时】「中枢」的权限凌驾于单个终端之上。所以在紧急状况下，只要关闭它的电源，这片区域内所有的机关终端都会瞬间下线。

244935980.Text: 【临时】反过来说，如果我们想要绕过单个终端的加密系统，也可以通过操作「中枢」来实现。

244935981.Text: 【临时】所以，只要控制了这个「中枢」，我们就控制了禁区内的所有机关，包括那座栈桥。

244935983.Text: 【临时】那么问题来了——我们该怎么进去？

1811019915.Text: 【临时】好问题…这附近巡逻的人也太多了吧？

1811019916.Text: 【临时】照你刚才的说法，这么重要的装置，的确需要重兵把守。

1811019917.Text: 【临时】没办法，那就只能再刷一次脸了。硬着头皮问问周围的卫兵吧！

244936403.Text: 【临时】你就是弗朗兹说的，来禁区做紧急检修的工程师吧？

244936402.Text: 【临时】我看你们在这附近晃悠一阵了，查出什么问题了吗？

244936401.Text: 【临时】没有，目前为止一切正常。

244936400.Text: 【临时】所以我就在想啊…有没有可能是「能源中枢」出了问题？

244936399.Text: 【临时】能不能让我们进去，做个例行检查？顺便一提，我可是参与了这个装置的发明……

244936398.Text: 【临时】不行！没有指挥官的密钥，谁也不能接近「能源中枢」。

244936397.Text: 【临时】执政官大人来了也不行？

244936396.Text: 【临时】执政官大…别在我面前抖机灵，我不会让你们进去的！

1811020346.Text: 【临时】糟了，这回啃到硬骨头了……

1811020345.Text: 【临时】你刚才提到了「密钥」，对吧？我该去哪找那位指挥官？

1811020344.Text: 【临时】邓恩长官在前面休息，你们自己去找他吧。要是他同意把「密钥」交给你们，我也没有阻拦的道理。

1811020343.Text: 【临时】邓恩…邓恩？嗨，你早说是他啊！得了得了，那没事了——我们回头再来找你。

244936430.Text: 【临时】那么问题来了——我们该怎么进去？
