984248084.Text: 【临时】希露瓦，你认识那个邓恩指挥官吗？

984248081.Text: 【临时】怎么说呢？算是老熟人吧。

984248082.Text: 【临时】他挺好说话的，看我来说服他。

984247985.Text: 【临时】听说，杰帕德派了工程师来做紧急检修？

984247988.Text: 【临时】和守门的弗朗兹确认过了，的确有这回事。

984247987.Text: 【临时】我二十四小时都守在这里，怎么没听说有什么紧急故障？

984247982.Text: 【临时】我听弗朗兹说，来的人是杰帕德长官的姐姐……

984247984.Text: 【临时】见鬼，我都两天没洗澡了——我身上有味道吗？

984248018.Text: Hey, Dunn! It's been a while—— I didn't know you made commander already.

984248019.Text: S-Serval, it's been a long time... you're still so... *Ahem* You look good.

984248020.Text: Allow me to introduce my assistants to you. They help me with my work at the workshop.

984248013.Text: Everyone, this is Commander Dunn, an old friend of mine. He used to be on the keyboard in my band.

984248014.Text: Oh? This strict looking officer is also a rocker? Hello there!

-581835923.Text: Hmm *Ahem!* Zackery, how many days has it been since you showered?

-581835922.Text: Huh? I... showered right before my shift...

-581835928.Text: R-Report! I haven't showered in two days, sir!

-581835927.Text: That's disgusting, there is a lady present!

-581835925.Text: So how bout it, Dunn? Why don't we get back on stage and rock out again?

-581835916.Text: My keyboard guy is pretty good, but I still miss the days of being in the military and playing with our band...

-581835915.Text: That's ancient history, Serval. I haven't touched a keyboard in ages. Besides, I'm stationed here all year around, I doubt I'd get the chance.

-178551397.Text: Anyways... was there something you needed? If everything is normal, it's best if you head back into the city, you shouldn't stay here long.

-178551396.Text: I've checked the lines and systems, there doesn't seem to be any major problems. All that's left is the "Energy Central Hub."

-178551395.Text: The guard over there said that I need an "encryption key" to open the door. Can you help me out?

-178551401.Text: We'll be on our way after we run a check-up.

-178551400.Text: Don't be so hesitant in front of someone you like.

-178551389.Text: What is it, Dunn? Something wrong?

-178551388.Text: Sorry, but can you tell me what Captain Gepard told you?

-1744635338.Text: Huh? Oh... I remember he said that "Hey sis, there's been a malfunction with the Geomarrow supply pipes at the restricted zone. Those useless engineers can't find the problem"—— Something along those lines...

-1744635337.Text: And when is it that he came to the restricted zone for his inspections?

-1744635336.Text: Eh... last week? Yea, it should've been last week. I don't remember which day though.

-1744635335.Text: I was here all of last week. If Captain Gepard had come here, I would've known.

-1744635340.Text: And the people you've brought... They're not assistants from the workshop, right?

-1744635339.Text: Serval, it's not that I don't want to help you... But you should remember that I'm part of the Silvermane Guards!

-1744635330.Text: 【临时】这样吧，你先回去，这件事我不会跟任何人说…但是这些「外来者」必须留下！

-1744635329.Text: ... As expected, you can't expect to be lucky.

-1341350810.Text: Sorry for getting you involved in this.

-1341350809.Text: No, I brought you guys here, so I will stand with you until the end!

-1341350808.Text: We have something important to do that concerns the Union's destiny. Dunn, please don't stop us-

-1341350815.Text: Serval! We used to rehearse together every day. You should know, right?

-1341350814.Text: My rock 'n' roll soul is to uphold the dignity of a soldier!

984247919.Text: 【临时】放下武器吧，邓恩！我真的不想和你动手……

984247917.Text: 【临时】轻易抛弃原则的男人，你最讨厌了吧？

984247949.Text: 【临时】邓恩，已经够了…不要再勉强自己了！

984247950.Text: 【临时】我可不要…被自己中意的女人…看不起啊！

984247853.Text: 【临时】呼…终于结束了。这位指挥官，意志格外强大啊……

984247856.Text: 【临时】他应该没事，只是暂时昏过去了。看看他身上有没有藏着「密钥」吧。

984247858.Text: 【临时】找到了，肯定就是这个——能开启禁区闸门的「密钥」。

984247857.Text: 【临时】太好了！趁没人发现，咱们赶紧回——

984247861.Text: 【临时】等等，你要干什么——快阻止他！

-581836086.Text: 【临时】「铁卫禁区」的警报被触发了，恐怕这里的所有银鬃铁卫都会开始搜捕我们。

-581836083.Text: 【临时】说不定城区里的卫兵也会前来增援……

-581836082.Text: 【临时】的确，即使想原路返回，恐怕路上也已经被卫兵堵得水泄不通了吧。

-581836079.Text: 【临时】眼下只有硬着头皮，继续探索禁区深处了。

-581836080.Text: 【临时】杂兵而已，来几个就打倒几个。

-178551560.Text: 【临时】气势很足——不过我们不是来挑起战争的，还记得吗？

-178551561.Text: 【临时】想原路返回恐怕也晚了。眼下只有硬着头皮，继续探索禁区深处了。

-178551558.Text: 【临时】丹恒说得对，我也没打算就此放弃。走吧，我们回去找「机关能源核心」。

-178551559.Text: 【临时】如果可以的话，最好能避免交火。毕竟他们都是邓恩的部下……

984247886.Text: 【临时】你们，给我站住！触发警报的就是你们吧！

984247887.Text: 【临时】指挥官已经把「密钥」交给我了，你们不要挡路！

984247888.Text: 【临时】想得美——闯入者，等着蹲大牢吧！

984248315.Text: 【临时】快！抓紧时间，在卫兵赶过来之前把它搞定。

984248312.Text: 【临时】可恶，这操作系统是谁设计的啊，怎么这么繁琐！

984248311.Text: 【临时】「应急消防疏散系统」…肯定不是这个……

984248310.Text: 【临时】「舞池摇滚氛围模式」…哈？这是谁加进去的啊？

984248309.Text: 【临时】「机关栈桥控制终端」——哈哈，还是让我找到了！

984248308.Text: 【临时】都搞定了，现在咱们去栈桥！

984248348.Text: 【临时】小心，那边的路上有重兵把守。

984248345.Text: 【临时】是那台新型机甲…那玩意的火力，「壁垒」都不一定承受得住……

984248346.Text: 【临时】我可不想变成它的活靶子啊。

-602038866.Text: 【临时】我来！帮我留意一下周围。

-602038867.Text: 【临时】很好，多层加密已经解除了，那只需要设置一下基本权限……

-602038868.Text: 【临时】成了！现在咱们可以操作栈桥了。

-602038836.Text: 【临时】走吧，「太阳炉心」可能就在前方。

-602038932.Text: 【临时】为什么这里也有守卫机器人……

-602038929.Text: 【临时】难道还有别的密道通往禁区深处吗？

-602038930.Text: 【临时】不对…看合金外壳的保养情况，应该是很久之前就被安置在这里了。

-602038935.Text: This is probably the last obstacle set up to stop intruders.

-602038936.Text: 【临时】没有犹豫的余地了，我们上！

-602038933.Text: That's the rock 'n' roll spirit we need!

-602038934.Text: This machine is a custom model that wasn't mass-produced... It is quite strong.

-602038923.Text: 【临时】等一下，准备周全再上吧…

-602038924.Text: This machine is a custom model that wasn't mass-produced... It is quite strong.

964045010.Text: But overcoming difficulties... That's the true spirit of rock 'n' roll!

964045009.Text: Good thing you have an expert mechanic in your party. I'll help you find its weakness.

964045012.Text: The pursuers must be on their way. We must defeat it quickly.

-602038899.Text: 【临时】真是难缠的敌人，还好有你们在。

-602038898.Text: 【临时】老实说，我一直对「外星人」之类的说法将信将疑，不过你们的实力打消了我的质疑。

-602038897.Text: 【临时】等事情结束了，就请希露瓦来做我们的音乐嘉宾吧？

-602038904.Text: 【临时】我敢打赌，你肯定会对「列车」很感兴趣！

-602038903.Text: 【临时】闲聊稍后再继续吧，必须先找到通往「炉心」的道路。

-602038998.Text: The instrument is sending out warnings again. Massive amounts of Geomarrow are pouring in deeper... It will be crushed and incinerated somewhere.

-602038999.Text: ... It will also make this world colder.

-602039000.Text: Correct... Given the history you've told me, it's probably the right conclusion.

-602038993.Text: At a time when people were on the verge of despair, Plamya discovered "Geomarrow," which she thought was the world's only hope. But the world paid the ultimate price, only to delay its inevitable demise.

-602038994.Text: To be honest, I don't know how we can replace "Geomarrow," but it's much better than waiting to die.

-602038996.Text: Of course! How can a rock star not have that kind of confidence?

-602038990.Text: We need the combined strength of everyone.

964044944.Text: Indeed, too many people have paid the price for mining "Geomarrow"...

964044943.Text: Cocolia will use everything in her power to stop you? It will be hard to convince Gepard.

964044941.Text: I never thought that would be a possibility...

964044948.Text: However, astral travel isn't something that everyone can do, right?

964044947.Text: Sacrificing people so that others may survive... We'll be no different from the Union.

964044945.Text: I have a feeling that there are dangers lurking even deeper...

964044952.Text: I have the same feeling. {NICKNAME}, what can you feel?

-1764838412.Text: It feels like I've seen this place in my dreams.

-1764838413.Text: The dreams were a result of your resonance with "Stellaron."

-1764838414.Text: We should take some time to prepare, if we can.

-1764838407.Text: ... But it seems we have no way to back down now.

-1764838408.Text: That's them! The intruders posing as mechanics!

-1764838409.Text: 【临时】你们就没想过，为啥身后没有蓝甲人的追兵吗？

-1764838410.Text: 【临时】当然是因为有「地火」在帮你们垫后啊。

-1764838403.Text: There's way too many soldiers... It seems as if every soldier in the Restricted Zone is here!

-1764838404.Text: We have no other choice but to fight.

-198754471.Text: Natasha! Seele! What are you two doing here?

-198754472.Text: Ahh, I just thought that "Wildfire" had to show up one way or another. We can't let our friends feel like they're in this on their own.

-198754473.Text: Looks like we got here at the perfect time.

-198754467.Text: Yup! Seele and Natasha are our important companions.

-198754469.Text: Where did all these people pop out from...?

-198754462.Text: Though each and every one of you are able fighters, this many Bluecoats probably still poses as a problem.

1367329471.Text: Long time no see! miss me?

1367329470.Text: I never thought I'd need to save you twice!

-602038965.Text: 【临时】这条支离破碎的隧道…到底通向哪里呀？

-602038968.Text: 【临时】三月小妹，跟紧咯。万一踩空的话，你就要永远迷失在这裂隙里了啊，嘿嘿。

-602038967.Text: 【临时】三月小妹，跟紧咯。万一踩空的话，你就要永远迷失在这裂隙里了啊，嘿嘿。

-602039031.Text: 【临时】你们戴的那是…临时凭证？

-602039030.Text: 【临时】很久没有外人来过了，大家估计都挺好奇的。你们该干嘛干嘛，习惯了就好。

-602038602.Text: 【临时】抱歉，我在值岗，没空闲聊天。

-602038603.Text: 【临时】有什么事的话，去找指挥官汇报吧。

-602038569.Text: 【临时】你们不是来做检修的吗？怎么在这里到处乱晃？

-602038572.Text: 【临时】提高点效率，小心我去举报你们。

1266573053.Text: 【临时】听说城里最近在通缉闯入者，犯人来自贝洛伯格城外。

1266573052.Text: 【临时】真羡慕啊，这么刺激的差事…呆在这里简直就是浪费青春，唉。

1266573086.Text: 【临时】「机械热潮」又发新歌了，你听过了吗？

1266573083.Text: 【临时】当然听了，这次居然让佩拉做了主唱，吓了我一跳。风格跟之前完全不一样了。

1266573084.Text: 【临时】「机械热潮」也要转型了吗…唉，硬核摇滚果然没有受众了啊。

1266573081.Text: 【临时】别这么悲观，她们只是偶尔换个口味罢了。你要相信希露瓦大姐头。

1266572987.Text: 【临时】马利克下周也要调走了，你听说了吗？最近城里好像很缺人手。

1266572990.Text: 【临时】真的假的？再这么下去，迟早搞得人心惶惶。

1266572989.Text: 【临时】总感觉有什么大事要发生了，否则没理由弄得这么神神秘秘的。

1266572984.Text: 【临时】我可不想被调走，在这里舒舒服服地摸鱼多好……

1266572983.Text: 【临时】呵，要是被指挥官听见了，你肯定得吃不了兜着走。

1266573021.Text: 【临时】欸？但是这架无人机，看上去已经破烂得不行了……

1266573022.Text: 【临时】这算什么？看我给它来一记「妙手回春」！

1266573017.Text: 【临时】效、效率也太高了吧？不过这东西真的还能飞起来吗……

1266573018.Text: 【临时】你在质疑专家吗？看着吧！

1266572954.Text: 【临时】我知道你们之中有些混账，觉得在禁区值岗是个美差，可以每天游手好闲。

1266572951.Text: 【临时】我告诉你们，这种想法大错特错，愚蠢之极！

1266572952.Text: 【临时】我们把守的是共同体最重要的命门，要时刻准备好面对腹背受敌的攻势！

1266572957.Text: 【临时】不仅有地下跃跃欲试的恶魔，还有身后裂隙里虎视眈眈的怪物。

1266572958.Text: 【临时】等到大难临头的时候，现在放松警惕的家伙就是第一个被叼去塞牙缝的！

1266572955.Text: 【临时】所以，从今天开始，每天增加三百个俯卧撑，五百个仰卧起坐！

1266572855.Text: 【临时】那里…有个大块头的机甲。

1266572858.Text: 【临时】他们居然还在用这么老的机型，真是原地踏步……

1266572857.Text: 【临时】顺带一提，这类自走型武器的研发，我以前也参与过哦。

1266572860.Text: 【临时】要是被那家伙盯上了，可不是闹着玩的吧……

1266572889.Text: 【临时】这里可不是临时工能进去的地方，快回去！

1266573317.Text: 【临时】无数个日夜…我在矛盾和负罪中渡过。

1266573316.Text: 【临时】独自与这沉重的命运抗争。

1266573315.Text: 【临时】我的研究空洞而徒劳，他们的血泪在地底沉积。

1266573314.Text: 【临时】若星间的神明再次降下希望之种…若我能再次做出选择……

1266573313.Text: 【临时】我一定会许下正确的愿望。

1548897000.Text: How many times do I need to say it? This is the secret stronghold for "Wildfire"...

1548896999.Text: That may be true, but we haven't been here many times.

1548896994.Text: 【临时】希儿，娜塔莎！没想到你们动作这么快！

1548896995.Text: All we wanted to do was sneak into the "Restricted Zone" and spy on the enemy. I wasn't expecting for you guys to make such a commotion.

1548897006.Text: But it's thanks to you all that we don't need to search for the entrance to the "Corridor of Seals" anymore.

-17186943.Text: We've spent many nights searching for any records regarding the "Solar Furnace Core." We managed to find hidden clues in the database.

-17186944.Text: The entrance you found at the end of the "Restricted Zone" is the "Corridor of Seals" that will take you deep into the Fragmentum.

-17186941.Text: Hundreds of years ago, under Plamya... no, Alisa Rand's leadership, a vanguard party from Belobog explored the Fragmentum, created the "Corridor of Seals" and installed the "Furnace Core" there.

-17186942.Text: In the months to come, miners would harvest "Geomarrow" and bring it to the "Furnace Core" to be converted into energy.

-17186947.Text: Are there any records on how to maintain the "Furnace Core?"

-17186948.Text: There are only records up to a hundred years after the Union was established. After that, communications were completely cut off.

-17186945.Text: In the one hundred years that was recorded, there were no records of "Furnace Core" maintenance.

-17186935.Text: How did you guys get here?

-17186936.Text: The database revealed many long abandoned Fragmentum tunnels, probably left behind by people from Alisa Rand's era.

386097584.Text: Thanks to Seele, we were quickly able to find a few usable tunnels.

386097583.Text: We've spent sleepless nights clearing the troublesome obstacles and monsters!

386097585.Text: No need, {NICKNAME}. Truth be told, I didn't expect you guys to move so quickly.

386097579.Text: Yes, let's search for the "Solar Furnace Core" together.

386097582.Text: Great... We need powerful reliable allies like you guys.

386097581.Text: We each take what we need.

386097592.Text: That's true, but it hurts a little when you put it like that...

386097591.Text: Natasha, he's just trying to act cool!

-1179986358.Text: {NICKNAME} is searching for the "Solar Furnace Color" to find the unknown object called "Stellaron."

-1179986355.Text: What is "Wildfire" trying to accomplish by coming here?

-1179986356.Text: You must be the "friend" that Sampo mentioned?

-1179986361.Text: If that's the case, we have nothing to hide. Our goal is to take the "Solar Furnace Core"... and end the Union's suppression of the undergrounders.

-1179986362.Text: ... That manes, you will stand against Cocolia.

-1179986359.Text: We're prepared for the worst... like challenging the Union Consul.

-1179986360.Text: Sorry... Things have been happening too fast. I need time to think things over.

-1179986350.Text: You're in a tough position... I understand.

-420471470.Text: All I ever wanted to do was find answers and prove to her I was right.

-420471471.Text: Cocolia wasn't always like this... I won't believe she's lost all her compassion.

-420471468.Text: I want to convince her as an engineer, not as a soldier. What's more... My brother is in the Silvermane Guards. I know Gepard, and he's loyal to Cocolia.

-420471469.Text: So you were a friend to the Consul... I know what it's like to turn your back on your loved ones.

-420471474.Text: However, for everyone in the Underground and outsiders, time is of the essence. The Blueco... Silvermane Guards are already on high alert. We must act quickly.

-420471475.Text: I understand! Rock 'n' roll is all about fighting back! I've never met anyone else more zealous than you guys!

-420471472.Text: Although I cannot continue to help, I wish you all the very best.

-420471473.Text: Thank you for your help, Serval!

-420471462.Text: {NICKNAME}, take this opportunity to rest up.

-420471463.Text: When everyone is ready, we'll head to the "Corridor of Seals" together and finish this, once and for all.

1548896967.Text: Sorry, I wish I could come with you... but I probably won't be ready.

1548896968.Text: If things continue like this, it could lead to war... And I'm not ready to pick sides yet.

1548896965.Text: I hope you find your answers.

1548896966.Text: Thank you... The truth must be hidden away somewhere in this world. I must find it as soon as possible.

1548896963.Text: We should be the ones apologizing, for getting you involved in this.

1548896964.Text: Don't say that. I made my own decision after thinking it over.

1548896961.Text: After the "Energy Research Lab" was disbanded, I was at a loss.

1548896962.Text: That must have been under the orders of Cocolia. I know it better than anyone. Before that, we got into many arguments. Many people urged me to stop making a fool of myself, but I was too proud to listen.

1548896975.Text: In hindsight, I know now that Cocolia must have had her own problems. After all, she was already the Consul, bearing the responsibility of leading the Union. All I could think about was the research.

1548896976.Text: I don't know when it started, but she put her walls up and never confided in anyone around her.

-17186974.Text: Ah, I'm sorry to complain so much!

-17186976.Text: Maybe you two can return to being friends.

-17186975.Text: I haven't talked to her in a long time, but I know how she operates.

-17186978.Text: She will never compromise on anything that she believes is right.

-17186977.Text: So you must be careful. She will never underestimate her enemy.

-17186980.Text: There's also something else I must ask of you, {NICKNAME}.

-17186966.Text: Yes. That guy's had a one-track mind ever since he was a kid. He definitely won't betray the Consul who's promoted him many times.

-17186965.Text: If you guys encounter him, make sure to give him a good beating!

386097553.Text: But, make sure nothing happens to me... Or else you'll have me to deal with!

386097551.Text: Don't underestimate Gepard. He's a Landau, after all!

386097549.Text: Of course, he's a Landau, after all!

386097550.Text: When this is all over, come to my concert together.

386097547.Text: I'll save the best seats for you guys!

1548897063.Text: Rock 'n' roll, loud enough for all of Union to hear!

1548896769.Text: Yo! We meet again. That commotion just now was quite exciting!

1548896770.Text: 【临时】呵…果然太久没有战斗，就会禁不住犯困啊……

1548896771.Text: What do you think about the Union?

1548896772.Text: There's so much to see! You can see the "sky" when you look up! That feeling of shock... is indescribable!

1548896773.Text: If people how beautiful the "sky" was, they'd all be rushing to come up here.

1548896774.Text: And that uncontrollable shaking of the body and chattering of the teeth? It must be the "cold" that Sampo said?

1548896776.Text: Mr. Oleg is probably still preparing the armaments for "Wildfire"?

1548896777.Text: Hook... is the same old. She drags Clara onto adventures whenever she's well-rested, making Svaorg their bodyguard...

1548896778.Text: If the Union retaliates against the Underground...

-17187172.Text: Then I'll defeat the Bluecoats myself!

-17187171.Text: I'll defeat that Consul as well! If they dare try anything, I'll cut them all down!

-17187170.Text: 【临时】希望能争取到一个好结局。

-17187169.Text: Of course! We'll put an end to this together!

-17187168.Text: Oh right, how come I don't see Bronya? Where is she?

-17187166.Text: She's hard at work for us.

-17187164.Text: We promised to see the "stars" together. And now she's nowhere to be found! What's up with that?

-17187163.Text: Maybe the Consul took her? If that's the case, I have to save her!

1548896866.Text: Take the "Furnace Core," defeat the Consul, and find Bronya...

1548896835.Text: Yo, valued clients, Sampo saved you guys again!

1548896836.Text: Don't be so wasteful in the future. You can't achieve great things by chance.

1548896839.Text: No need to be so polite. You're one of my long-term investments.

1548896840.Text: *coughing* I mean I think highly of you!

1548896838.Text: Seal of Corridors... It sounds dangerous, so I'll probably pass.

1548896843.Text: I will certainly continue to watch from a distance, providing support from the shadows... What, you still don't trust me?

1548896844.Text: Will helping us really help you make money?

-17187106.Text: Hehe, but of course... For smart businessman, chaos and opportunities are the same thing.

-17187105.Text: If the Union were to really go to war with "Wildfire," my business would be booming...

-17187108.Text: ... Ah, no, of course I hope everything goes well for you, hahaha...

-17187107.Text: 【临时】这次你还能提供什么情报吗？

-17187102.Text: It's unfortunate, but I still have no information about "Furnace Core" and "Corridor of Seals"...

-17187101.Text: But I did hear something else that you might be interested in.

-17187104.Text: That Bronya woman, I heard she's been locked up. It would be bad if she was being held hostage, right?

-17187103.Text: Well, I guess you'll figure out what to do. With your intelligence, I'm sure you'll find a way to save her.

1548896931.Text: I put my life on the line, y'know! Don't die so easily!

1548897165.Text: Ready to return to the Restricted Zone?

1548897166.Text: If there are no accidents... this might be the last stop on our journey.

1548897162.Text: Good. Let's talk about our battle plan.

1548897163.Text: If there are no accidents, the "Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone" will have been sealed off by now. It'll be difficult to infiltrate by the same route.

1548897164.Text: Danheng is right, so we'll need reinforcements.

1548897158.Text: Oleg will lead the "Wildfire" to the Restricted Zone and draw the Silvermane Guards' attention.

-17186776.Text: While the Bluecoats are distracted, we'll charge into the "Corridor of Seals."

-17186775.Text: If that happens, Oleg and the others will be taking a big risk...

-17186780.Text: Don't underestimate our resolution. Those with Oleg are elites, the best that the Underground has to offer.

-17186778.Text: Those with Oleg are elites, the best that the Underground has to offer.

-17186777.Text: Don't worry about them. Focus on the troublesome task in front of us!

-17186784.Text: 【临时】希儿说的没错，我们的动作越快，奥列格他们需要牺牲的就越少。

-17186783.Text: Don't feel guilty. We undergrounders have been waiting for an opportunity like this for hundreds of years... And this is all thanks to you.

386097751.Text: If we successfully infiltrate the "Corridor of Seals," the next time is to locate the "Solar Furnace Core."

386097752.Text: It's unfortunate we were unable to find any detailed information on the "Corridor" structures.

386097753.Text: For the Union, it is clear that they want to keep all information strictly confidential. We will have to rely on ourselves to figure things out.

386097754.Text: What if there are Silvermane Guards in the "Corridor of Seals" too?

386097747.Text: There's a high concentration of Geomarrow near the entrance. There shouldn't be anyone who would dare be stationed in there.

386097748.Text: Not to mention the possibility of extremely dangerous Fragmentum monsters.

386097749.Text: Sampo, I must trouble you to lead the way for Oleg and the others.

386097744.Text: The first time we met, I could feel that there was something... different about you.

-1179986190.Text: Whatever else I want to say, I'll save it until after we're done. Let's go.

1548897262.Text: 【临时】居然连一个守门的人都没有…那些卫兵也太大意了吧？

1548897261.Text: 【临时】多亏了奥列格和「地火」的伙伴们，银鬃铁卫的注意力大概都转移到他们身上了。

1548897264.Text: 【临时】他们也不可能想到，我们会借着隐藏的裂隙通道直接来到禁区深处。

1548897263.Text: 【临时】看那里，传送门已经完全展开了。

1548897258.Text: 【临时】趁着蓝甲人还没觉察，我们快走！

-37389919.Text: Was I too naive to make that kind of promise?

-37389920.Text: Mother... why must you turn a blind eye to the truth...

-37389918.Text: Gepard, no need for pleasantries. I am but a prisoner now.

-37389923.Text: You're next in line for the Consul, Miss Bronya. Madam Consul has not given up on you.

-37389921.Text: In that case, as the future Consul, I order you to answer my question.

-37389922.Text: Everything the Union has done to the undergrounders. Was it all justified?

-37389911.Text: Don't mince words or sugarcoat it. You've led armies against the so-called "demons" and dealt with them. I want to know the answer in your heart.

1528694022.Text: Lady Bronya, have you heard of an animal called the ice falcon?

1528694021.Text: You mean the one that's already extinct? I saw a sample of it in the Belobog museum.

1528694024.Text: Correct. The ice falcon is a bird of prey that lives in extreme cold. Their excellent vision allows them to see snow mice poking their head out of the ground from hundreds of meters away.

1528694023.Text: However, prey is hard to find in the extreme environment. Thus, when an ice falcon discovered a prey, it doesn't attack immediately.

1528694018.Text: The ice falcon will hover in the air over their prey, waiting until several snow mice gather in the area. Then, they will pick off the oldest or most vulnerable of them.

1528694020.Text: The ice falcon picks its prey carefully to ensure the snow mice population remains stable. That way, there will also be an abundance of prey in its territory.

1528694019.Text: Since they can survive on very little food, they leave the most nutritious parts to their young in the nest until they can hunt for themselves.

1528694030.Text: Miss Bronya, do you think the ice falcon are vicious creatures?

1528694029.Text: No... They do it for survival.

-1200189333.Text: Correct. I believe that Madam Consul is the same. She must become the falcon to ensure everyone's survival.

-1200189334.Text: I am just a soldier, Miss Bronya. I cannot think the way you or Madam Consul think.

-1200189331.Text: If I have too many complicated thoughts in my mind, I lose the strength behind my fists.

-1200189332.Text: I can feel Madam Consul's efforts for the survival of the Union. Her wishes, her struggles, her... sorrow.

-1200189337.Text: Commoners will never be as strong as her. She bears the fate of the world on her shoulders and has to make decisions that no one else can.

-1200189338.Text: So, I will do what I can to become Madam Consul's fist and shield.

-1200189335.Text: I kinda... get what you're saying. Perhaps I'm not seeing the bigger picture.

-1200189336.Text: However, I want to make a change. I need to at least try, even if it's more than I can handle.

-1200189325.Text: Then grow strong enough to carry more than the weight of the world on your shoulders.

-1200189326.Text: Until that time comes, I will remain a bastion for Madam Cocolia. I will not waver in my duty.

365894607.Text: Let's go, Miss Bronya. Madam Consul is waiting for you at the "Furnace Core."

-37389949.Text: So this is the "Corridor of Seals?" It... isn't as scary as I've imagined.

-37389952.Text: You can't tell just by looking.

-37389951.Text: We don't have any clues, so we'll just have to explore on our own.

-37389954.Text: Oh right! Seele, Natasha, this is for you.

-37389956.Text: You place these "Radiation Resistant Skin Patch" onto your chest for effective protection against radiation.

-37389955.Text: A reliable old man from the express gave it to us.

-37389942.Text: Such a thing exists? I expect no less from you.

-37389853.Text: Hey, look up! What is that thing?

-37389854.Text: It seems like the energy is gathering to form some kind of barrier.

-37389855.Text: I wonder what's hidden behind it...

-37389858.Text: Hey, what's wrong? Don't scare me like that.

-37389860.Text: The echo of doom... A world falling apart...

-37389845.Text: The final salvation... Hidden in the Stellaron...

1528694087.Text: {NICKNAME}, are you okay? You don't look so good...

1528694085.Text: You heard her voice again? It seems we're getting closer to "Stellaron."

1528694084.Text: We were right. The sound in your dreams should be an echo caused by the "Stellaron."

1528694096.Text: That sounds like a long story, but we're in a hurry.

1528694095.Text: Let's figure out a way to deal with the barrier.

-37390148.Text: Watch out, there's an enemy ahead!

-37390146.Text: As we venture deeper into the Fragmentum, the Stellaron's contamination will worsen and distort space. It is natural that only powerful monsters could survive.

-37390145.Text: It'll be difficult to find a detour. Prepare for the fight.

-37390051.Text: We won! Hehe... After so many adventures, it feels like everyone's gotten better at it.

-37390052.Text: Hey, there's something behind the monster?

-37390082.Text: Madam Rand... Without a doubt, this is referring to Alisa Rand.

-37390081.Text: This letter has been lost in the Fragmentum for hundreds of years.

-37390084.Text: It must have taken a great deal of determination to explore the Fragmentum despite the risks.

-37390083.Text: It was a time when the world rallied around Alice Rand. Everyone believed her to be the world's savior and obeyed her unconditionally.

-37390078.Text: As for her, and what the previous Consul thought... I'm afraid nobody knows the truth?

-37390077.Text: Hmph, we don't need a savior.

-37390080.Text: You're right, Seele... Our fate is firmly within our grasp.

-37389985.Text: 【临时】这个大铁球一样的玩意，跟史瓦罗基地里的装置很像嘛？

-37389986.Text: 【临时】希露瓦说了，它的学名是「机关能源中枢」，是用来给禁区内的装置供能的。

-37389987.Text: 【临时】哎呀，希露瓦是怎么操作的，我全忘了……

-37389988.Text: 【临时】多少还有点印象，我来试试。

-37389982.Text: 【临时】当前炉心屏障充能强度——75%。

-37389984.Text: 【临时】百分之七十五…也就是说，我们还得关掉三个类似的装置，对吧？

-37389977.Text: 【临时】继续前进吧。看来必须切断所有生成屏障的能源，我们才能前往「炉心」。

-37389752.Text: Everyone from "Wildfire"... should be okay, right? I feel anxious just thinking about them.

-37389751.Text: Don't worry about them, March. "Wildfire" was created solely for this moment.

-37389750.Text: With Oleg leading them, they're probably safer than we are.

-37389655.Text: Hey, it's the same trestle as the one in the Restricted Zone!

-37389656.Text: Do we need to crack the "energy hub" again...

-37389653.Text: That device was invented by Serval. It wouldn't appear in the Fragmentum from hundreds of years ago.

1831221903.Text: That creature isn't moving at all, like it's guarding the machine next to it.

1831221904.Text: Let's defeat that creature, then look around for clues.

1831221996.Text: What? Didn't you just press the most obvious button? I could have done that too.

265138061.Text: You keep blacking out... What's up with you?

265138060.Text: After shutting off this device, the barrier strength will weaken, which means the barrier between {NICKNAME} and "Stellaron" is weaker.

265138054.Text: I still don't understand. Is "Stellaron" a person? How can it communicate with you through space？

265138057.Text: It's some kind of will that resides inside "Stellaron."

265138066.Text: There's too many mysteries surrounding "Stellaron" and he's too involved to give you any reasonable explanation.

-1300945882.Text: There's a couple more of these "Barrier Generator Device" around here. Let's shut them all off.

1831221969.Text: This door is locked so tightly that I'm afraid it won't open from this side.

1831221970.Text: Let's try our luck back at the trestle.

1831222066.Text: I found the second "Barrier Generator Device."

1831222065.Text: Be careful, let's take care of the surrounding monsters first.

1831221771.Text: Get ready, I'm shutting it off.

1831221772.Text: This time, the reaction will probably be more intense... Are you ready, {NICKNAME}?

1831221775.Text: The results of the calculations are irrefutable. This world cannot sustain the weight of humanity.

1831221776.Text: Someone must make a sacrifice... Someone must bear the sins of "choice"...

1831221777.Text: To preserve civilization as we know it, the innocent will lament and cry out...

1831221778.Text: Until the nameless god drops the seed again...

1831221779.Text: Yo, you're finally awake! It was much worse this time.

265137830.Text: It proves we're close to the "Furnace Core."

265137832.Text: The "Furnace Core" will soon reveal itself.

1831221868.Text: Look there, it's another generator device!

1831221867.Text: The barrier energy is already very low. This might be the last one. Let's go!

1831221837.Text: We don't know what will happen when we turn off this device. Prepare yourself.

1831221838.Text: Don't be nervous, {NICKNAME}. Don't forget, I'm a doctor.

1831221835.Text: Get ready... I'm pressing the button.

1831221836.Text: Hey! Don't pass out over here, hey-

1831221934.Text: The host of the "seed"... Footsteps draw closer...

1831221933.Text: Nearly a thousand years of struggle, this world... finally sees a light at the end of the tunnel.

1831221932.Text: Find it and his messenger. Retrieve the "seed" from him.

1831221931.Text: Then... Wish for this world to be saved...

1831222167.Text: You're finally up. Are you okay?

1831222169.Text: This time it was really strong...

1831222170.Text: Thankfully, we can finally see the entire "Solar Furnace Core."

1831222163.Text: It's spectacular... It's hard to believe that they built something so magnificent hundreds of years ago.

1831222164.Text: For this world, civilization has been going backwards these hundreds of years.

1831222165.Text: Civilizations grew smaller and people's view of the world grew narrower.

1831222166.Text: It took everything they had just to survive.

1831222159.Text: Hmph, that will change soon. Once we're done here, we'll finally be free.

1831222160.Text: 【临时】不管等在前面的是什么，就算是再明显不过的陷阱，也得硬着头皮往里跳了。

265138226.Text: Seele is right. We cannot back down now.

265138227.Text: {NICKNAME}, let's reveal the final secret of the Union.

265138229.Text: There will be a happy ending.

1831222264.Text: It's activated! Danheng, did you to do that?

1831222263.Text: Everyone be on high alert, because I don't know what will happen.

1831222265.Text: Hmph, I'll cut down whatever monsters jump out at us!

1831222262.Text: ... I find it hard to believe as well.

1831222261.Text: It feels like everything's going too well.

1831222256.Text: Even if it's a trap, we'll have to deal with it, right?

1831222255.Text: Now that it's come to this... We'll be able to handle whatever comes at us!

265138323.Text: Seele is right. We cannot back down now.

265138322.Text: {NICKNAME}, let's reveal the final secret of the Union.

265138324.Text: There will be a happy ending.

244934982.Text: We meet again, outsiders... And your friends from the Underground.

244934984.Text: Enough with the chitchat, bring it on!

244934985.Text: Wait, Seele! Gepard, he's... not a bad guy.

244934994.Text: I've heard about what my sister has done from the others. She's always been a mess, which is why she was kicked from the army.

244934995.Text: Serval only wanted to help us, so...

1811018927.Text: The first time we met in the Snow Plains, I had an indescribable feeling that you guys would cause quite the commotion.

1811018928.Text: I never expected for it to end up like this... And for that, I must take responsibility.

1811018929.Text: Your dangerous behavior will cease now.

1811018930.Text: Must we rely on battles to solve the problem...

1811018923.Text: March, words won't get through to him. I recognize that look. We all have our reasons for fighting.

1811018925.Text: Hmph, what perfect timing - I haven't had enough yet!

1811018926.Text: If you wish to pass through here, you will need to defeat the iron bastion that protects the Union.

244935083.Text: No matter thick your bastion, I will rip you to pieces!

244935082.Text: Show me how strong undergrounders are!

244935085.Text: Stop resisting, Gepard! You cannot with by yourself!

244935084.Text: I am the descendant of the Landau family, fist and bastion for the Consul.

244935081.Text: He's exhausted his stamina... Finish him!

244935080.Text: Don't get carried away... I'm not defeated yet!

244935050.Text: Bluecoat, lemme ask you... Where's Bronya?

244935048.Text: Cut the crap, Bronya is my friend! I will save her!

244935046.Text: I see... This was the future she saw...

244935060.Text: What you're looking for... All the secrets... lies ahead.

1811018994.Text: Quick, March. Give me another patch-

1811018991.Text: The long expose to intense radiation has exhausted his body.

1811018992.Text: It took sheer willpower to make it this far.

1811018989.Text: Now what? We can't just leave him in the Fragmentum...

1811018990.Text: I'll stay here and take care of him. You guys continue forward.

1811018988.Text: Don't worry about me, Seele... I'm afraid I would only be a burden if you fight against the Consul.

1811019001.Text: March, Danheng, and you... i believe in everyone. I will wait for the good news.

1811019002.Text: Go - the heart of the Union is just ahead.

244935149.Text: 【临时】刚才我们是不是路过了一个「能源中枢」？

244935148.Text: 【临时】还是先仔细调查一下再继续前进吧。

244935147.Text: 【临时】喂，你想干啥？这周围可都是怪物啊！

244935146.Text: 【临时】先把它们清理干净再说！

244935145.Text: 【临时】感谢您参与《崩坏：星穹铁道》第一次内部测试。

244935144.Text: 【临时】试玩版的主线游戏流程至此结束，一切内容请以游戏正式上线版本为准。

244935143.Text: 【临时】期待在未来与您共赴「开拓」的邀约，重启穿越星穹的旅程。

244934854.Text: C-Crap! I forgot Gepard said he was coming today!

244934855.Text: You guys, find a place to hide - I'll deal with him!

244934856.Text: G-Gepard! You're here! You got off work much earlier than I expected, haha...

244934857.Text: I'm not off work yet... What is it, sister? You look... nervous.

244934858.Text: I-It's nothing. Why do you say that?

244934859.Text: It's not often you call me by my full name.

244934860.Text: Oh, it's only because you're working so much that we are estranged? Stop overthinking it!

244934861.Text: C'mon, out with it! To what do I owe the pleasure of a visit from the great Captain Gepard?

244934863.Text: *sigh* There's something wrong with the "bastion" and the engineers in our unit don't know how to fix it. I need you to take a look.

1811018795.Text: Of course, those idiots wouldn't understand my design.

1811018796.Text: I thought it was something big. Just put it over there. I'll take a look for you.

1811018798.Text: Why are you being so polite? Anyways, the city's been under a curfew lately. What's going on?

1811018799.Text: Uh... I don't know if I should say...

1811018800.Text: Lil' Gege... So grown up now... Looking down on her civilian sister *sobs*...

1811018801.Text: Don't do that... *sigh* Forget it, Pela will tell you anyways...

1811018802.Text: Some time ago, Miss Bronya suddenly came back. She appeared alone outside the gates of the Consul residence, without saying anything to anyone.

1811018803.Text: Madam Consul believes those "outsiders" might have returned to the surface and put the city on high alert.

1811018804.Text: ... Is that so? That's rough on the soldiers.

1407734268.Text: It is my duty as the Captain. By the way, I left my "Goethe Hotel" limited-edition water bottle here last time. Let me look for it.

1407734270.Text: What is it? You seem a bit off today...

1407734271.Text: Um... Right! Weren't you taking care of flowers from before? When I was cleaning the house, I put them all over there and now it's stinking up the place! So don't go over there!

1407734272.Text: ... Putting aside how unbelievable that sounds, did you really clean up the house?

1407734273.Text: Sis, did you bring home some strange man...

1407734274.Text: O-Of course not! What do you take your sister for?

1407734275.Text: *sigh* Forget it, I shouldn't poke into your personal life.

1407734276.Text: That's more like it. And I'll help you look for that water bottle. Take it with you next time.

1407734277.Text: Okay then, I've got to return to my shift.

-1321149087.Text: Sure, next time remember to come hear Pela and I rehearse.

-1321149085.Text: It's safe! You guys can come out now.

244934953.Text: Do you know... the trouble you're in?

244934952.Text: I'm very sorry, Mother. My negligence has caused unnecessary confusion.

244934955.Text: But this trip to the Underground was not for nothing. Please let me report my findings.

244934957.Text: Firstly, the undergrounders are not devils, but people like us.

244934956.Text: They also suffer from sickness, work hard, and fight for the truth.

244934958.Text: Secondly, the "outsiders" are not evil, nor are they the embodiment of "destruction."

1811018892.Text: They are astral travelers, sent here to investigate an unknown object known as "Stellaron."

1811018894.Text: Thirdly, I've explored the deepest parts of the Underground to uncover the historical truth that has been buried for so long.

1811018893.Text: Therefore, I would be confident in saying that... the sufferings of the undergrounders may not be the result of a just trial...

1811018896.Text: Perhaps with a collaborative effort, the Union and Underground could...

1811018897.Text: As the next in line for the Consul and heir to Plamya's will... Do you remember the three sins from the "Admonishments?"

1407734365.Text: The first is the sin of disobedience. Do not disobey your parents.

1407734364.Text: The second is the sin of ignorance. Do not be seduced by malice because of superficiality and ignorance.

1407734367.Text: The third is the sin of arrogance. Do not ponder upon the divine doctrine and will with peasantry and shortsightedness.

1407734369.Text: Disobedience - Many accidents resulted in events beyond your control. Forgivable.

1407734368.Text: Ignorance - You are young and naive, so it's easy to be influenced and used by dishonest people. Forgivable.

1407734371.Text: What's unforgivable is... you committed the "sin of arrogance."

1407734370.Text: Nearly a thousand years ago, the sage Plamya left her last legacy, "Solar Furnace Core." The Consuls have inherited her will for countless generations, ensuring the Union walls have stood for a thousand years...

1407734373.Text: And you... question our mission, with such shallow knowledge.

1407734372.Text: But, Madam Consul, I have witnessed everything with my eyes! I know-

-1321148990.Text: Silence! You think I know nothing of history?

-1321148991.Text: You carry out the will of Plamya, even knowing the truth... Mother?

-1321148988.Text: Countless innocent people must make sacrifices so that our lives are better?

-1321148989.Text: Your shallowness and impulsiveness disappoint me, Bronya.

-1321148986.Text: It pains me greatly to say, but... choosing you as my successor was the biggest mistake of my life.

-1321148987.Text: If sitting in that position means to turn a blind eye, then I am the one who is disappointed.

-1321148984.Text: Guards! Lock Bronya up in the dungeon below.

-1321148985.Text: She will reflect on her actions there alone.

1464413675.Text: 【临时】你们来得正好，我听说有铁卫在雪原上目击到了冰原狼的活动，这可是件大事啊！

1464413676.Text: 【临时】可是行政厅的外出审核太麻烦了，再加上《远行者》那边要截稿了，我实在抽不开身。

1464413677.Text: 【临时】你们好像很有手段的样子…所以，帮我在雪原上找找野生动物留下的痕迹吧。皮毛、脚印，甚至粪便都可以，拜托啦！

1464413670.Text: 【临时】雪原上留下了和狗相近的脚印，一直向前，几乎没有改变方向或者步伐。数量上应该是两到三只。

1464413671.Text: 【临时】雪地上留下了白色的鬃毛，在附近的树丛里还发现了咬痕。

1464413672.Text: 【临时】…是粪便。乍一看，其中包含了动物毛发、骨头碎片、以及果实残块。是杂食动物。

1464413673.Text: 【临时】这些的确是冰原狼活动过的证据，太棒了！有了这些线索，说不定很快就能追踪到共同体附近的野狼族群了。

1464413682.Text: 【临时】辛苦你们了，请收下这些报酬。要是旅行途中发现了任何珍稀动物，一定记得转告我哦。

1464411658.Text: 【临时】旅行者，这里需要你的帮助。

1464411661.Text: 【临时】里面的区域被大量的怪物占领，请帮忙清除。

1464411724.Text: 【临时】啊，我亲爱的孩子们。我听老朋友说起，你们找到了来自过去的歌德老宅，这些神奇造化，一定都是圣贤的安排。

1464411723.Text: 【临时】教会曾在无端恶火中失去了藏书室，那些无比珍贵的孤本典籍，都是先贤智慧的结晶。既然老宅已经再次显现，那就代表那些典籍一定也重新降世了。

1464411722.Text: 【临时】孩子，为了让共同体教会能够再次沐浴旧日的光辉，帮我找到那些典籍吧！圣贤会奖赏你们的修为的！

1464411721.Text: 【临时】尽可能地找到了教会相关的典籍，它们是真的复制了过去吗？还是说，这只是破碎的残象而已。

1464411720.Text: 【临时】啊，我亲爱的孩子们，你们做得好啊！

1464411719.Text: 【临时】你看看，这斑驳的纸页是岁月留下的痕迹，这厚重的书脊是圣贤意志的化身。有了这些珍贵的典籍，光芒必将重新映照共同体！

1464411718.Text: 【临时】拿上你们应得的报酬吧，亲爱的孩子们。这是普拉米亚对你们的奖赏！

1464409414.Text: 【临时】啊，外来者，是你们啊。来的正好，我有个差事想拜托你们，事成之后必有重谢。

1464409417.Text: 【临时】实不相瞒，我想让你们到恶魔之胃里搜集一些古代遗物。

1464409419.Text: 【临时】我记得你不再鉴定古代遗物了。

1464409418.Text: 【临时】谁说要鉴定了？我只是让你去找，没说别的——你可别到处胡说八道啊！巴列维：大致的地点我已经标出来了。拿到之后直接回我这儿来，别告诉任何人！

1464409421.Text: 【临时】大致的地点我已经标出来了。拿到之后直接回我这儿来，别告诉任何人！

1464409420.Text: 【临时】按照巴列维的指示果然找到了古代遗物，他甚至没有来过这里，他是怎么知道的呢？

1464409423.Text: 【临时】好家伙，手脚够利索啊。东西给我，钱你拿走。

-1264473940.Text: 【临时】我懂我懂，你想问的是，我怎么知道恶魔之胃里藏着好东西，是吧？

-1264473941.Text: 【临时】那我就直说了，这都是客人透露给我的。我只是用了点小手段，撬开了他们的嘴巴…嘿嘿。

-1264473938.Text: 【临时】哎哟，我跟你说这么多干嘛？行了行了，任务结了，报酬也领了——要是没有别的事，各位就请回吧！

1457298310.Text: Hmm? Is there anything worth checking out?

1457298312.Text: Oh ya, right, I almost forgot. Well, it was nothing big at all...

1457298315.Text: Cut the crap, just say it.

1457298317.Text: Right, I'll say it! Don't be mad, calm down... Here's the thing, I realized that I've never had something that I truly wanted all this time. So I hope you could help me.

1457298316.Text: This thing is called a Friend. Yes, me, Wallace Cambridge Limestein, never ever had a true friend in my life.

1457298319.Text: I would pay anything to get a friend.

-1271585044.Text: You're right about that, things could be bought.

-1271585045.Text: Money can't buy a genuine friend.

-1271585042.Text: What about adding more money to get genuineness as well?

-1271585043.Text: If you can help me get a friend, I'll pay you loads. The more friends the better.

-1271585040.Text: But don't make it public. I'm a well-known character out there... I don't want any news about me in the city!

-1271585041.Text: Hmm? Is there anything worth checking out?

-1271585039.Text: You're the friend I've been dreaming for?

-1271585036.Text: Weird... I feel nothing. I thought I'd be so satisfied and happy...

-1271585037.Text: Just kidding. We aren't friends yet.

-1674869571.Text: I see, I guess I'll have to find friends from my acquaintances.

-1674869572.Text: It is said that true friendship is as plain as water...

-1674869569.Text: Well, we just met each other. I guess I'll have to find a friend from my acquaintances.

-1674869570.Text: Hmm? Is there anything worth checking out?

-1674869568.Text: Well, speaking of which, I do have a good candidate in mind...

-1674869565.Text: A zoologist named Lila is very knowledgeable, and she knows about all sorts of novel stuff. I think we would get along well. Would you mind asking for me if she's willing to be my friend?

-1674869566.Text: A public servant named Manya has a pretty good family background, our families have some connections as well. Would you mind asking for me if she's willing to be my friend?

-1674869563.Text: A reporter named Agnes wanders around in the district every day, she seems to be an interesting person. Would you mind asking for me if she's willing to be my friend?

-1674869564.Text: A real estate agent named Lavonne had a few deals with me. We match pretty well in terms of social status. Would you mind asking for me if she's willing to be my friend?

-108785630.Text: A girl named Nikolai accosted me the other day and asked me to write a letter for her. Is she interested in me? Would you mind asking for me if she's willing to be my friend?

-108785631.Text: Tell me if you've found any rare animals.

-108785628.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

-108785626.Text: He is said to be the richest man in the district.

-108785627.Text: The one who likes to pretend to be poor

-108785624.Text: You can't be talking about that Wallace? What a coincidence, he's my sponsor... Wait, he wants to be friends with me? I thought he was interested in biology!

-108785625.Text: Eh, to be honest, the least thing we want is to come into a weird relationship with our sponsors... I'll pretend that I didn't hear it. Please just tell him that you didn't find me!

-108785623.Text: I hope you two could still be friends one day

-512070157.Text: Tell me if you've found any rare animals.

-512070158.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

-512070155.Text: But he's my sponsor... Gosh, why do I always get into troubles like this! My plan to get out of the city would be ruined if this is not handled well enough...

-512070156.Text: Why would he want to be friends with me? We haven't talked much at all... Which part of me is attractive to him? I'll fix it!

-512070151.Text: He thinks you two would get along well.

-512070149.Text: No, no. I can't do it. He's so weird!

-512070150.Text: Tell me if you've found any rare animals.

1054013784.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

1054013785.Text: This is ridiculous. He doesn't care about what others think at all! I'll never be friends with people like him!

1054013787.Text: I refuse to! I hate those who mix up personal relations with academic works the most!

1054013789.Text: Thanks. But I'm really not in the mood to think about it...

1054013792.Text: You're here again? I told you I was busy, like very busy. The public needs to be served in so many ways...

1054013791.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

650729257.Text: Thanks. I appreciate his recognition, but I have works... Who? Wallace? Wallace Limestein?

650729256.Text: Interesting, I didn't expect to know someone from the Limesteins...

650729259.Text: I'll take it as a yes?

650729258.Text: No, wait, calm down Manya! You gotta be careful! The Limesteins are rich but they are new money with no aristocratic background...

650729261.Text: Wallace is 32 years plus 2 months old this year, he has no official job and he is said to be a bludger. The Limestein family doesn't appear to like him much either...

650729263.Text: ... In the short run, I seem to have the chance to get into the upper-class! But the Limesteins have so many enemies and lack foundation in the political circle. If ever they lose their influence, or if ever Wallace is discarded by his family...

650729262.Text: Jesus, then my career would be ruined!

650729264.Text: You two actually match pretty well together.

-2078154098.Text: Goodbye, my citizen. I appreciate your kind message. But sorry, I've got so much work to do, so I can't reply!

-2078154099.Text: You're here again? I told you I was busy, like very busy. The public needs to be served in so many ways...

-2078154096.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

-2078154097.Text: My information seems valid, as expected. It is a trap for sure. A Limestein playboy has no reason to persist in an officer like me, I wonder what kind of shady political force is operating behind this...

-2078154095.Text: He just wants to make friends.

-2078154092.Text: He's really desperate in making friends.

-2078154093.Text: Haha, you're way too young and naive. This world is not as easy as you think, everything here is pushed by the authority and the capitals... Anyway, I choose to preserve my moral integrity.

-2078154090.Text: It took me so long to be where I am now, I can't make any mistake!

-2078154091.Text: You're here again? I told you I was busy, like very busy. The public needs to be served in so many ways...

1813528671.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

1813528670.Text: I am a honorable public servant, my life needs no friends but citizens that need to be served! Goodbye now!

1813528673.Text: As time goes by, the rich salmon flavor dilutes and invades the Redsunset meat slice. When the ingredients and the seasoning fuse well together, there's no point to name a dish solely based on its ingredients anymore...

1813528672.Text: What am I doing, I really have to stop thinking...

1813528675.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

1813528676.Text: Is he the owner of some restaurants?

-915354684.Text: If he loves gourmet then I'm willing to communicate with him! Or else, no. I'll have to make up... I mean, write my next column now!

-915354685.Text: As time goes by, the rich salmon flavor dilutes and invades the Redsunset meat slice. When the ingredients and the seasoning fuse well together, there's no point to name a dish solely based on its ingredients anymore...

-915354682.Text: What am I doing, I really have to stop thinking...

-915354683.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

-915354680.Text: This dude again? Who is he exactly?

-915354681.Text: He's the son of the Limesteins.

-915354678.Text: He's a poor dude with no friends.

-915354679.Text: He has nothing apart from money.

-915354676.Text: Sounds like a person from a different world. Tell him to find someone else.

-915354677.Text: You're back! A nice livable suburb property is on offer now. Interested in checking out?

1457298280.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

1457298284.Text: He's my client. We only talk about business with clients, not about friendship.

1457298282.Text: Why would I hate Wallace? I like him. The thing is, you can only make money from a friend once. But from a client, as much as you want.

1457298283.Text: You're back! A nice livable suburb property is on offer now. Interested in checking out?

1457298288.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

1457298289.Text: This guy is persistent. I see... he's not stupid, he wants to get something from me...

-1271585075.Text: But still no. To be honest, I like Wallace, but I can't lose a big client just for friendship.

-1271585077.Text: Sure yes, some merchants sell friends well for money. But I'm not that kind of businesswoman, I have my principles.

-1271585076.Text: You're back! A nice livable suburb property is on offer now. Interested in checking out?

-1271585071.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

-1271585070.Text: *sigh* Do you know what kind of deals he made with me? Last month he lost a bet with Lord Simon, so he asked me to handle 2 mansions which made me the money for half a year.

-1271585073.Text: You think I can make this much money again if I become a friend of a rich dude like him? That would be against humanity!

-1271585072.Text: Can't you separate work from life?

-1271585067.Text: For as long as you live, no. Emotions make you lose reasons. Most people can't even tell them apart.

-1271585066.Text: I don't think it's any better now...

-1674869602.Text: At least I'm worthy of my own now. I don't care what others think.

-1674869603.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

-1674869600.Text: That covers over half of the population here in the district. Everyone here is rich.

-1674869599.Text: The one you asked to help with your letter.

-1674869594.Text: Haha, I ask everyone to help me for that.

-1674869593.Text: I'm actually quite busy right now, sorry. If that Wallace has anything else to say, tell him to come over by himself.

-108785660.Text: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

-108785663.Text: Oh, now I know who that dude is. But we haven't talked much before.

-108785662.Text: You asked him to help with a letter.

-108785657.Text: Al...right. But I didn't mean anything, and I didn't want to know him either. Sorry.

-108785659.Text: Accost? The Union should make a law about the difference between a nice and police communication and accost.

-108785658.Text: Anyway, I didn't mean it, and I don't want to know him, sorry about that.

-108785652.Text: I can tell. Well, how else can we deliver messages to someone properly? The more I come across these things, the more I realize how pale writings can be.

-512070188.Text: Let's focus on cultivating good writers instead.

-128987384.Text: 【临时】年轻人，以前没见过你啊。

-128987386.Text: 【临时】呵呵，人呐，一辈子总得来趟行政区，要不怎么好自称是共同体人呢？你还是挺幸运的，不像我，出生在这儿，都麻木了。

-128987388.Text: 【临时】呵呵，你真幽默，行政区本地每家人我都熟悉，可从没见过你。哎～人人都爱往行政区跑，可我们这些本地人啊，都住腻咯。

-128987390.Text: 【临时】你「没见过」我？没见过我华劳斯？呵呵，那你一定不是本地人。

-128987377.Text: 【临时】还没介绍，我是华莱士•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，行政区的朋友都管我叫华劳斯——算是个爱称吧。

-1695071325.Text: 【临时】咱们这就算认识了，以后行政区这儿啊你要找什么人办什么事，尽管问我，反正闲着也是闲着。

-1695071328.Text: 【临时】对了，你要是有什么好玩的也可以找我一起研究探讨。玩呗，要是有我看上眼的，多少钱都不是问题，就图一新鲜。

-1695071330.Text: 【临时】嗨，我哪有什么钱，也就将将够用。行政区这儿有几套房子，都得打理，交税，你说租出去吧？又懒得费这个心思，时间也是钱啊。再说里面都是价值连城的古董……

-1695071332.Text: 【临时】算不上，我就喜欢折腾——比如前阵子西蒙勋爵跟我说，他弄到了一种叫金表的东西，据说在古代非常值钱，我一听就说那我必须拥有，你要几套宅子，三套够不……

-1695071318.Text: 【临时】有什么好东西，记得找我~

-128987483.Text: 【临时】咦？各位的长相…有点与众不同啊。

-128987486.Text: 【临时】唔…你嘛，除了毛发灰白以外，似乎就是正常的人类。

-128987487.Text: 【临时】这位黑头发，高个子的…哎呀，看上去有很高的智力呢。

-128987484.Text: 【临时】这个粉毛的小矮子…好像有点发育不良。

-128987474.Text: 【临时】抱歉，我是莉拉，《远行者》月刊的撰稿人，也是共同体的动物学专家。

-128987475.Text: 【临时】…不过，贝洛伯格的生态圈里已经没什么动物了，现在只能研究各种各样的人类——你知道吗？贝洛伯格的人种至少有三个不同的起源……

-1695071423.Text: 【临时】唔？三位看起来好像…不属于其中任何一种……

-1695071427.Text: 【临时】哈哈，我想，我一定是研究到脑子不正常了…唉，自从得到那本书后，我就经常胡思乱想。

-1695071425.Text: 【临时】就是这本《穴居生物生态》，据说是某个银鬃铁卫从地底带回来的。里面写了好多奇珍异兽：结晶宝石蜥蜴呀、食髓洞螈呀、葬礼虫呀什么的……

-1695071426.Text: 【临时】地下真的有这么多生物吗？…真令人神往呀。

-1291786897.Text: 【临时】毕竟起名字的人…呃，并不是专业的动物学家。

-1291786895.Text: 【临时】也不一定啊，比如书里提到一种岩居蟹，体型可大了，听说是从海岸线迁徙过来的呢。

-1291786900.Text: 【临时】唉，有生之年要是能见到…不，确定它们真的存在就好了。

-1291786901.Text: 【临时】如果见到了，我会告诉你的。

-1291786898.Text: 【临时】哈哈，那可能要到地底去才能见得着呢。我已经委托银鬃铁卫留意了，不过，还是谢谢你的好意，没准会发生奇迹！

-128987450.Text: 【临时】抱歉抱歉，我很忙。有事请预约，好吗？如果你预约了——呃，现在是休息时间，请一个小时后再来……

-128987448.Text: 【临时】那当然，我们政务官员永远都在忙，总有那么多事情要思考…请不要打扰我的工作，谢谢。

-128987454.Text: 【临时】都说了，现在是休息时间…好吧，既然你执意要问——

-128987453.Text: 【临时】正常来说，出城许可只会授予共同体编制内的银鬃铁卫。平民想要获得出城许可，需要经过身份审核、体检、精神健康检查、以及出城动机问询等流程。

-128987452.Text: 【临时】具体细节，请至市政厅四楼的SF217号窗口咨询。我个人在此提醒各位：非官方事务的出城理由向来是不予通过的。

-128987442.Text: 【临时】问得好！我的工作可能有点琐碎，但却是共同体正常运转中不可或缺的重要环节！可以说，我是这座城市的无名英雄…我负责行政区街道和社区事务，倾听来自基层民众的请求，解决基础性的难题……

-1695071392.Text: 【临时】那你可以听听我们这些基层民众的请求吗？

-1695071391.Text: 【临时】当然没问题！不过，刚刚我说的还不够严谨：每天上午9点到中午12点，下午2点到5点，我在这段时间内负责行政区街道和社区事务。作为政务官员，一定要公私分明。

-1695071389.Text: 【临时】在市政厅二楼236号柜台填写申请表格。然后去市政厅三楼P35号窗口盖章。

-1695071395.Text: 【临时】当然不麻烦，这是流程，还没完呢：盖章之后，去市政厅一楼的155号窗口排队领预约证明，最好预约一个月以后。因为这个月里还有很多手续，比如要先去五楼……

-1695071394.Text: 【临时】算了算了！我们还是不约了……

-1695071384.Text: 【临时】不客气，为每位市民服务是我们的职责。好了，现在请给我一点私人空间……

-128987285.Text: 【临时】这个甜味，有点像是煦日节之后，冻河初开，从冰块的缝隙中挤出的第一滴水，凛冽之中又裹挟着一丝温暖……

-128987286.Text: 【临时】你觉得怎样，会让你食欲大振吗？

-128987280.Text: 【临时】对呀，这儿还有别人吗？抱歉，我这人有点自来熟……

-128987283.Text: 【临时】唉，也不能怪你，是我的描述还不够吸引人——可恶，要是不能用文字构筑味觉，形成通感，记者还有什么存在的价值！？我要好好反思…对了，你听这段：

-128987292.Text: 【临时】喧宾夺主的浓油赤酱，就像大军入侵一般，将鲑鱼本来的清爽味道完全淹没，那一丝气息微薄的鱼本味，只能高举降旗败下阵来……

-128987293.Text: 【临时】感觉如何？是不是有点累赘？

-1695071227.Text: 【临时】是啊，职业病。我以前是文学记者，每天就是变着法地往句子里塞形容词，要是读者能在三行内弄清楚主谓宾，主编就要扣我奖金。

-1695071228.Text: 【临时】后来我就转行了，因为来了个新人，比我还会凑字数…哎，你看过《水晶日报》的美食专栏吗，作者艾格尼斯就是我。

-1695071221.Text: 【临时】说实话，我也不想闭着眼睛搞这些虚头巴脑的东西…

-1695071223.Text: 【临时】不行啊，报社有要求，主编有规定：首先字数得给够，这玩意有指标的，我们按字算工资……

-1695071224.Text: 【临时】其次，我们主编的硬性标准就是：高端大气！最好让读者一看就觉得自己没作者懂得多，心里油然而生一股子敬佩之情。

-1695071233.Text: 【临时】那个新人编辑就特别擅长这一手，她有门绝活，就是把一句话翻来覆去地写，洋洋洒洒几百行，本质上就十个字。

-1291786698.Text: 【临时】十个字能说清楚的事，谁又想写几千字呢？不过，从专业的角度来看，这也是一门谋生技术，所以把位置让给尼古莱，我也心悦诚服……

-1291786699.Text: 【临时】不过——我写不来啊！鄙人真的做不到啊！

-1291786701.Text: 【临时】一万字的采访稿，被我生生地写成了四万字，这已经是极限了……

-1291786694.Text: 【临时】想想人类迄今为止的写作技巧都被用来堆砌字数，实在是悲哀啊。

-1291786696.Text: 【临时】哎，好说。你有空看看我的美食专栏，提点意见…

-128987252.Text: 【临时】宜居城郊板块，水电暖供应充足，精装修拎包入住，天赐良机，机不可失！这么好的机会，我都恨不得给自己来一套！喂，你！你还在等什么。

-128987254.Text: 【临时】还有什么可说的？一桩大便宜就在你的眼前！我有内部消息，懂吗？我在执政厅里有人，这批房子价格在两年内稳涨不跌。

-128987249.Text: 【临时】10%…不，13%！而且实话跟你说吧，这完全是保守估计。

-128987248.Text: 【临时】实际涨幅至少是这个数，明白了吧，你不要被吓到啦。我其实是故意往低了说，不能让太多人知道内幕消息，毕竟——

-128987250.Text: 【临时】你不需要买房子，我理解。但是你想过吗，从投资的角度来看，这可不仅是一座房子，它是不动产！

-128987261.Text: 【临时】我要是你，我就趁这个机会买进，等它价格涨上去了，再出手卖掉，大赚一笔！

-128987260.Text: 【临时】而且，我向你承诺，你只要投资了，不管有没有人接手，你只要打算卖，我就会按涨幅13%的价格给你挂牌——

-1695071194.Text: 【临时】我可是本地最大的中介商！没有我卖不掉的房子。总之，你先看看这张广告。

-1695071196.Text: 【临时】真的吗？我以为你是个目光长远的人呢。难道你只看眼前吗，瞧！看哪，那是拔地而起的高楼！我甚至都看到你乔迁新居的场景啦。

-1695071195.Text: 【临时】人们会在那里社交、购物、娱乐，它会成为贝洛伯格新的地标。而你呢？你是个聪明的投资者，低价购买了一块区域，高价卖出赚了第一桶金。

-1695071190.Text: 【临时】现在你再看看，那还是一块雪地吗？它是雪地，又不完全是雪地。

-1695071192.Text: 【临时】说话注意点，我是拉雯妮——行政区谁不认识我？只有蠢材才会分不清机遇和骗局，你不傻，对吧？

-1695071191.Text: 【临时】执政官的新政听说过没有，你去打听打听，那不会有假的，白纸黑字清清楚楚。

-1695071202.Text: 【临时】要是你觉得自己上当了，就看看我。我自己都买了两套！我还能骗我自己吗？

-1291786666.Text: 【临时】我知道你在顾虑什么，我就明说吧，看上这个项目的人很有很多，钱已经投进去不少了。

-1291786669.Text: 【临时】你要想吃个基本的回扣，早投早退出，那些钱也都是能确保的。甚至不需要楼盘涨价，你就能收回，但那时亏的就是你了！

-1291786662.Text: 【临时】你很谨慎，可是过分谨慎就会错过良机。我的消息靠谱吗？当然靠谱！新任的执政官布洛妮娅大人，你知道她前阵子去哪了吗？

-1291786675.Text: 【临时】布洛妮娅大人跟我们去看了即将扩建的郊区，亲自给我们下达了建设意见！

-1291786674.Text: 【临时】你以为只是买房，实际是投资了共同体的大项目！你看看，这消息靠不靠谱？

1437096686.Text: 【临时】机不可失，别让我等太久。

1437096692.Text: 【临时】可惜了，你真的不懂得把握机会。

892649367.Text: 【临时】我能问你几个问题吗？——文学方面的。

892649372.Text: 【临时】就是一些常识题，我想了解一下您的文学水平。

-1836233993.Text: 【临时】您对《装在盒子里的人》、《内科医生》这两个作品如何评价？

-1836233987.Text: 【临时】什么？唉，看来我找错人了。

-1836233989.Text: 【临时】「很不错」还不够。谈谈它们的故事、思想、文学性吧！

-1836233983.Text: 【临时】就这？唉，看来我是找错人了。

2055448778.Text: 【临时】这两部作品构思别出心裁，情感色彩鲜明，语言精雕细琢，具有强烈的个人风格，从中可以看出作者对自我意识的探寻和突破，美中不足的是思考浅尝辄止，终究成不了文学史上留名的杰作。

2055448777.Text: 【临时】妙啊，妙啊，您真的对文学有很深的研究。

2055448776.Text: 【临时】…你们这说的都是什么东西？

2055448783.Text: 【临时】重新自我介绍一下：我是《水晶日报》出版部的尼古莱。这本小书《贝洛伯格七大不思议》送您作为见面礼，望您海涵方才的冒昧打扰。

2055448782.Text: 【临时】我看您很懂文学，希望您能写一封信给市政厅，呼吁《雪国冒险奇谭》的解禁。当然，我会给您相应的报酬作为谢礼。

2055448780.Text: 【临时】是我社出版的一部冒险小说。相信您应该有所耳闻，前些日子市政厅宣布将它列入禁书，我们出版部也被暂停了相关业务。

2055448787.Text: 【临时】但我可以保证！这部书绝没有任何不良内容，它只是…太有想象力！它描绘出雪幕之后的宏伟奇景，精彩绝伦！

2055448786.Text: 【临时】市政厅担忧人们受这本书的影响，增加未经许可私自出城的案例。唉，我能理解，可这怎么能怪罪于一部书呢？

-673434576.Text: 【临时】我上哪看《雪国冒险奇谭》？

-673434577.Text: 【临时】这部书被禁了，我身上没带…这样吧，你在行政区找一位叫亚诺的青年人，我曾经委托他创作续集，给了他全本作为参考。

-673434578.Text: 【临时】这套书现在不好弄，所以…就麻烦你多费点心啦。

-673434572.Text: 【临时】不不不不不！我只是请您帮一个小忙…我可是正规的编辑，有上岗证的！怎么会做出违反行业道德的事情！

-673434573.Text: 【临时】我是在…是在…是在鼓励人们说出自己的看法！对，如果您读完雪国冒险奇谭，觉得它应该被查禁，我也会鼓励您写下自己的观点！

-673434574.Text: 【临时】当然，如果您觉得它被查禁确实不公，那就再好不过了！为了弥补您的时间损失，我才提议给您一笔补偿——您可千万不要误会！

-673434568.Text: 【临时】我想请您阅读这本书，然后…把您的看法写下来，寄给市政厅，就这么多！

892649397.Text: 【临时】宇宙、时空、过去、现在…灵感就要降落了，啊！灵感！

892649395.Text: 【临时】别出声！……喔，你没出声，很好，不要打扰我的科研！

892649401.Text: 【临时】不要出声！不要打扰我的科研！

892649398.Text: 【临时】你这是哪门子的科研啊。

892649399.Text: 【临时】唉，和你们这种人真是没法交流。科学研究不是炒菜做饭，不是洗衣叠被，它是一门艺术。要是你看一眼就知道我研究什么，还要科学家有啥用？

892649405.Text: 【临时】笑话，科学家当然以理服人。唉，我雷金居然要和一群看不懂我科研的人讲道理——科学界没救了！

-1836233958.Text: 【临时】笑话，一群看不懂我科研的人说我雷金强词夺理——科学界没救了！

-1836233960.Text: 【临时】好吧，我稍微花点时间给你科普一下：你知道光是一种粒子吗？

-1836233956.Text: 【临时】我就知道，跟外行人着不了这个急。

2055448810.Text: 【临时】反正你知道光是粒子就行了，什么波理论啊二相性啊这都高级词汇，跟你说了也白搭。重点是：粒子会携带信息，对吧？

2055448808.Text: 【临时】很好，跟你聊天还有点意思。

2055448814.Text: 【临时】什么不对，我说的能有错吗？

2055448813.Text: 【临时】总之，光作为粒子，它携带信息；那我接触光，本质就是在接触信息。根据我的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论，宇宙是多个相互关联的平行实体。

2055448818.Text: 【临时】假如某一个宇宙的我想出了传递信息的方式，就有一个宇宙的我想出了解读信息的方式，那根据我的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论……

2055448819.Text: 【临时】就能解读平行宇宙的信息。

-673434545.Text: 【临时】就能晒太阳晒出科学研究。

-673434544.Text: 【临时】对啊，当然了，我是用一种非常浅显的方式向你解释，其实里面深了去了……

-673434546.Text: 【临时】哈哈，你戳到了我的伤心处。确切地说，我还不是正式的「科学家」。科学界嫉妒我的才能，生怕我的研究成果颠覆他们的地位。他们不愿承认我。

-673434541.Text: 【临时】但是地髓总会发热，真理无惧艰险——总会有识货的人资助真正的科学！唉，我一直在等这样的人，怀才不遇是多么痛苦啊……

892649300.Text: 【临时】在看我的过去，现在和未来。

892649307.Text: 【临时】你误会了，我是在思考生命，价值和永恒。

-1836234055.Text: 【临时】啊，作家这称谓太高级了！我只是一个量产劣质文字的创作者。

-1836234053.Text: 【临时】我写了一些恐怖小说，评论界觉得它们很恐怖，根本不该出现在这世上；我还写了本灾难小说，评论界觉得是场灾难。

-1836234050.Text: 【临时】而现在，我是一个代笔的枪手，一个连代笔都不知从何下笔的垃圾。

-1836234049.Text: 【临时】抱歉，我最近遇到了瓶颈……

2055448712.Text: 【临时】谁想到作者竟然跑了，找不到了，人间蒸发了。编辑迫于压力，就问我能不能代笔。

2055448715.Text: 【临时】「啥雪国冒险奇谭，那书也就是地摊文学，我随随便便给你写个十几二十万字小意思。」

2055448714.Text: 【临时】当编辑送了一本让我感受风格后，我才发现完全不是这样。文学之道高人辈出啊！我自己还洋洋得意，可真正看到优秀的作品，才发现自己根本没资格评判别人。

2055448717.Text: 【临时】编辑后来找了我好几次，我实在交不出东西，也不敢见她。

2055448716.Text: 【临时】不要气馁，努力提高自己！

2055448718.Text: 【临时】不要比较，写自己的风格！

2055448721.Text: 【临时】哈哈，那我就会被永远钉在文学史的耻辱柱上……「亚诺是谁？他怎么好意思打着雪国冒险奇谭的名义写这种垃圾？」

2055448720.Text: 【临时】行行出状元，换个工作吧。

-673434643.Text: 【临时】谢谢你陪我聊天，这本书送你吧，这才是真正的佳作，我希望它被更多人读到……

-1836234021.Text: 【临时】一种非常甜美的小花，红黄交间，看上去就像太阳——在贝洛伯格，想看见太阳可不容易。拥有这盆花，就像把太阳收藏在您的家中！

-1836234019.Text: 【临时】好的，请先告诉我您的地址，我会安排送货上门……呃，您没有地址？那可不好办了，温室花很重的啊。

-1836234016.Text: 【临时】嗯，我们应有尽有：『侯爵夫人』、『初雪八落』、『覆夏竹』、还有『七彩虹』——

2055448745.Text: 【临时】我们这里最贵的花就是『侯爵夫人』了，这个名字背后可有一段不得了的故事呢。

2055448749.Text: 【临时】与其说花，不如说是一种植物～它有很长的杆茎，杆上有孔，据说很久以前有艺术家用它当作乐器呢！……大概吧。

2055448751.Text: 【临时】噢，是我们这儿最畅销的一种小花！五颜六色，好看极了——而且价格非常便宜。

892649496.Text: 【临时】「告诉我，你怎么会到这里来，为什么到这儿来？花园的墙这么高，是不容易爬上来的…」

-1836233850.Text: 【临时】唱功？哎，没想到现在的观众更在乎这个啊……

2055448908.Text: 【临时】可能你也听出来了，我的嗓音不是很好。歌剧院找了一位配音演员来辅助我，怎么说呢，她确实无可挑剔啦……

2055448907.Text: 【临时】但我却必须配合着声音做口型，配合着声音做动作……那到底谁才是演员呢，演技又从何体现呢？

2055448906.Text: 【临时】我真的很担心呢。未来某一天，那个声音也许会把我取而代之呢……

-673434445.Text: 【临时】我希望靠自己的实力稳固地位，不想用这种手段啦。

892649524.Text: 【临时】嗯嗯～那小女子就继续开嗓了啊。

892649525.Text: 【临时】啦啦啦啦～是你卷起一帘辰星～是你倾诉往日的梦境～

892649522.Text: 【临时】啊啦啦～一不小心把演出曲唱出来了。只有在歌剧院里才能听，可不能在这里唱完了。

892649536.Text: 【临时】啊啦啦～是也不是。小女子是歌剧院台柱——的御用配音，嘻嘻。

-1836233826.Text: 【临时】小女子是歌剧院台柱——的御用配音，我们在剧院里再会吧。

-1836233830.Text: 【临时】但，小女子叫作塞琳，和剧院的「台柱」塔米拉可不是一个人呢。

-1836233832.Text: 【临时】嗯～原先是没有这种想法的。

-1836233819.Text: 【临时】但是时间一久，也想试试开拓新的道路呢。

2055448937.Text: 【临时】是你追逐着泡沫幻影～是你看不清雾中小径～

-1674866306.Text: 【临时】这样活着真的没问题吗？

-1657221238.Text: 【临时】怎么了，各位？为什么看上去这么匆忙？

-1657221241.Text: 【临时】完全没有。一跟他说话，他就支支吾吾的，肯定做了什么亏心事。

-1657221242.Text: 【临时】瓦赫的药物都已经销毁了，道奇也接受了「正骨疗法」。按道理来说，他应该不敢再重操旧业了吧？

-1657221243.Text: 【临时】他说自己再也不做坏事了。

-1657221244.Text: 【临时】他还说自己绝不卖药了…要我看，他的嘴里就吐不出象牙。

-1657221245.Text: 【临时】我没有打算信任他。不过，我们得首先搞清楚，他究竟在打什么算盘。

-91137296.Text: 【临时】他只是害怕了而已，看来上次请他来诊所里面坐坐是有用的。

-91137298.Text: 【临时】我也不知道他在打什么算盘。这人狡猾得很，我们还需要更多信息。

-91137302.Text: 【临时】换句话说，我也可以用外力让骨骼错位。

-91137304.Text: 【临时】道奇现在很警觉，想弄清楚他在做什么，恐怕得费一番功夫。

-494421824.Text: 【临时】我记得有个叫菲多拉的淘金者，之前来诊所的时候提到了道奇。

-494421825.Text: 【临时】你们可以去问问她，也许能打听到什么线索。

-494421826.Text: 【临时】奇怪了，我刚才还看到道奇老师在这附近转悠来着……

-494421830.Text: 【临时】你们不知道吗？道奇老师的「守运圆石」卖得可火了。

-494421832.Text: 【临时】没有。不过道奇老师确实提到过，他曾经从事过药物研究。

1071662118.Text: 【临时】他现在专注于「非药物治疗方式」，更健康还更便宜。

1071662117.Text: 【临时】这个「守运圆石」是什么东西？

1071662116.Text: 【临时】你们一点儿都不知道吗？这是能用来调理身体能量平衡的石头。

1071662114.Text: 【临时】这你们都不知道吗？那冰块治疗呢，食物对话法呢？

1071662112.Text: 【临时】通过将身体埋进冰块中，模拟上层人的健康生活状态。

1071662111.Text: 【临时】道奇老师说，这样做能够释放身体中多余的热量…我试过一次，非常解压。

668377591.Text: 【临时】我们平常吃的食物里，有很多能量无法被人体吸收，造成了能量的浪费。

668377590.Text: 【临时】通过和食物对话，让食物充分理解了我们的性格，它们就能被身体完整地吸收。

668377587.Text: 【临时】…我一开始也半信半疑的，但是大伙都说有用，我就亲自试了一下。

668377586.Text: 【临时】结果出乎我的意料，真的很有效果！

668377585.Text: 【临时】道奇老师马上要在淘金者聚落举办讲座，你们去一次就明白了。

668377584.Text: 【临时】道奇这家伙，居然还能办讲座？

668377583.Text: 【临时】走吧，咱们去淘金者聚落看看。
