-2060505765.Text: 【临时】没错没错，我的运气也变好了，今天刚出门就遇见了一对双胞胎！

-2060505768.Text: 【临时】我花了好多钱在这石头上，效果能不好吗？

-2060505770.Text: 【临时】你们都没有亲自试过，到底谁才是自欺欺人啊？

-2060505772.Text: 【临时】你好大的口气！居然敢侮辱道奇老师，给我上！

-2060505773.Text: 【临时】道奇老师家世代都是药理大师，在淘金者聚落可以说是人尽皆知。

1831177003.Text: 【临时】不说这个了，今天的讲座是什么主题啊？

1831177002.Text: 【临时】道奇老师说要做出一个违背祖宗的决定，把治疗晶化症的健康秘方公布出来。

1831177000.Text: 【临时】…这不是还没公布吗？听说道奇老师翻来覆去好几个月，才终于做出了这个违背祖训的决定。

1831176999.Text: 【临时】为了造福大众，道奇老师甘愿自断财路…你知道这有多伟大吗？

1831176997.Text: 【临时】你好大的口气！居然敢侮辱道奇老师，给我上！

1831176996.Text: 【临时】那个，不知道是不是我自己的问题…我的「守运圆石」好像没什么效果。

-897706350.Text: 【临时】说到底，这不就是块石头嘛？

-897706351.Text: 【临时】胡说八道，就是你自己的问题！你看，我的「守运圆石」就……

-897706352.Text: 【临时】完了完了，你这「守运圆石」碎了！

-897706353.Text: 【临时】可、可恶！肯定就是这帮家伙坏了我的好运，我要给你们点颜色瞧瞧！

-897706354.Text: 【临时】到头来，道奇完全没露面啊？咱们扑了个空呢……

-897706356.Text: 【临时】的确，自从我们跟娜塔莎说过话之后，就再也没见到过他了。

-897706357.Text: 【临时】说不定我们被他跟踪了。

-897706358.Text: 【临时】道奇只是害怕娜塔莎吧……

1474946482.Text: 【临时】有这个可能。如果道奇真的想开「讲座」，就不会把淘金者们晾在这里了。

1474946484.Text: 【临时】这「守运圆石」，其实就是用黏土、石灰和地髓粉末混合做成的。

1474946485.Text: 【临时】地髓粉末？这也太危险了吧…不过，这块石头确实很圆，就像一颗药丸一样…

1474946478.Text: 【临时】会不会是用模具做出来的？

1474946479.Text: 【临时】药用模具…娜塔莎是不可能把诊所里的工具借给道奇的。

1474946480.Text: 【临时】会存放这种模具的地方…恐怕就只有裂界里的药物实验室了。

1474946481.Text: 【临时】丹恒的脑子转的真快。咱们过去看看吧？

1474946474.Text: 【临时】救命啊！有没有人，谁都行，快来救救我！

1474946475.Text: 【临时】果然是道奇！不管那么多了，救人要紧！

-1253936873.Text: 【临时】谢，谢谢你们…要不是你们，我这条小命就不保了……

-1253936871.Text: 【临时】别挖苦我了，我哪是什么老师……

-1253936877.Text: 【临时】…所以你们才追到这里来了？这就叫因祸得福吗……

-1253936876.Text: 【临时】还以为你很喜欢这种叫法。

-1253936875.Text: 【临时】你们误会了，是那些淘金者擅自这么叫的，我可没有让他们这么做。

-1253936874.Text: 【临时】多亏各位大哥大姐出手相助，我才勉强捡回一条命…这是我的一点薄礼，不足挂齿。

-1253936881.Text: 【临时】那个啥，谢礼也给过了，那我就先撤了…咱们有缘再……

-1657221400.Text: 【临时】你以为这样就能收买我们吗？

-1657221399.Text: 【临时】我、我真的没有卖假药，我对地发誓！

-1657221398.Text: 【临时】宣扬伪科学的性质一样恶劣。

-1657221397.Text: 【临时】就是！要是有真正的病人被你的「疗法」耽搁了，后果你承担得起吗？

-1657221403.Text: 【临时】就是，到头来你还是完全没有悔改嘛！

-1657221402.Text: 【临时】把他带回娜塔莎那里去吧。

-1657221401.Text: 【临时】求求你们了，千万别把我带到那儿去！我真的再也不敢了……

-1657221408.Text: 【临时】抗议无效。再跟我们走一趟吧！

-1657221407.Text: 【临时】…事情的过程，我已经清楚了。

-91137459.Text: 【临时】这家伙就交给我吧。没想到我的「正骨疗法」要对同一个人施展两次…哼哼。

-91137458.Text: 【临时】居然会有这么多人上了他的当…

-91137457.Text: 【临时】地底的很多人比你们想象的还要单纯，即便是淘金者也不例外。

-91137456.Text: 【临时】简单的生活方式造就了单纯的人，单纯的人就是容易上当受骗。

-91137463.Text: 【临时】这家伙就是看中了这一点，所以才能频频得手。

-91137462.Text: 【临时】第一次见到这么拼命的骗子。

-91137461.Text: 【临时】的确，为了一点小钱频频拼上性命，闯进恶魔之胃……

-91137460.Text: 【临时】哎呀，我都差点被这持之以恒的精神感动了呢。

-91137467.Text: 【临时】走吧，道奇…医生姐姐会加倍温柔地对待你的，哼哼……

-494421985.Text: 【临时】不知道为什么，我居然都感觉有点内疚了……

748156010.Text: Eh? I think I've seen this guy before...

748156011.Text: Ah right! He's one of the miners we saved from the tunnel, right?

748156000.Text: Thank you all, I would be buried under the mine otherwise!

748156001.Text: Why are you slacking off again?

-1980727347.Text: You have no work to do?

-1980727346.Text: Sl-slack off? I-I finished all my work apparently.

-1980727345.Text: Napping after work, that ain't too bad, right?

-1980727344.Text: Speaking of which, this mine is back in operation again so quickly!

-1980727351.Text: Mine accidents happen all the time, we're all used to it. No matter how bad the accident is, a couple of nights is long enough to fix it up.

-1980727350.Text: If the exploitation is affected by landsliding at this level, no one will be happy when the tax period ends.

-1980727349.Text: I like to work in newly renovated mines in particular. Hehe.

-1980727348.Text: But... isn't it more dangerous to work in a place that has just been through an accident?

-1980727355.Text: Why are you risking your life?

-1980727354.Text: The higher the risk, the higher the return!

-414643406.Text: Working in a newly renovated mine gets me 2 more tins every day... If I work for 6 or 7 days here, I'll have enough to eat for the rest of the tax period.

-414643405.Text: Besides, those foremen cherish their lives so much that they rarely come to oversee us. I just need to deal with work casually, then I have the rest of the time for myself, hehe...

-414643404.Text: What if someone tells on you?

-414643403.Text: You've got the gist of it.

-414643410.Text: Everyone knows what kind of person I am, telling on me does no good to them either. So why bother?

-414643407.Text: Since you heroes are here again, could you please do me... Emm, another tiny favor?

-414643413.Text: Wh-why would I! I'm not like those greedy foremen out there, I'll pay you back for this favor.

1151440536.Text: Of course, I understand my limits. I'm different from those greedy foremen!

1151440537.Text: Last time when I was rescued by you guys, I was in a daze, so I just ran out with empty hands.

1151440538.Text: Then I realized that all my equipment was left in the mine, but there was nothing left in there when I tried to look for them afterwards...

1151440531.Text: I can't do anything about it, so I had to borrow equipment from the others to continue working these days.

1151440532.Text: Can't you just buy another set of equipment?

1151440533.Text: Miss, a whole set of equipments ain't cheap. Instead of buying a new set, I'd rather ask you guys...

1151440527.Text: Ahem, nothing. I mean, I guess my equipment was taken away by some monsters. I bet they are easy to deal with for heroes like you.

1151440528.Text: I'll pay you half of my salary today if you help to get my equipment back. How about that?

-1221212459.Text: Sorry, I've got something else to do...

-1221212458.Text: Wait wait, alright. 70%... I'll have to work one more day this tax period in that case...

-1221212464.Text: Al-alright then! I'll give you 70%. Deal.

-1221212463.Text: A thermal driven mechanical mining pick, an anti-dust mask and a pink safety helmet... are the things I lost. I've got my name written on these items, so you should recognize them easily.

-1221212462.Text: 【临时】有劳各位了，清理怪物我是真的不在行，我擅长的事儿就只有偷懒…呼…感觉又有点儿困了。我再睡一会儿，等你们的好消息……

-1221212461.Text: I don't think there're many people like Peak here in the underground...

-1221212468.Text: Everyone is working so hard all the time, even when they're sick.

-1221212467.Text: I guess people like him have no one to concern for.

344871481.Text: As long as he works long enough to pay for his own survival, they'll just sleep through the rest of the time.

344871482.Text: A mining pick, a mask and a helmet... that's all, right?

344871483.Text: This set looks brand-new! Guess Peak has been taking good care of it.

344871484.Text: Well, maintenance fee is nothing compared to the cost of a new set.

344871478.Text: 【临时】起床了，我们拿到你的装备了。

344871480.Text: *snores*...Do-don't hit me! I give up... Hmm?

344871473.Text: Oh you're back! I thought it was a nightmare... How did it go, you've got anything?

344871474.Text: Wow, my babies! I missed you so much! I couldn't sleep well without you...

1910955422.Text: I think you slept very well without them...

1910955423.Text: Thank you, heroes! Alright, we agreed on paying you 60% of my salary right? I'll give you the money now...

1910955418.Text: Oh yeah 70%. Look how stupid I am! Guess my mind wasn't clear after a short nap.

1910955419.Text: You said you only work 6 to 7 days each tax period, what do you do for the rest of the time?

1910955420.Text: I eat and sleep. That's called life, isn't it?

1910955414.Text: Why should I work harder when I've got enough money to feed myself? I want no troubles for myself.

1910955415.Text: That's such a good reason for being lazy...

-817927932.Text: If I could ever get out of this damn mine just by working hard, I might have tried harder.

-817927931.Text: Ahem, I'll stop complaining. Here you are, my promised payback. 70% of my salary today.

-817927930.Text: What if I stay on the express all day and just eat and sleep...

-817927937.Text: ... Pom-Pom will throw you off right away.

-817927936.Text: Right, but that's kind of my dream life!

1556013612.Text: Tired? I used to feel tiredness before occasionally, but now my feelings are numb.

1556013605.Text: Wait, who are you people? How did you get in here?

1556013606.Text: Oh, I see, you've got the visitor's pass.

-10070328.Text: *sigh* I thought I finally got some other stuff to do... like expelling illegal invaders or something...

-10070327.Text: Are you not happy with your job?

-10070326.Text: Not like I hate it, just that my days are so dull and pointless, I've got no passion anymore.

-10070325.Text: Isn't it good to have some peaceful time?

-10070332.Text: Don't get me wrong, I don't want to fight for living either... Just that my days are dull and pointless, I've got no passion at all.

-10070331.Text: Look at this restricted zone, every guard is armed, but in fact, most of them are just slacking off and only work to survive.

-10070330.Text: Those newbies have no idea what they are guarding for, not even knowing who their imaginary enemies are.

-10070329.Text: Everyone works to satisfy these basic needs anyway. It's not a big deal.

-10070336.Text: I earn enough to feed my family, but the Union is so big, everything here gets you money.

-10070335.Text: I've been in the army for over 20 years now with no decent merits. My life was such a joke.

393214199.Text: And I'm still working in the logistics department in the restricted zone at this age. I can't see any hope to promote at all. I guess that's it for my life.

393214200.Text: I don't even have the courage to meet my daughter. I wonder how she's doing recently...

393214201.Text: Your daughter lives in the city?

393214202.Text: Yeah, I can't take her into this crap with me.

393214196.Text: Well, you got me. I wish I knew.

393214197.Text: I haven't been home for quite long now. Lila must have graduated. I wonder if she has got a decent job.

393214198.Text: Wait, you are wearing a temporary pass, which means that you'll head back to the city after you finish up your things here, right?

393214192.Text: Great! I've got a letter here for Lila, could you please forward it for me?

-1172869742.Text: Everything here in the restricted zone is top-level secret, the commander doesn't allow us to communicate with the outside world personally. So you're the only hope I've got.

-1172869741.Text: Forward the letter and ask her how she's doing for me. Please?

-1172869739.Text: Sorry, we're actually in a hurry...

-1172869746.Text: I see... Forget it, that was an act of impulse anyway.

-1172869745.Text: I wonder how Lila is doing right now...

-1172869744.Text: Thank you, strangers. I don't expect to get her reply. I just wish that she's doing fine...

-1172869743.Text: Sorry for taking up your time. You must have something else to do. All the best for you.

-1172869750.Text: Tell me if you've found any rare animals.

-1172869749.Text: Your father asked us to bring you a letter.

-413354854.Text: You're sure? Is it a new fraud trick? He's supposed to be working in the military area. How did you manage...

-413354853.Text: Just open it and you'll see.

-413354852.Text: Have you ever seen a fraud that asks for no money...

-413354859.Text: You've got a point. Anyway, give it to me first.

-413354857.Text: It's his handwriting indeed. I still recognize it after all these years.

-413354856.Text: *sigh* He's just as persistent as before, always being so harsh on himself.

-413354863.Text: I'm sorry if this is too abrupt, could you please get me a bunch of flowers if you have time?

-413354862.Text: I want to write him a letter back with some flowers.

-1979438796.Text: Alright, I'll help to the end.

-1979438793.Text: There's a florist nearby. Please get me a bunch of rainbow.

-1979438800.Text: Surely I'll pay for the flowers and the errand. I'll see you later.

-1979438799.Text: Gosh, Artem has such a soft soul, why was he born in a banned book...

-1979438798.Text: I want to buy a bunch of rainbow please.

-1979438797.Text: Eh? Sorry I was out of my mind.

-1979438804.Text: Rainbow, right? No problem, I'll get you a bunch.

-1979438803.Text: May I ask who are these flowers for?

-1576154268.Text: Oh? Rainbow for an elder is quite... a unique choice.

-1576154267.Text: You know, the flower language of the rainbow is the ordinary beauty. It's a popular choice among old friends and couples.

-1576154266.Text: Are you trying to tell the elder to enjoy life and not to be trapped by the trifles from work and life...

-1576154273.Text: That would be a great moral actually.

-1576154272.Text: Here you are, a bunch of rainbow. Hope you'll enjoy it.

-1576154271.Text: Wow, you're back! That was quick!

-1576154270.Text: Perfect timing. I just finished writing the letter as well. Please take the letter and the flowers to my father at your next visit to the restricted zone.

-1576154276.Text: Yes. That would be enough. I want to meet him as well, but I guess we'll have to let him figure his own stuff out first.

1152729086.Text: Do you want to meet him?

1152729087.Text: Sure I want, but I guess we'll have to let him figure his own stuff out first.

1152729088.Text: He has always been so stubborn and tough on himself.

1152729089.Text: I could easily tell that what he wrote on the letter was not what he really experienced.

1152729082.Text: He likes to act like a hero in front of me ever since I was little. He probably thinks he's shameless to meet me without achieving something big.

1152729083.Text: But I really don't mind. He has been working so hard, and he gave me a life better than many others already. I'm truly grateful for what he did.

1152729084.Text: Oops, sorry for troubling you with my family issues.

1152729085.Text: How did you know that what he wrote was fake?

1152729078.Text: I'll tell you about those mythic animals I saw in the Fragmentum if there's a chance for us to meet in person. ——I mean, there can't be any mythic animals living in the Fragmentum.

1152729079.Text: *sigh* I guess I'm still an innocent little girl to him...

1912243973.Text: Huh! Did you see that? We won! I did it... I performed a merit!

1912243974.Text: I didn't expect to see you back so soon. How did it go, did you pass my letter to Lila?

1912243975.Text: 【临时】这是她送给你的花，里面附了一封回信。

1912243971.Text: I'm such a mule. I've been escaping my own family with those nonsense lies...

1912243972.Text: Now that I finally realize families are always here regardless, I'll stop being anxious for nothing.

1912243965.Text: I'll take a leave and go home when I have the chance.

1912243966.Text: Thank you, strangers! Please accept these...

346160032.Text: What happened? This fella won't leave me alone. Anything wrong with its control assembly?

346160033.Text: Damn it... It's making me to fight back!

1556013680.Text: So? What did you do to those problematic robots?

1556013675.Text: The colleague who's in charge of arms management forgot to report the commander about those defective robots...

1556013676.Text: Those robots might have been deployed to the restricted zone already.

1556013674.Text: Ca-calm down! As long as we move quick enough, we'll recycle them before anything happens...

1556013671.Text: Don't just say it, aren't you going to recycle them by yourself?

1556013672.Text: Uh? I-I'm afraid that's out of my range of duty...

-10070262.Text: Range of duty? Does it include letting defective robots run around in the restricted zone and kill people?

-10070266.Text: We've met in the city before...

-10070265.Text: We did? No impression at all.

-10070267.Text: Well, a helpful person in a place like this? I don't believe it.

-10070270.Text: Only the silvermane guards and the researchers from the Union can pass the restricted zone freely...

-10070269.Text: Ah I see. You're the temporary workers sent by the commander right? Great!

393214265.Text: Listen, I have something urgent I need you to take care of! Drop whatever you're doing now, this is life or death!

393214266.Text: You're giving such an important task to a part-time?

393214263.Text: Of course. All the full-time staff here are worthless.

393214261.Text: It's my job to save lives.

393214262.Text: You seem ready! But talk is worthless, I need results.

393214259.Text: The Garrison ordered a batch of security robots last month, however, due to the lacking in production capacity, a portion of the work was outsourced to a private factory.

393214260.Text: Those idiots slacked and none of the robots meet the required standards and have a high risk of losing control!

393214257.Text: I don't know which moron signed off on releasing this batch... What's even worse is that the people in charge of the armory skipped out on the procurement procedure and deployed the robots to the restricted zone!

393214258.Text: If it were up to me, when this is all over, everyone involved should get punished! What are you looking at! You're part of it too!

-1172869675.Text: Well, that's the gist of it, find the robots that have lost control and retrieve their Core Module.

-1172869678.Text: I don't care how you do it. You can EMP it, take control of it, or just smash it into pieces, it doesn't matter. They're all just hunks of low-quality junk anyway.

-1172869680.Text: Umm, do I look like I can fight? I'm not overly developed like you guys.

-1172869679.Text: I've marked the locations of the broken robots. I'll let the commander know about your extra pay, I give you my word. Now go!

-1172869682.Text: This is the area that Lily marked, right...?

-1172869681.Text: That Sentinel Robot does look weird.

-1172869684.Text: Seems like this big guy is also one of the defects.

-1172869683.Text: Lily never said it'd be so much work!

-413354789.Text: Oh, it's you, has everything been taken care of?

-413354788.Text: It took some work, but it's done.

-413354790.Text: She umm... was unhappy and probably went home to cry.

-413354793.Text: She really is a walking menace, always bothering everyone about menial things like this...

-413354792.Text: She could use a better attitude, but she means well.

-413354795.Text: She may have saved a lot of lives.

-413354794.Text: Hmph, it's obvious the higher-ups don't think so.

-413354797.Text: She went up there guns blazing as soon as you guys left. What did she think was gonna happen? The Armament Officer gave her a good scolding, and she ran home angry.

-413354796.Text: It's not like I didn't remind her, but it just seems like she doesn't realize how unlikable she is, heh.

-1979438730.Text: Your attitudes are much more repulsive.

-1979438732.Text: If it were you, would you like it if she pointed and yelled in your face?

-1979438731.Text: Whatever, you're just a part-timer, what you think is not important... If you're finished with everything, hurry up and get out of here.

-1979438734.Text: We need to go find her.

-1979438736.Text: If it were me, I wouldn't go anywhere near her right now... But if that's what you want, there's nothing I can do.

-1979438735.Text: You guys should have other things to do, right? Hurry up and get out of here if you're done with your task.

-1979438738.Text: Hmm... why would Lily get yelled at if everything she's said has been right?

-1979438737.Text: I don't think those officers are stupid, there must be a deeper interest-driven connection behind all this.

-1576154203.Text: Lily's temper gave them a chance to retaliate.

-1576154202.Text: The relationship between people and their interests is so complicated regardless of which world we're in...

-1576154207.Text: (She looks to be in a bad mood...)

-1576154206.Text: Huh? Oh, it's you guys... Have you taken care of the defective robots?

-1576154209.Text: It's all been taken care of, no one's been hurt.

-1576154211.Text: Wait, no, I don't care about that. If those people don't care about if they live or die, why should I?

1152729150.Text: I just don't understand... It's like this every time. Why do they dislike me so much?

1152729151.Text: It's obvious that I'm right... and they know it. So why am I the one being yelled at?

1152729148.Text: Don't let them take away your passionate personality.

1152729149.Text: You should learn to speak in a more likable way.

1152729146.Text: I want to reel in my temper sometimes too. But I just blow up whenever I see all the stupid things happening around me, and hearing the stupid things coming out of their mouths!

1152729147.Text: How do I become more... likable...

1152729145.Text: This is... a module part that didn't meet the production standards?

1912244039.Text: I thought you would've handed it all over to the officers in the restricted zone. Why'd you kept it for me?

1912244040.Text: You should get to the bottom of this.

1912244038.Text: You were the one to task us with the request, you must see it through.

1912244035.Text: I have to see it through...

1912244036.Text: You're right! I can't let them defeat me like this! This ain't over yet!

1912244033.Text: If I let this go so easily, then there will definitely be a next time, and another after that!

1912244034.Text: Oh, I got your payments. I wouldn't say the process was too pleasant, but I managed to get it from the commander.

1912244031.Text: Thank you, guys... I almost thought that I wouldn't be able to find people that understand me in this city again...

1912244032.Text: Mhm... Okay... Good work. You can go now.

346160099.Text: This fellow looks to be broken.

346160096.Text: Take out its core. Careful, it might blow up.

346160094.Text: Whew, I didn't think it'd be so easy.

346160095.Text: If you were off by another two millimeters, it might've blown up.

346160092.Text: You could've told me that sooner!

1556016878.Text: 【临时】看上去好像是某种饰品，要么是吊坠，要么是耳环。形状就像是…一个钻头？

1556016877.Text: 【临时】这个小玩意被扔在这里多久了？居然保存得这么完好，真是神奇。

1556016876.Text: 【临时】仔细看，钻头上好像还有刻字。

1556016875.Text: 【临时】真的有欸？写的是…巴…巴拉…「巴拉金」？

1556016874.Text: 【临时】听上去像是这个世界的人名。

1556016873.Text: 【临时】怎么办，{NICKNAME}？要不要去调查一下这个「巴拉金」？

-10067061.Text: 【临时】共同体有那么多官员…肯定有人能查到家族的族谱吧？

-10067062.Text: 【临时】等一切安定下来，就去问问吧！

-10067063.Text: 【临时】抱歉抱歉，我很忙。有事请预约，好吗？如果你预约了——呃，现在是休息时间，请一个小时后再来……

-10067064.Text: You're here again? I told you I was busy, like very busy. The public needs to be served in so many ways...

-10067065.Text: 【临时】我这儿有个东西想请你看看。

-10067066.Text: 【临时】你是把我的话当耳边风了吗？民间事务咨询请走预约流程……

-10067067.Text: 【临时】事关重大，可能关系到你的仕途。

-10067068.Text: 【临时】这东西可是百年难得一见。

-10067070.Text: 【临时】行吧，那就拿过来给我看看吧。

393217466.Text: 【临时】这是什么，项链？上面还有行小字…「巴拉金」？

393217465.Text: 【临时】所以呢，你们为什么要给我看这个东西？

393217464.Text: 【临时】想找人调查一下这个「巴拉金」。

393217463.Text: 【临时】想把它送给这位美丽的女士。

393217462.Text: 【临时】…我该装作很开心的样子吗？请不要浪费时间。

393217461.Text: 【临时】所以，这东西根本就没那么重要，对吧？你们只是想查清楚这个小玩意的归属而已。

393217460.Text: 【临时】共同体所有市民的家谱都存录在政务官的档案库里。不管这人改过几次姓氏，只要花点时间就能查到他的祖宗十八代。

393217459.Text: 【临时】你们可以预约「家族寻根」服务。按照现在的处理进度，大约明年就能轮到你们了。

393217457.Text: 【临时】当然，也不是没有加速流程的办法——比如支付加急服务费。

-1172866475.Text: 【临时】没有什么办法能加速流程吗？

-1172866476.Text: 【临时】当然有，只是需要你们支付一笔加急服务费。

-1172866478.Text: 【临时】这都是明文规定的正规流程，请这位小姐不要做出随意的指控。

-1172866479.Text: 【临时】怎么办，{NICKNAME}？我有种奇怪的预感，这个钻头肯定不一般……

-1172866480.Text: 【临时】但是一想到要被这样讹一笔，就觉得很不甘心！

-1172866481.Text: 【临时】算了，我们也没那么感兴趣。

-1172866482.Text: 【临时】不想交加急费用的话，就去走预约流程吧。

-1172866483.Text: 【临时】我看看…要是进度正常的话，明年应该就能排到你们了吧？

-1172866484.Text: 【临时】能用钱解决的问题都不叫问题。

-413351589.Text: 【临时】咳，收据的话，下次见面的时候再开给你们。

-413351590.Text: 【临时】钱也给到位了，要多久才能等到结果啊？

-413351591.Text: 【临时】我看看，差不多…两个小时吧？

-413351593.Text: 【临时】你们可以去边上转转，一会儿再回来找我。

-413351594.Text: 【临时】越来越觉得咱们被敲诈了……

-413351595.Text: 【临时】哟，我们回来了！你查出什么情报没有？

-413351596.Text: 【临时】喔，时间正好。我给你们看个东西。

-413351597.Text: 【临时】你们运气很好，档案库里就没记录几个姓「巴拉金」的人，而且他们都是这位理查德•巴拉金的后代。

-1979435529.Text: 【临时】还好，这个姓氏的血脉并没有消失，一直延续到了现在。

-1979435530.Text: 【临时】让我看看，「巴拉金」家族的后代…啊，找到了，是一位女性，全名是茉莉•巴拉金。

-1979435533.Text: 【临时】啊，是那个喜欢和人吵架的姑娘，对吧？

-1979435534.Text: 【临时】…嗯？看来你们在共同体还积累了不少人脉嘛。

-1979435535.Text: 【临时】行了，事办完了，钻头项链还给你们。记住，下次再找我办业务要走预约流程……

-1979435536.Text: 【临时】也就是说，这个钻头是茉莉家祖辈的东西，不知道为什么被丢弃在了裂界深处。

-1979435538.Text: 【临时】接下来该怎么办…茉莉，茉莉，动动你的脑子……

-1576151002.Text: 【临时】啊，是你们——怎么样，最近还顺利吗？

-1576151004.Text: 【临时】是吗？那再好不过了。不像我，还是一团糟。

-1576151007.Text: 【临时】在这城市里，想一个人生活真的不容易。更难的是保证尊严不被践踏……

-1576151008.Text: 【临时】算了，我不想跟你们抱怨。所以是什么风把你们吹来了？

-1576151011.Text: 【临时】「巴拉金」…原来如此，这是你们在裂界里找到的东西？

1152732353.Text: 【临时】亏你们能顺着这个姓氏找到我啊…自从老爸过世以后，我都快忘了自己姓什么了。

1152732352.Text: 【临时】老爸确实跟我说过，巴拉金家祖上都是做技术工作的，还出过不少杰出的工程师跟机械师。

1152732351.Text: 【临时】真没想到，原来我的祖先曾经深入过裂界作业…真是太厉害了。

1152732350.Text: 【临时】你听说过理查德•巴拉金吗？

1152732349.Text: 【临时】当然听过，听说他不仅是特别优秀的机械师，甚至还是普拉米亚本人的朋友。

1152732348.Text: 【临时】巴拉金家从来不把普拉米亚当作「圣贤」看待，也不相信所谓的神迹——大概就是因为我的祖先和她交情很深吧？

1152732347.Text: 【临时】你还有其他兄弟姐妹吗？

1152732346.Text: 【临时】没有。如你所见，我现在就是巴拉金家的独苗。

1152732345.Text: 【临时】再这样下去，这条血脉可能会在我这儿断掉……

1152732344.Text: 【临时】你知道这个钻头是什么东西吗？

1912247240.Text: 【临时】完全没头绪，应该就是件普通的饰品吧？

1912247239.Text: 【临时】但是这个钻头的形状，总觉得…等等，让我仔细想想……

1912247237.Text: 【临时】啊，我记起来了！我们家的地下室藏着一个祖传的铁盒，从来没有被打开过。

1912247236.Text: 【临时】那个铁盒的钥匙孔，好像符合这个钻头的形状。

1912247235.Text: 【临时】没想过用别的方法打开吗…

1912247234.Text: 【临时】那可是老祖宗留下的东西，怎么可能用暴力的方式打开啊？

1912247233.Text: 【临时】老实说，估计我的祖辈们都把它给忘了吧？我还是偶然间在地下室里翻到的。

1912247232.Text: 【临时】那还等什么？快打开看看吧。

346163299.Text: 【临时】抱歉，我还没来得及告诉你们——记得上次你们解决的那批残次品警卫机器人吗？

346163298.Text: 【临时】你们把出了问题的核心还给我之后，我就想去查清事情的真相。结果不出我所料……

346163297.Text: 【临时】禁区里的某些士官，居然真的跟黑心代工厂狼狈为奸！

346163296.Text: 【临时】我在跟踪他们的时候被发现了。我拼命跑回家，结果发现整个屋子已经被翻了个底朝天。

346163295.Text: 【临时】所有值钱的、不值钱的东西都被他们抢走了，留下的只有贴在门窗上的威胁警告。

346163294.Text: 【临时】这也太过嚣张了吧？这么说来，茉莉你的处境岂不是很危险？

346163292.Text: 【临时】但是我也想不出法子制裁他们。说白了，我只是个小机械师，他们的背后可是一整个利益集团……

346163291.Text: 【临时】我们去帮你拿回属于你的东西。

1556016717.Text: 【临时】我以前也这么以为。但是……

1556016718.Text: 【临时】等等，你不会是想去找他们的麻烦吧？

1556016719.Text: 【临时】不行，这也太冒险了！这事因我而起，不能把无关的人卷进来。

1556016713.Text: 【临时】不过是一群乌合之众而已，让我们去会会他们！

1556016714.Text: 【临时】多管闲事是我们的特长。

1556016715.Text: 【临时】喂，你怎么抢我的台词啊？

1556016716.Text: 【临时】你们…哈，还真是一帮仗义的家伙。

1556016709.Text: 【临时】不过，既然连失控的自走兵器都能轻松摆平，我确实不该质疑你们的实力。

1556016710.Text: 【临时】那些家伙应该就躲在禁区里商议机密…对他们来说，大概没有比那更安全的地方了。

-10067224.Text: 【临时】抱歉，战斗方面我帮不上什么忙。我手头还有些小玩意，随便拿！希望对你们有用处。

-10067223.Text: 【临时】嘘！先听听他们在说些什么吧。

-10067228.Text: 【临时】那个女人的事，你们都摆平了？

-10067227.Text: 【临时】都搞定了，保证吓得她不敢出门。

-10067226.Text: 【临时】下次她要是再敢跳出来捣乱，结果就不是这么简单了。

-10067232.Text: 【临时】下周应该就能到了。那家厂的老板拿脑袋保证，这次绝对没有偷工减料。

393217304.Text: 【临时】哼，他最好是。为了确保这批订单能落到他们手上，我可是透支了不少人脉啊。万一捅出什么篓子……

393217305.Text: 【临时】对了，也跟后勤部那家伙提前通个气。要是实在顶不住压力，分成可以给他提高五个点。

393217299.Text: 【临时】这帮家伙…真是气死我了！

393217302.Text: 【临时】你们——你们是怎么进来的？

393217295.Text: 【临时】哼，我们是来替茉莉伸张正义的！

-1172866636.Text: 【临时】你是谁？我们想干嘛，轮得到你们插嘴么？

-1172866635.Text: 【临时】够了！他们明显就是来找茬的，多说无益。

-1172866642.Text: 【临时】拔枪吧，闯入者！既然秘密已经被发现了，那你们就别想活着走出这片禁区！

-1172866641.Text: 【临时】哼，装什么硬汉，根本不堪一击。

-1172866640.Text: 【临时】找找看有没有茉莉的东西吧。

-1172866639.Text: 【临时】我找到了一封信件，应该有保留的价值。

-1172866645.Text: 【临时】我找到了！茉莉说的传家宝肯定就是这个。

-413351751.Text: 【临时】大功告成了，咱们回去找茉莉吧。

-413351750.Text: 【临时】你们回来了！太好了，你们肯定想象不到，我刚才简直紧张得要命！

-413351749.Text: 【临时】你们找到那群私通黑商的家伙了吗？

-413351748.Text: 【临时】那是当然，还把他们狠狠修理了一顿。

-413351753.Text: 【临时】哈！白纸黑字，把他们的罪恶行径记录得一清二楚。这下被我抓到把柄了。

-413351752.Text: 【临时】谢谢你们。还有什么其它发现吗？

-413351759.Text: 【临时】你说的铁盒我们也找到了。

-413351758.Text: 【临时】我们找到了巴拉金家族的铁盒。

-1979435691.Text: 【临时】你们为我费了这么大力气，真不知道该怎么道谢……

-1979435690.Text: 【临时】不要突然这么客气呀，茉莉。你专属的那股锐气哪去了？

-1979435689.Text: 【临时】好不容易把它夺回来了，赶紧打开看看里面是什么吧？

-1979435695.Text: 【临时】钻头…铁盒…希望我的推测没有错……

-1576151165.Text: 【临时】我…好像明白了。我从小就脾气差，其他孩子都不愿意跟我玩在一块。

-1576151164.Text: 【临时】工作了以后，我也经常因为一些看不过眼的小事跟别人发生争执。

-1576151163.Text: 【临时】其实我根本不用试图改变别人…就像祖辈说的，我需要的就是一把扳钳，一枚钻头。

-1576151162.Text: 【临时】我想明白了。我要辞掉在技术部的工作，找个地方重新开始——这次自立门户。

-1576151169.Text: 【临时】如果我不在乎外界的干扰，只专注于手上的工作，我就能握住自己的未来。或许…或许有一天还能改变这座城市。

-1576151168.Text: 【临时】有这样的觉悟自然绝妙，但是也要有现实作为支撑。

-1576151167.Text: 【临时】你可想过，假如失去了公务身份的保护，或许你会遭受更可怕的报复？

-1576151166.Text: 【临时】…你说的也很对。啊，想彻底独立真是太难了……

-1576151173.Text: 【临时】要是能找到一个靠得住，而且志同道合的伙伴就好了……

1152732190.Text: 【临时】嘿嘿，你跟我想到一起去了！

1152732192.Text: 【临时】哼哼，我想到一个人可以帮忙……

1152732186.Text: 【临时】茉莉——欢迎来到放逐者联盟！

1152732188.Text: 【临时】嘿嘿，也没什么毛病吧？你看，咱俩的经历不是很类似吗？

1152732189.Text: 【临时】都是在共同体技术部混不下去的天才机械师，被逼着逃出来自立门户……

1152732182.Text: 【临时】「天才」？不不，我跟希露瓦小姐不一样，根本算不上什么「天才」……

1152732183.Text: 【临时】你怎么还谦虚上了？这跟我听说的不太一样哦……

1912247079.Text: 【临时】这才对嘛，这才是年轻有为的机械师该有的精气神！

1912247080.Text: 【临时】为了庆祝希露瓦机械屋迎来第一位助手——就由我来给各位演奏一曲吧！

1912247073.Text: 【临时】我有预感，这两个人会相处得很好……

1912247075.Text: 【临时】希望不要吵到外面的人……

1912247069.Text: 【临时】在此处翻找了一段时间…

1556016816.Text: 【临时】这个世界的乐谱编排很奇特，我读不懂。

1556016815.Text: 【临时】可惜…你们看，这几页乐谱都保留得很完整呢，说不定上层区会有人对它感兴趣？

1556016810.Text: 【临时】说不定还能卖个好价钱，嘿嘿……

1556016809.Text: 【临时】上层区好像有个歌剧院。

1556016812.Text: 【临时】我也记得——咱们去那儿碰碰运气吧？

1556016806.Text: 【临时】希露瓦玩的是摇滚吧？光看这歌词，感觉跟摇滚沾不上边……

1556016805.Text: 【临时】上层区不是有个歌剧院吗？咱们去那儿碰碰运气吧。

-10067127.Text: 【临时】「你的步伐因何匆匆？是太阳，太阳的召唤令我充满活力……」

-10067128.Text: 【临时】咳，嗯哼…果然还是差了那么一点呢。

-10067125.Text: 【临时】抱歉，我在进行例行的开嗓练习呢。请问有什么事吗？

-10067126.Text: 【临时】你对旧时代的音乐感兴趣吗？

-10067131.Text: 【临时】当然感兴趣啦。我主演的那些音乐剧，绝大多数都是百年前的经典作品。

-10067132.Text: 【临时】不是说现在的创作者能力欠缺啦，只是…我觉得他们写出的词曲虽然华丽，但却有点浅薄呢。

-10067129.Text: 【临时】怎么突然提起这个？莫非，你对于旧时代的音乐颇有了解？

-10067130.Text: 【临时】我们搜到了一份旧时代的乐谱。

-10067135.Text: 【临时】真的吗？难道是原稿？请务必拿给我看看。

-10067136.Text: 【临时】给塔米拉展示找到的乐谱。

393217400.Text: 【临时】「共同体，哦！宏伟的共同体，你为多少人遮风挡雪，你是屹立在末日中的奇迹…」

393217399.Text: 【临时】不会错的，这肯定是旧时代的音乐剧桥段，真是惊人呀。

393217402.Text: 【临时】这段音乐的旋律非常激昂，歌词的立意也很磅礴呢。

393217401.Text: 【临时】虽然长度很短，只能拿来做开幕或者中场衔接的穿插…但是只要把它搬到舞台上，反响肯定会很热烈吧？

393217396.Text: 【临时】只有一个问题，它的歌词有几行已经模糊不清了，必须得找人重新填词才行呢。

393217395.Text: 【临时】真是头疼呀…这么高级的作品，对词曲的要求都是顶尖的。有谁能胜任这个工作呢？

393217397.Text: 【临时】我？不行啦，填词这种事，肯定得让专业的人来做嘛。

393217392.Text: 【临时】你有合作过的人可以帮忙吗？

393217391.Text: 【临时】填词这种事，一般都是请专职的词人，或者是由创作型的音乐人自己来做的吧？

-1172866541.Text: 【临时】我跟那些人接触不多，而且他们的水平…在我看来其实很一般呢。

-1172866542.Text: 【临时】有可能的话，我当然希望找真正有天赋，有热情的人来补完这首曲子啦。

-1172866539.Text: 【临时】我倒是认识几个做音乐的人…

-1172866545.Text: 【临时】多找几个人也没关系啦，报酬我出得起。我要比对一下不同人的风格，找到最合适的那个版本。

-1172866544.Text: 【临时】哎呀，这个你不用担心啦。你可以去问问剧组的人，我一向是很大方的。

-1172866549.Text: 【临时】那就拜托你们了，我就在这里等你们的消息哦。

-1576151068.Text: 【临时】等待希露瓦完成歌词创作……

-1576151070.Text: 【临时】那个，你能不能跟委托人说一下，验收和付款别拖太久？我可不想再找老弟借钱了……

-1576151071.Text: 【临时】总感觉…塔米拉对希露瓦写的歌词不会很满意……

-1576151077.Text: 【临时】外来者？你在这里做什么？

1152732287.Text: 【临时】虽然我跟你无怨无仇，但是像这样在外面招摇乱晃…可是会让我很头疼的。

1152732289.Text: 【临时】即便我揭发了你，那也只是尽到了一个副官的责任而已，跟坏人也扯不上关系吧？

1152732288.Text: 【临时】有话还是直说吧，千万不能让别人看到我们在这儿。

1152732282.Text: 【临时】那还麻烦你语速快些，千万不能让别人看到我们在这儿。

1152732285.Text: 【临时】塔米拉想请你帮忙写几句歌词。

1152732284.Text: 【临时】塔米拉？那位名演员塔米拉？

1152732279.Text: 【临时】真、真的吗？她想请我为她写词？

1152732278.Text: 【临时】这…咳，这还真是意外，我很荣幸。那么，是什么样的音乐呢？

1912247174.Text: 【临时】给佩拉展示歌词缺失的乐谱。

1912247176.Text: 【临时】是我从来没有接触过的音乐类型，填词恐怕有一定的难度。

1912247175.Text: 【临时】但是，如果委托人是那位塔米拉小姐的话…我一定会尽力去做的。

1912247170.Text: 【临时】你找地方先躲一会儿，我写完了就回来找你——千万别被人抓住了。

1912247169.Text: 【临时】等待佩拉完成歌词创作…等了很久…很久……

1912247172.Text: 【临时】久等了，我的歌词完成了。

1912247166.Text: 【临时】慢工出细活。你们先看一遍吧。

346163232.Text: 【临时】你好像把它完全改编了…

346163235.Text: 【临时】那是当然，在我看来，这段音乐的旋律更符合悲怆的情境。

346163234.Text: 【临时】我想了很久，想要充分传达这种意境，果然还是得彻底改编才行。希望塔米拉小姐能了解我的用意。

346163229.Text: 【临时】对了，那个…你能帮我要到她的签名吗？我一直很喜欢塔米拉小姐的戏……

346163225.Text: 【临时】咳，你们快走吧，这里不是你们该待的地方。

346163224.Text: 【临时】塔米拉小姐…真的能接受这种黑暗系的歌词吗？

1556016651.Text: 【临时】唉，果然还是得再找找看……

1556016652.Text: 【临时】圣女为众人摘下果实~她将果实挂在空中，化作了漫天繁星～

1556016649.Text: 【临时】啊啦啦~是什么让您在小女子身边驻足？难道是我的歌声吸引了您的主意？

1556016655.Text: 【临时】哎呀，多谢各位夸奖，我觉得还差的远啦。我只是想先开开嗓，给明晚的演出做准备。

1556016656.Text: 【临时】我给这首歌取名叫「圣女的果实」。这个旋律已经在我脑海里盘绕很久了，一直到最近我才把歌词填进去。

1556016654.Text: 【临时】喜欢吗？我给这首歌取名叫「圣女的果实」。这个旋律已经在我脑海里盘绕很久了，一直到最近我才把歌词填进去。

1556016643.Text: 【临时】自从当上了全职配音演员，留给我自己创作的时间和空间就不多了~

1556016644.Text: 【临时】毕竟塔米拉小姐的演出那么火爆，一场接着一场——要是她的替身有所怠慢，观众可就要不开心咯。

-10067290.Text: 【临时】塔米拉小姐正好在找人填词…

-10067289.Text: 【临时】啊啦，还有这么巧的事？不介意的话，可以给小女子看看她的需求吗？

-10067292.Text: 【临时】给塞琳展示歌词缺失的乐谱。

-10067291.Text: 【临时】「共同体，哦！宏伟壮丽的共同体，你为多少人遮风挡雪，你是屹立在末日中的奇迹。」

-10067286.Text: 【临时】哎呀，是之前从来没表演过的作品呢！我从来没试过给塔米拉小姐的演出作品填词，这回可得下点功夫了。

-10067285.Text: 【临时】不过我倒是很乐意尝试一下。可以麻烦您稍等一会儿吗？

-10067288.Text: 【临时】等待塞琳完成歌词创作……

-10067287.Text: 【临时】久等了！果然跟自己平时写着玩儿的区别很大，不过终于还是完成了。

-10067298.Text: 【临时】小女子的才能有限，也只能完成到这个地步了。请你先看看吧~

-10067297.Text: 【临时】怎么样？你觉得符合塔米拉小姐的要求吗？

393217237.Text: 【临时】我知道啦，肯定还有些措辞欠缺打磨，离优秀的词人写出的东西还差得远。

393217236.Text: 【临时】真的吗？谢谢您给我信心~

393217241.Text: 【临时】不过，如果让塔米拉小姐知道这是我写的，怕不是会做出一些刻薄的评语吧？

393217242.Text: 【临时】哎呀，作为替身演员，就是要承受这样的压力啦。

393217239.Text: 【临时】不管这段歌词会不会被采用，反正真正演出的时候都是由我来唱嘛，区别也不大啦~

393217240.Text: 【临时】相比希露瓦和佩拉的版本，塞琳的歌词应该更符合大众审美吧？

393217229.Text: 【临时】果然，摇滚歌手的脑回路就是和一般人不一样啊。

393217230.Text: 【临时】你们找到合适的填词人了吗？

-1172866703.Text: 【临时】我带了三个不同的版本回来。

-1172866700.Text: 【临时】我只是个热心路人罢了。

-1172866699.Text: 【临时】在这个冷漠年代，热心肠的人真是越来越少了呢。能碰上你是我的运气。

-1172866702.Text: 【临时】我是新人导演，正在物色女主角。

-1172866701.Text: 【临时】真不容易，等到哪天你在这行闯出名堂了，记得邀请我参演你的戏哦。

-1172866712.Text: 【临时】说回正事吧，可以把你征集到的歌词给我看看吗？

-413351816.Text: 【临时】这位填词者真是热情满满呢…甚至有些愤怒的情绪在里面？

-413351813.Text: 【临时】这位作者是不是，嗯…该怎么礼貌地表达呢……

-413351812.Text: 【临时】她的生活是不是有点不太如意呀？

-413351815.Text: 【临时】我知道对于创作者来说，「悲痛」往往是一种源动力。但我果然还是想在作品里传达积极的情绪呢……

-413351825.Text: 【临时】啊，这位词人好像很了解我的偏好呢！

-413351824.Text: 【临时】既颂扬了共同体的宏伟壮丽，同时又没有粗暴地叠加辞藻……

-1979435757.Text: 【临时】虽然我心里已经有答案了，但果然还是该征求下别人的意见……

-1979435760.Text: 【临时】哪份歌词最符合你的审美呢？

-1979435759.Text: 【临时】这个世界需要更多摇滚和叛逆。

-1979435754.Text: 【临时】原来如此，你喜欢的是这种风格吗……

-1979435753.Text: 【临时】的确，现在的年轻人，好像越来越不懂欣赏高雅艺术了呢。

-1979435756.Text: 【临时】抱歉，但是我心中已经有一位赢家啦。

-1979435766.Text: 【临时】原来如此，你喜欢的是这种风格吗……

-1979435765.Text: 【临时】老实说，我欣赏不来无病呻吟的艺术。当然啦，我也不知道这位作者经历了什么，所以也不能轻易下判断呢。

-1576151231.Text: 【临时】抱歉，但是我心中已经有一位赢家啦。

-1576151230.Text: 【临时】这部歌剧应该彰显共同体的荣光。

-1576151233.Text: 【临时】你和我的想法完全一致呢。这样看来，结果就显而易见啦。

-1576151232.Text: 【临时】「愿你的光芒永不褪去，坚守普拉米亚子民的尊严与荣誉」——这段歌词的收尾铿锵有力，和我预想的几乎一模一样。

-1576151227.Text: 【临时】能告诉我它的作者是哪位大师吗？

-1576151229.Text: 【临时】塞、塞琳？居然是她吗？不是哪位职业的词人或是歌手？

-1576151228.Text: 【临时】没想到那姑娘还有这样的能力，我还是低估她了呢。

-1576151239.Text: 【临时】不仅嗓音漂亮，还有创作能力…长相也算甜美……

-1576151238.Text: 【临时】那个，能答应我一件事吗？我会采用这份歌词，但还请你对这整件事保密。

1152732124.Text: 【临时】如果塞琳的作品获得了认可，那她可能就不会甘愿做我的替身了。那样的话，我就……

1152732125.Text: 【临时】拜托你了，只要能帮我保守秘密，我一定会重金酬谢的！

1152732123.Text: 【临时】谢谢你…请你收下这些吧，只是我的一点心意。

1152732128.Text: 【临时】大家有权知道填词者的名字。

1152732129.Text: 【临时】…的确，我都说了些什么蠢话呀…我要冷静下来……

1152732126.Text: 【临时】我明白了，这个要求确实有些过分。抱歉，都是可鄙的自私心理在作祟呢……

1152732127.Text: 【临时】不好意思，我先告辞了——今天的声乐练习还没完成。
